title: YouTube Growth Strategist
description:
YouTube Specialist Needed

Help Us Maximize the Potential of Our Existing Content



We have two YouTube channels, a creative team consistently producing videos, and a sense that we could be achieving much more with what we already have. That’s where you come in.



We’re not looking for someone to create videos—we need a strategist who can evaluate what we’re doing and suggest smarter ways to approach it. Think of yourself as an optimization expert, an analytics pro, and a strategic advisor all in one.



What You’ll Do:

-Dive into the data for our two channels (one for clients, one for VAs)

-Analyze what's working, what's not, and provide clear insights

-Review and optimize our thumbnails, titles, descriptions, and tags

-Deliver actionable recommendations we can put into practice

-Track which changes make a real impact and which ones don’t

-Bonus points if you're also interested in suggesting content ideas (though this is optional)



What You Need:

-Expertise in YouTube SEO—this isn't your first time around the block

-The ability to interpret analytics and provide meaningful insights

-A proven track record of helping YouTube channels grow

-Strong English communication skills (we need to understand your recommendations!)

-Self-starter mentality, comfortable working independently



Bonus Points If:

-You have experience with B2B content

-You’re familiar with tools like TubeBuddy or VidIQ

-You stay up-to-date with YouTube algorithm updates and best practices

-You’ve analyzed competitor channels and understand what works in various niches



The Setup:

-Start part-time (20 hours/week) or project-based

-If you're excelling, we can discuss transitioning to full-time after one month

-Flexible hours—we care about results, not when you're working



Why You'll Enjoy This:

-You’ll see real impact from your recommendations

-No pressure to create content—just pure strategy

-Opportunities for growth into a bigger role

-Work with a team that values your input and ideas



If you're skilled at spotting opportunities and helping YouTube channels perform better, we want to hear from you. Apply today!

title: Copywriting Roles for Shopify Available
description:
We are currently looking for multiple experienced copywriters to join our team and assist with ongoing Shopify projects. This role will focus on website copy and helping structure content directly within Shopify stores.



In addition to writing strong copy, we are also looking for individuals who are familiar with the Shopify platform itself, as part of the role will involve adding and formatting content inside Shopify, organizing product pages and ensuring everything is presented clearly and professionally for customers.



You will receive training and guidance from our team, but we do expect applicants to already have strong English writing skills and a basic understanding of how Shopify works.



We work across a variety of different eCommerce stores and industries, so this role is ideal for someone who enjoys writing, understands online shopping behavior, and can present products in a clear and compelling way.



Responsibilities:



• Write clear and engaging product descriptions

• Assist with website copy such as product pages, collections, and other store content

• Add and format product information directly within Shopify

• Ensure product pages are well structured, easy to read, and optimized for customers

• Follow guidelines and instructions provided by our team

• Maintain consistency across product listings and store content



Requirements:



• Excellent English writing skills

• Experience writing product descriptions or eCommerce copy

• Familiarity with the Shopify platform (product uploads, editing pages, formatting content, etc.)

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow instructions and maintain consistent formatting

• Reliable communication and availability for ongoing work



We will provide training and clear guidelines, but it is important that applicants already feel comfortable working inside Shopify and writing product-focused content.



To confirm that you have read this job listing and that you have experience working with Shopify, please include the phrase “I listen Dylan” somewhere in your application message.



When applying, please also include examples of product descriptions or eCommerce copy you have written, and briefly mention your experience using Shopify.



We are looking for multiple copywriters who can become part of our team and assist with ongoing Shopify store content and product listing work.

title: General / Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
About the Role:

We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Virtual Administrative Assistant to support a dynamic college professor who is also an entrepreneur, homeowner, and single father based in the U.S. The ideal candidate will thrive managing diverse responsibilities, from academic and business projects to personal administrative support, ensuring seamless day-to-day operations across multiple domains.



Key Responsibilities:

Administrative Support: Efficiently manage and coordinate complex calendars, schedule appointments, organize meetings, and streamline activities across academic and business commitments.



Communication Management: Professionally handle
 correspondence, including drafting, replying, and proactively managing inboxes to maintain timely and clear communication with academic colleagues, business clients, and personal contacts.



Task Coordination: Help prioritize tasks, manage comprehensive to-do lists, and track deadlines across various ongoing projects and personal responsibilities.



Research and Documentation: Conduct thorough research for academic endeavors, business initiatives, and personal projects. Prepare professional reports, presentations, and documents as needed.



Personal Assistance: Facilitate scheduling appointments, manage household logistics, coordinate personal finances, and support the organization of day-to-day household activities.



Business Operations Support: Assist in managing business operations, including customer service interactions, order processing, inventory oversight, and engaging social media management.



Qualifications:

Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant or in a similar administrative role.

Exceptional organizational skills with strong attention to detail.

Outstanding written and verbal communication abilities.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and productivity tools.

Demonstrated ability to maintain confidentiality and manage sensitive information.

Strong problem-solving capabilities and the ability to work independently.

Familiarity with academic settings or business operations is advantageous.



Why You'll Love This Role:

Flexible working hours, with the freedom to work remotely from anywhere.

Opportunity to engage with diverse, meaningful projects and contribute significantly to their success.

Collaborate closely with a multifaceted individual, enhancing your professional growth and experience.



How to Apply:

Interested applicants are invited to submit their resume along with a brief cover letter highlighting their qualifications, relevant experiences, and motivation for applying. Demonstrate clearly how your skills align with managing multifaceted tasks and responsibilities.



This position offers a starting commitment of 10 hours per week, with potential for increased hours based on performance and need.



Please submit your application using the subject line: GENERAL VA

title: Proactive Video Editor & Youtube Channel Manager (Medical Podcasts)
description:
Calling All Video Editors!

 

Can you speak and write great English (this is a requirement)? Need some Pesos? Want to work full-time for a USA-based company that has several full-time Filipino employees who have worked with us for years?

If so, this is a great opportunity for you.

 

Do you have a passion for transforming ideas into captivating stories through the magic of video editing? Are you an Adobe Premiere Pro whiz with a keen eye for detail? If so, we want YOU on our team!

 

Here's the deal: We're searching for a talented and enthusiastic Video Editor and creator to join our growing team. You'll be working with us to create and edit engaging and visually stunning videos that will grab attention and leave a lasting impression. You must be able to speak and write good English for this position.

 

Specifically, About This Role: You will be handling content for YouTube channels run by medical professionals. You will be working with specialized medical content presented in a long-form podcast format.

 

In this role, you will be collaborating with an existing production team. While you will have support and clear communication channels, we need an independent problem-solver. You should be able to take raw video/audio, handle the post-production pipeline alongside the team, and deliver without needing to be micromanaged or constantly reminded of deadlines.



Key Responsibilities:



Video & Audio Editing: Edit engaging long-form video podcasts using Adobe Premiere Pro. Because these are podcasts, you must have strong audio engineering skills to clean up background noise, balance levels, and make the final audio sound crisp and professional for listeners.



Thumbnail Design: Create high-converting, eye-catching thumbnails that drive clicks.



Channel Management: Fully navigate and manage the back end of YouTube. You will be responsible for uploading videos, managing playlists, and ensuring the channel runs smoothly.



Team Collaboration: Communicate effectively with the rest of the team to ensure workflows are smooth, assets are shared properly, and everyone is on the same page regarding publishing schedules.



AI-Assisted Optimization: Efficiently use AI tools to generate SEO-friendly titles, engaging descriptions, and tags to maximize video reach.



Requirements:

Excellent written and spoken English.

High proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro.

Proven experience editing long-form YouTube videos and podcasts.

Solid audio editing capabilities (EQ, compression, noise reduction).

Experience managing YouTube channels and an understanding of YouTube analytics and SEO.

Proficiency in graphic design software for thumbnail creation (Photoshop, Canva, etc.).

Highly reliable: You manage your own time, meet deadlines consistently, and communicate proactively without a manager looking over your shoulder.



The Tech Stuff:

A PC/Laptop with enough muscle to handle video editing:

Intel Core i5/i7 or AMD Ryzen 5/7 (newer generations are ideal), and at least 16GB of RAM.

A large hard drive to store all your amazing video creations (at least 1TB of storage).

Graphics card, optional.

A reliable and fast internet connection for uploading and downloading large video files.



We help a lot of people, and you will be an important part of that process and our office. This is a full-time job. We need to hire immediately.

 

Shift: USA EST Mondays through Fridays - 10:00 am - 6:00 pm (PHI night 11:00 pm to 7:00 am)

 

Compensation and Benefits:



Base Salary: 40,000 PHP per month



Quarterly Bonus: 20,000 PHP Every 3 months (we do this in place of the 13th month).



Paid Time Off: We have paid time off and have some Philippine holidays off, such as All Saints Day, etc.



We are very familiar with Philippine-based VAs (we have 14 full-time permanent) and include our Philippine friends as Pamilya, and as an important part of our staff. We have never had any of our Philippine friends quit, as we treat everyone with respect and as an important part of our team.

In fact, in 2022, we took our Philippine friends on an all-expense-paid trip for two to Boracay, as a way of saying thank you. In 2023, we took our Philippine friends on another all-expense-paid trip for two to Alona Beach in Bohol. During the first week of April 2024, we took everyone to El Nido, Palawan. In March 2025, we went to Boracay again. These trips are at no cost to our Filipino friends, including food, travel, and lodging, and we stay at high-end 5-star resorts such as Henann resorts.

 

We will respond within Online Jobs PH to those we wish to interview and set up a meeting via Zoom or MS Teams. Please check back in Online Jobs to look for our response.

 

To Apply:



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY WITH ORIGINAL WORK SUBMITTED AS SAMPLES



Click the apply button below and type in "Video Ninja" in the subject.



1. Please send us your most recent voice recording, letting us know who you are, why you want this job, and why we should pick you.



2. Please include if you have both a computer and a cell phone.



3. Please include your internet capabilities.



4. Please include YOUR ORIGINAL samples of your video editing that you have completed.

title: Shopify Developer for Ongoing Work - Immediate Start!
description:
We are currently looking for a skilled and reliable Shopify Developer to join our team for ongoing eCommerce projects. This role will involve designing and developing Shopify stores from the ground up, so we are looking for someone who is not only technically capable but also has a good eye for layout, structure, and user experience.



Unlike some development roles, you will not be working from pre-made design files. Instead, we will provide direction, examples, and guidance, and you will be responsible for bringing the store to life within Shopify, ensuring the design is clean, modern, and optimized for conversions.



We are looking for someone who can take general instructions and creatively build professional Shopify stores, while still following our guidelines and maintaining consistency with the types of stores we build.



There is work ready to start immediately, and we are ideally looking for someone who can become a reliable long-term part of our team as we continue building and launching stores for clients.



Responsibilities:



• Build and develop Shopify stores from start to finish

• Design clean, modern store layouts directly within Shopify

• Create well-structured product pages, collection pages, and homepage layouts

• Ensure stores are mobile responsive and easy to navigate

• Follow guidance and direction provided by our team

• Troubleshoot and resolve any development or functionality issues

• Deliver projects within the required timelines



Requirements:



• Strong experience working with Shopify

• Ability to design and structure stores directly within Shopify

• Good understanding of Shopify themes and customization

• Experience working with apps, product setup, and store configuration

• Solid understanding of eCommerce best practices and conversion-focused layouts

• Strong attention to detail

• Good communication and reliability



To help us filter applications and confirm you have read the full listing, please include the phrase “I listen to Dylan” somewhere within your application message.



When applying, please include examples of Shopify stores you have developed, and briefly explain your experience designing and building stores within Shopify.



We are looking for someone who can start soon and assist with ongoing Shopify development work, so if you believe you are a good fit, we look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Meta Ads Specialist | Performance Marketing
description:
Job Title: Meta Ads Specialist | Performance Marketing



Job Overview



We are seeking a results-driven Meta Ads Specialist to manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns across
 and Instagram. This role is responsible for planning, launching, and scaling high-performing campaigns that generate leads, sales, and measurable ROI.



The ideal candidate must have proven experience managing Meta Ads campaigns, with a strong understanding of audience targeting, conversion tracking, creative testing, and campaign optimization. This role requires someone who is highly analytical, data-driven, and capable of continuously improving campaign performance.



You will work closely with the marketing team to develop ad strategies, test creatives, analyze performance data, and scale winning campaigns while maintaining cost efficiency.



Note: We’re only processing applications submitted through the form.

Form link:



Key Responsibilities



Campaign Strategy & Setup



-Plan, create, and launch
 and Instagram ad campaigns aligned with business goals

-Conduct audience research and develop detailed targeting strategies

-Build campaign structures including campaigns, ad sets, and ad creatives

-Implement proper conversion tracking using Meta Pixel and events

-Ensure correct campaign objectives are selected (Leads, Conversions, Traffic, etc.)



Note: We’re only processing applications submitted through the form.

Form link:



Campaign Optimization & Performance Management



-Monitor campaign performance daily and optimize for better ROI

-Conduct A/B testing on creatives, audiences, placements, and copy

-Adjust budgets, bids, and targeting based on performance data

-Scale successful campaigns while maintaining profitable cost per result

-Identify and troubleshoot performance issues quickly



Creative Testing & Ad Development



-Collaborate with the creative team to develop high-performing ad creatives

-Test multiple variations of ad copy, images, and videos

-Analyze creative performance and identify winning ads

-Continuously iterate and improve ad creatives based on results



Analytics & Reporting



-Track and analyze key performance metrics including:



*Cost Per Lead (CPL)

*Cost Per Acquisition (CPA)

*Click-Through Rate (CTR)

*Return on Ad Spend (ROAS)



-Prepare weekly or monthly campaign performance reports

-Provide insights and recommendations to improve results

-Use analytics to guide campaign scaling and optimization strategies



Note: We’re only processing applications submitted through the form.

Form link:



Funnel & Lead Generation Optimization



-Ensure proper integration with landing pages, CRM, or lead forms

-Monitor lead quality and optimize campaigns for better conversions

-Work with marketing or sales teams to improve funnel performance

-Ensure all leads are properly tracked and attributed



Required Qualifications



-Proven experience managing Meta 
 & Instagram) Ads campaigns

-Demonstrated track record of generating leads or sales through paid ads

-Strong understanding of Meta Ads Manager and campaign structures

-Experience with conversion tracking, Meta Pixel, and event setup

-Ability to analyze data and optimize campaigns based on performance metrics

-Strong understanding of audience targeting, retargeting, and lookalike audiences

-Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills

-Ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously

-Strong communication and reporting skills

-Ability to work independently in a remote environment

title: Shopify Product Lister Wanted to Join Our Team
description:
We are currently looking for a reliable and experienced Shopify Product Researcher & Product Lister to join our team and assist with ongoing eCommerce projects for our agency. This role will involve researching products and adding them to Shopify dropshipping stores, ensuring that each product is properly structured, formatted, and ready for sale.



You will be responsible for finding suitable products based on the niche and guidelines provided by our team, then adding and organizing them directly within Shopify. We will provide clear templates, examples, and instructions for how products should be listed and structured, so the workflow should be straightforward for someone who already has experience working with Shopify and dropshipping stores.



A key part of this role is working with dropshipping integration apps, so applicants must already have experience using tools such as DSers, Zendrop, CJ Dropshipping, AutoDS, or similar product importing platforms. You should be comfortable importing products, editing listings, organizing variants, and ensuring the products are presented professionally inside the Shopify store.



We are looking for someone who understands how dropshipping stores operate, has strong attention to detail, and can follow structured guidelines while building out product catalogs for multiple stores.



Responsibilities:



• Research products that fit the store niche and direction provided by our team

• Import and add products directly into Shopify stores

• Work with dropshipping tools such as DSers, Zendrop, CJ Dropshipping, AutoDS, or similar platforms

• Edit and format product titles, descriptions, images, and variants

• Ensure listings follow the templates and structure provided by our team

• Organize product collections and ensure listings look clean and professional

• Assist with building out product catalogs for dropshipping stores



Requirements:



• Proven experience working with Shopify

• Experience with dropshipping product research and product listing

• Familiarity with dropshipping integration apps such as DSers, Zendrop, CJ Dropshipping, AutoDS, or similar tools

• Strong understanding of Shopify product pages and listing structure

• Good attention to detail when uploading and formatting products

• Strong English comprehension for product descriptions and store content

• Reliable communication and availability for ongoing work



To confirm you have read the full job listing, please include the phrase “I listen to Dylan” somewhere in your application.



When applying, please include examples of Shopify stores you have worked on, product listings you have created, or proof of your experience with Shopify and dropshipping tools.



We are looking for someone who can become a reliable part of our team and assist with ongoing product research and listing work across multiple Shopify stores.

title: Scriptwriter + Storyboarder (Character-Based Toy Brand) — Short-Form Videos / Ads
description:
We’re building a character-driven toy brand and we’re looking for a creative who can write short scripts and turn them into clear, punchy storyboards. Think: toy personality, playful lore, comedic timing, and scenes that sell the product fast.



You’ll help us create short-form content for TikTok/IG Reels/YouTube Shorts and lightweight ad concepts.



What you’ll do

- Write 15–45 second scripts (hook ? beats ? payoff ? CTA)

- Develop storyboards (shot list + simple panels or frame references)

- Create character-driven humor, dialogue, and reactions

- Pitch multiple concept directions quickly

- Collaborate with our team to refine tone, pacing, and product clarity



What we’re looking for

- Strong short-form writing: hooks, punchlines, pacing, structure

- Storyboarding skill: visual clarity, camera beats, comedic timing

- Experience with character-based content (mascots, branded characters, animation, toys, games, comics)

- Good English writing (or excellent “internet-style” dialogue)



Bonus points

- Toy/collectibles or mascot brand experience

- Understanding of performance-first ads (clear “what it is” in 5 seconds)

- Motion/animation knowledge (even if you don’t animate)



Deliverables

- Script + storyboard per concept (typically 1–3 per week to start)

- Storyboards can be simple (stick-figure clarity is fine) as long as shots are understandable



To apply, please include

- Portfolio or samples (scripts + storyboard samples preferred)

- A short note on your favorite character-based brand/content and why

- Availability (hours/week)

title: Digital Marketing Specialist – PPC & Website Management
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to manage and optimize our paid search campaigns while maintaining the health, performance, and backend functionality of our website. This role is ideal for someone who is analytical, technically proficient, and comfortable owning both lead generation and website infrastructure that supports conversions.



Key Responsibilities



PPC & Paid Media Management

- Plan, build, manage, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Performance Max, Display, and Local Service Ads as applicable).

- Conduct keyword research, ad copy creation, audience targeting, and bid strategy optimization.

- Monitor campaign performance daily, identifying opportunities to improve ROI, conversion rates, and cost per lead.

- Manage budgets and pacing to ensure efficient spend and maximum impact.

- Set up and maintain conversion tracking, including Google Tag Manager, GA4, and call tracking integrations.

- Produce regular performance reports with clear insights and actionable recommendations.



Website Health & Backend Management

- Monitor overall website health, including site speed, uptime, mobile responsiveness, and technical SEO fundamentals.

- Manage backend updates such as plugins, themes, security patches, and CMS updates (e.g., WordPress or similar platforms).

- Troubleshoot technical issues that impact user experience, tracking accuracy, or lead flow.

- Collaborate on landing page creation and optimization to support PPC campaigns and conversion goals.

- Ensure proper form functionality, call tracking, and CRM integrations are working correctly.

- Implement basic on-page SEO best practices in coordination with marketing goals.

title: Video Editor (PHP 350/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: GTM & Lead Generation Manager (Senior)
description:
Job description



To get shortlisted, Apply here : 



Important Note: Apply only if you have a minimum of 5 years of experience and are an immediate joiner or can join within 1 week. Applications not meeting these criteria will be automatically rejected.





Role Overview



This is a senior role for candidates with 5+ years of experience in B2B sales, demand generation, or go-to-market strategy.



You will be responsible for designing and executing lead generation strategies that drive qualified pipeline for enterprise clients. The role combines outbound strategy, market research, content positioning, and partnership development.



You will work closely with founders and product teams to identify target markets, build repeatable GTM playbooks, and convert outreach into qualified opportunities.



This position owns pipeline generation and GTM execution, not just outreach activity.





Responsibilities



GTM Strategy & Market Development



Define and refine target markets, ICPs (Ideal Customer Profiles), and buyer personas.

Develop structured GTM strategies for enterprise services and SaaS products.

Identify high-value accounts and sectors to prioritize.



Enterprise Lead Generation



Design and manage outbound lead generation campaigns across LinkedIn,
, and strategic outreach.

Build structured outreach sequences and messaging frameworks.

Convert marketing engagement into qualified sales conversations.



Pipeline & Opportunity Development



Conduct discovery conversations with prospects and qualify opportunities.

Book and manage qualified meetings with decision-makers and stakeholders.

Collaborate with founders and sales leads to progress opportunities through the pipeline.



Account Research & Intelligence



Lead deep research on target organizations, decision-makers, and buying committees.

Map enterprise accounts, stakeholders, and partner ecosystems.

Identify opportunities for partnerships, integrations, and alliances.



Content & Messaging Support



Support development of sales narratives, pitch materials, and messaging frameworks.

Contribute insights from market conversations to improve positioning.

Collaborate on case studies, thought leadership, and industry content.



CRM & GTM Process Management



Ensure CRM data accuracy and maintain structured activity tracking.

Build repeatable GTM processes, outreach playbooks, and reporting.

Track performance metrics and continuously improve outreach effectiveness.



Requirements



5+ years experience in B2B sales development, demand generation, or GTM roles

Experience targeting enterprise customers or mid-market B2B clients

Strong research and account-mapping capabilities

Proven ability to generate qualified meetings and pipeline

Experience running structured outbound campaigns (LinkedIn,
, targeted outreach)

Strong communication and stakeholder engagement skills

Comfortable working in startup environments with direct collaboration with founders



Nice to Have



Experience with Enterprise SaaS or technology solutions

Exposure to complex enterprise solutions or digital transformation projects

Familiarity with CRM tools

Experience working with system integrators, technology partners, or enterprise ecosystems

Understanding of Account-Based Marketing (ABM)



Success Metrics



Qualified accounts identified and researched

Enterprise stakeholders mapped per account

Qualified meetings booked with target organizations

Pipeline value generated from outbound campaigns

Positive reply rates and engagement metrics

Partnership opportunities identified

CRM hygiene and process discipline



What This Role Is



Ownership of enterprise lead generation and GTM execution

Direct exposure to founders and strategic decision-making

Opportunity to build repeatable sales and marketing playbooks

A key role in scaling enterprise pipeline and partnerships

title: Cold Email Response Specialist (Instantly.ai) – Lead Qualification & Inbox Management
description:
We are currently looking for a reliable Cold
 Response Specialist to join our team and manage replies coming in from our
 outreach campaigns. This role focuses on responding to incoming
s from potential leads, qualifying interest, and helping move conversations toward a booked sales call.



Our outreach campaigns generate replies throughout the day, and we need someone who can monitor the inbox and respond quickly — ideally within 10 minutes whenever possible. You will be following clear response guidelines, templates, and qualification steps provided by our team, so the role is less about sales and more about timely communication, organization, and correctly qualifying leads.



This position is best suited for someone who is highly attentive, responsive, and comfortable managing
 conversations in a professional and friendly manner. Strong communication skills and reliability are extremely important, as quick response times play a key role in converting leads into booked calls.



Responsibilities:



• Monitor incoming replies from cold
 campaigns

• Respond to potential leads within a 10-minute timeframe whenever possible

• Follow our provided response guidelines and messaging structure

• Ask the appropriate questions to qualify the lead’s interest

• Guide qualified leads toward booking a sales call

• Record and track lead responses in Google Sheets

• Communicate with our team and provide updates when necessary



Requirements:



• Experience with
 outreach tools such as Instantly.ai (or similar platforms)

• Strong written English communication skills

• Ability to respond to messages quickly and professionally

• Comfortable working with Google Sheets for tracking leads

• Familiarity with Google Chat or similar team communication tools

• Strong attention to detail when handling incoming leads

• Highly responsive, organized, and reliable



To confirm you have read the full job listing, please include the phrase “I listen to Dylan” somewhere in your application.



When applying, please briefly explain your experience managing
 replies, working with outreach platforms like Instantly.ai, or handling lead qualification.



We are looking for someone who can become a reliable part of our team and help manage incoming lead responses efficiently as part of our cold
 outreach system.

title: Social Media Reels & Memes Specialist - Immediate Work Available
description:
We’re a fast-growing travel-themed social media brand producing daily content across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
 and Threads. We create both informative and humorous content and we’re now looking for someone to join our team specifically to create 
-style short videos with a travel twist.



You’ll be responsible for creating 
s on your own accord that speak to travelers, digital nomads and globetrotters. If you're someone who’s always in tune with social trends and loves turning everyday situations or cultural quirks into viral video 
nts, this is the perfect fit.



In this role, you’ll be creating engaging vertical videos (10–15 seconds long) designed for Reels, TikTok and YouTube Shorts. You’ll add humorous captions, pick the right music or trending audio into scroll-stopping content. Everything must be formatted correctly and delivered clean, watermark-free and ready to post.



We’re looking for someone with a strong sense of humor and creativity who understands modern 
 formats and how to catch attention quickly. You should be comfortable pitching ideas, editing on your own, and delivering videos that feel like they belong on the explore page or For You feed. If you enjoy travel content, follow viral pages or are naturally good at spotting trends, that’s a major bonus.



This is an immediate start with ongoing work provided weekly. You’ll be working closely with our creative team and provided with a clear structure and support. Long-term potential is absolutely available for the right person.



To be considered, please send at least two examples of 
-style short videos you’ve created they can be personal, sample edits or client work.



To confirm you’ve read everything and pay attention to detail, you must include the phrase “I LISTEN DYLAN” at the end of your message. If this is missing, your application will be skipped.



We’re excited to see what you can bring to the brand. Let’s make something funny together.

title: Lead Generation Supervisor
description:
Description

We are seeking a Lead Generation Supervisor who will be esponsible for designing, executing, and managing lead generation and referral development strategy. Oversees sourcing, research, outreach, qualification, and scheduling of pre-assessment appointments. Manages referral outreach campaigns to increase inbound and outbound referral opportunities. Supports up to the pre-assessment stage and, when needed, conducts pre-assessment calls to assist the Supervisor for Intake & Client Conversion. Ensures accurate documentation, disciplined follow-up, compliance, and strict protection of proprietary information.



Core Responsibilities:



Develop and execute lead generation strategy to consistently produce warm, qualified prospects for intake and conversion.

Build and manage outreach campaigns targeting private-pay prospects and referral partners to increase lead flow and strengthen referral pipelines.

Source, research, organize, clean, segment, and manage prospect and referral lists for optimized outreach and conversion.

Conduct structured multi-channel outreach (calls, SMS,
) using approved messaging and compliance standards.

Qualify prospects based on service need, urgency, location, and suitability.

Nurture leads through structured follow-up cycles until ready for pre-assessment scheduling.

Schedule pre-assessment appointments directly with the Supervisor for Intake & Client Conversion and confirm details with clients.

When required, conduct pre-assessment calls to support the Supervisor for Intake & Client Conversion during highvolume or urgent periods.

Accurately update CRM stages, notes, tags, tasks, and communication logs immediately after every interaction.

Notify the Managing Member and Supervisor for Intake & Client Conversion when leads become warm, preassessments are booked, or conversions occur.

Produce weekly lead generation and referral performance reports including lead volume, warm leads, campaign effectiveness, and recommendations for improvement.

Drive outbound and referral campaign performance to generate the lead volume necessary to support growth trajectory.

Continuously refine outreach cadence, messaging, targeting, and list quality based on performance metrics and conversion outcomes.

Collaborate with the Supervisor for Intake & Client Conversion to ensure smooth hand-offs and optimal lead readiness for pre-assessment.

Collaborate with the Supervisor for HR Recruitment to align staffing needs with projected lead and referral volume.

Maintain communication flow through WhatsApp channels and ensure all appointments are updated accurately on internal calendars.

Identify declines in lead quality, referral engagement, or outreach performance early and provide corrective strategies.

Data Protection & Confidentiality Requirements:



May only work with leads sourced personally or assigned for outreach; proprietary leads, lists, or strategies may not be exported, saved, copied, shared, reused, or retained outside approved systems.

Breach of confidentiality, improper handling of data, or unauthorized retention of contact information results in immediate termination.

Performance Standards:



Production of high-quality warm leads and referral opportunities aligned with intake and service needs. • Strong conversion rates from outreach to qualified warm status.

CRM documentation must be complete, accurate, and updated in real time.

Reliable scheduling of pre-assessment appointments with confirmed client communication.

Weekly reporting delivered on time with actionable insights and performance analysis.

Professional, compliant, and consistent communication across all outreach efforts.

Requirements

5+ years experience in lead generation, outreach campaigns, appointment setting, or referral development (healthcare/home care strongly preferred).

Proven ability to manage high-volume lead pipelines and outbound/referral campaign strategies.

Strong analytical ability to interpret metrics and optimize outreach performance.

Excellent English communication skills, written and verbal.

High organizational discipline and strong follow-through.

Demonstrated judgement, confidentiality, and professional ethics.

Behavioral Expectations:



Operates as a strategic and proactive contributor; consistently seeks opportunities to strengthen lead and referral pipelines.

Maintains disciplined follow-up and responsiveness. • Communicates with professionalism, clarity, and empathy

Collaborates effectively with intake, recruitment, and administrative teams.

Upholds values, service standards, and compliance expectations in all interactions

Minimum Technical and Work Environment Requirements:



Internet Connection:

Primary internet connection with a minimum speed of 15 Mbps.

Backup internet connection with at least 10 Mbps.

Backup connection must be capable of supporting work during a power outage.

Primary Device:

Desktop or laptop equipped with at least:

Intel Core i5 (8th generation or newer), Intel Core i3 (10th generation or newer), AMD Ryzen 5, or an equivalent processor.

A minimum of 8 GB RAM.

Backup Device:

Must meet or exceed the performance of an Intel Core i3 processor.

Must be functional during power interruptions.

A functioning webcam.

A noise-canceling USB headset.

A quiet, dedicated home office space.

Peripherals and Workspace: A smartphone for communication and verification purposes.

title: Senior Flutter + Android Developer (Mission-Critical Mobile Platforms)
description:
To get shortlisted, Apply here : 



Important Note: Apply only if you have a minimum of 5 years of experience and are an immediate joiner or can join within 1 week. Applications not meeting these criteria will be automatically rejected.





Role Overview



We are looking for a Senior Flutter Engineer who also knows android to design, build, and maintain high-availability mobile applications used in mission-critical environments such as airports, malls, and enterprise service platforms.



The applications operate 24x7 with real-time communication capabilities, including video calls, live messaging, and streaming services. The engineer will be responsible for ensuring stability, performance, and resilience under unstable network conditions and high-availability environments.



This role requires strong expertise in Flutter, native Android development, real-time communication technologies, and production-scale mobile architecture.





Key Responsibilities





Mobile Architecture & Development



Design and develop scalable Flutter-based mobile applications for enterprise deployments.



Build robust UI systems using Flutter with clean architecture and maintainable state management.



Implement advanced Flutter features, including:

• Custom widget development

• Complex UI animations

• Performance tuning and memory optimisation



Ensure applications meet enterprise-grade reliability and uptime requirements.



Maintain apps published on Google Play Store and Apple App Store.





Real-Time Communication & Streaming



Develop and maintain video and voice communication capabilities using:



Amazon Chime SDK (preferred)

• WebRTC-based communication systems

Handle real-time streaming concerns, including:



Adaptive bitrate management

• Network fluctuation handling

• Call reconnect and recovery logic

• Call state management

Ensure reliable performance during network drops, latency spikes, and packet loss.





Native Android Integration



Implement native modules when required using Kotlin or Java.



Strong understanding of:



Android SDK lifecycle

• Background services & foreground services

• Camera & microphone handling

• Android permission management

• Native crash debugging

Ensure correct implementation of video, audio, and hardware integrations.





Networking & Backend Integration



Implement and maintain communication with backend systems via:



REST APIs

• WebSocket connections

• Token-based authentication systems

Ensure secure and efficient data exchange with backend platforms.



Reliability & Production Operations



Design applications for 24x7 uptime environments.



Implement:



Network recovery strategies

• State persistence

• Crash monitoring and recovery

• Background execution strategies

Participate in production monitoring and i
 resolution for deployed applications.





Required Skills



Flutter Development

• 5+ years of Flutter development experience

• Strong experience with state management (Bloc / Riverpod / Provider)

• Experience building production apps released on App Store / Play Store

• Performance optimization and profiling





Android Development

title: Personal Credit Repair Specialist (Advanced – US Credit Expert Only)
description:
About the Role



We are hiring an experienced U.S. Credit Repair Specialist to actively manage and optimize two personal credit profiles.



This is NOT a beginner role. We are looking for someone who already understands real credit repair strategy — not just sending template disputes.



Your goal is to help move already-good credit into the excellent tier (740–800+) through intelligent optimization, dispute strategy, and credit structure planning.



?



Current Situation



You will work with two established credit files:



Profile A

 • FICO ~700

 • Strong accounts with some historical late payments

 • No collections

 • Needs optimization + targeted dispute strategy



Profile B

 • FICO ~688–730 range

 • Mostly positive history

 • Minor negative marks

 • Goal: reach top-tier credit



This is optimization and precision work — not basic repair.



?



Your Responsibilities



You will:

 • Perform full credit analysis (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)

 • Identify legally disputable items

 • Draft custom dispute and goodwill letters

 • Manage bureau disputes and follow-ups

 • Track dispute cycles and results

 • Recommend utilization and payment timing strategies

 • Advise on account positioning (AU accounts, balances, limits)

 • Create monthly progress reports

 • Recommend next-step credit actions



?



Required Experience (Must Have)



? 2+ years working with U.S.-based credit repair clients

? Deep understanding of:

 • FICO scoring factors

 • Late payment removal strategies

 • Goodwill adjustment requests

 • Credit utilization optimization

 • Authorized user strategy

 • Credit bureau dispute workflows

 • Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) basics



? Excellent written English

? Extremely detail oriented



?



DO NOT APPLY IF



? You only send template dispute letters

? You have no real U.S. credit experience

? You rely only on automated software without analysis

? You are an agency



?



Preferred (Big Bonus)

 • Credit Repair Cloud experience

 • Knowledge of Metro 2 reporting

 • Experience raising scores from 650–720 ? 780+

 • Financial or lending background



?



Work Details

 • Remote (Philippines preferred)

 • 5–10 hours per week initially

 • Long-term role if results are strong

 • Flexible hours

 • Direct communication with owner



?



Compensation

 • Hourly or fixed monthly (based on experience)

 • Performance bonuses possible for measurable score improvements



?



Application Instructions



To apply, include:

 1. Your experience with U.S. credit repair

 2. Example credit score improvements you achieved

 3. Your dispute process (brief explanation)

 4. Tools/software you use

 5. Your hourly rate

 6. Start your message with the word “OPTIMIZE”



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.



?



? Hiring Goal



We want a long-term specialist who can become our go-to credit advisor as we expand into business credit and lending preparation.

title: Personal Assistant VA
description:
We are seeking an outstanding Personal Assistant to collaborate directly with our CEO on driving strategic business growth initiatives.



What Sets This Role Apart:

This isn’t your typical administrative role. You will take high-level business ideas from the CEO and transform them into actionable projects. Think of it as being a strategic partner, turning vision into reality.



Key Responsibilities:

You will independently execute business projects based on CEO directives, which include:

-Leading media outreach campaigns to enhance brand visibility.

-Developing partnerships with complementary agencies.

-Implementing platform strategies on channels like Quora, Reddit, and others.

-Conducting market research and competitive analysis.

-Driving business development efforts.



How You'll Work:

The process is clear, but requires initiative:

-The CEO provides brief direction (usually a 2-4 minute voice note).

-You research the opportunity and create strategic options.

-Present your recommendations and receive quick feedback.

-Execute the approved strategy independently.

-Track progress and report regularly on results.



Real Examples of Projects:

Media Outreach Project:

-Direction: "Get our podcast featured organically in Filipino media."

-Your role: Research relevant outlets, develop an outreach strategy, execute the campaign, track media coverage.



Partnership Development:

-Direction: "Identify 10-15 agencies for potential collaboration."

-Your role: Research agencies, find decision-makers, develop partnership proposals, coordinate meetings.



Platform Strategy:

-Direction: "Establish a presence on Quora and Reddit to build brand awareness."

-Your role: Analyze competitor activity, develop content strategies, implement, and optimize.



What We're Looking For:

Strategic Thinker & Quick Learner:

-Quickly absorbs new concepts and understands business contexts.

-Grasps the “why” behind initiatives.

-Comfortable using AI tools and new technologies.



Self-Starter & Problem Solver:

-Takes initiative without needing detailed instructions.

-Proposes solutions, not just identifying problems.

-Thrives in ambiguous situations.



Excellent Communicator:

-Near-native proficiency in written and spoken English.

-Can write professional business communications.

-Comfortable representing the CEO in external interactions.



Effective Executor:

-Completes projects you begin.

-Manages multiple priorities at once.

-Values timely execution over perfection.

-Prioritizes tasks based on business impact.



Bonus Points for:

-Experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.).

-Background in marketing or business development.

-Previous experience supporting entrepreneurs or executives.



Why This Role Matters:

You will directly influence business growth by turning ideas into actionable initiatives. Your work will create tangible 
ntum and measurable outcomes.



Why You'll Love Working Here:

-Collaborate directly with the CEO on high-impact initiatives.

-Significant autonomy and decision-making power.

-A dynamic, entrepreneurial environment where your contributions make a visible impact.

-Opportunity to develop a broad set of strategic and execution skills.



Are you ready to move beyond traditional assistant work and drive real business growth? Apply now and help us scale our impact!

title: Remote Podcast & Social Media Content Assistant
description:
Part-time | 20 hours per week (remote)

Compensation: $7/hour depending on experience

Start Date: Within 2–3 weeks (paid trial required)



THE OPPORTUNITY

We are seeking a highly organized Podcast & Social Media Content Assistant to support the production, distribution, and management of digital content for a YouTube-based podcast.



This role focuses on ensuring episodes, clips, and social media content are consistently published across multiple platforms including YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and podcast audio platforms.



You will also assist with managing social media posting, engagement, and overall content organization across these channels.



The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, comfortable working with content scheduling tools, and able to manage multiple publishing tasks each week while maintaining quality and consistency.



WHAT YOU’LL BE SUPPORTING

Our podcast produces long-form episodes that are repurposed into short-form clips and distributed across multiple social platforms.



Your role will help ensure episodes, clips, captions, thumbnails, and uploads are organized and scheduled correctly so content goes live consistently.



You will also assist with maintaining our broader social media presence by helping manage posts, captions, and content scheduling across platforms.



THE ROLE

Core Responsibilities

• Upload and schedule full podcast episodes to YouTube

• Upload short clips to Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

• Write or format captions, descriptions, and hashtags

• Schedule posts using social scheduling tools

• Assist with creating or formatting YouTube thumbnails in Canva

• Organize episode assets including video files, thumbnails, and captions

• Maintain a weekly content calendar

• Coordinate guest scheduling and confirmations

• Ensure content is published on time each week



Social Media Responsibilities



• Assist with managing social media accounts (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube)

• Schedule and organize non-podcast content such as posts, graphics, or announcements

• Monitor comments and messages and flag items that require response

• Help track content performance and identify clips that perform well

• Maintain a structured content calendar across platforms



Additional Responsibilities May Include



• Light video editing for short clips

• Formatting show notes and episode descriptions

• Uploading audio versions to podcast platforms

• Organizing files in Google Drive or Dropbox

• Monitoring posting status and flagging issues quickly



TOOLS YOU MAY USE

• YouTube Studio

• Instagram and TikTok publishing tools

• Planable or similar scheduling platforms

• Canva

• Google Drive or Dropbox



Editing tools such as CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or Descript may also be used.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Experience scheduling and publishing content on social platforms

• Familiarity with YouTube Studio and short-form content posting

• Comfortable using Canva for thumbnails or simple graphics

• Strong written English for captions and descriptions

• Organized and able to manage deadlines

• Reliable internet connection and ability to communicate regularly



NICE TO HAVE

• Experience working with podcasts or YouTube channels

• Understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, tags, descriptions)

• Experience repurposing long-form content into short clips

• Familiarity with podcast hosting platforms such as Spotify for Podcasters, Buzzsprout, or Libsyn



EXAMPLE WEEKLY DELIVERABLES

Typical weekly workflow includes:



• Upload and schedule 1 full YouTube episode

• Prepare and schedule 3–8 short clips and additional social media posts across Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

• Ensure captions, hashtags, and thumbnails are ready before publishing time

• Coordinate guest scheduling and maintain the podcast calendar



HOW TO APPLY



If the above piques you interest, then let’s get the ball rolling. Submit the following to 

Please submit:

1. Resume

2. Links to social media accounts, YouTube channels, or content you have managed

3. One YouTube thumbnail you have designed

4. One short-form video clip you edited (YouTube Shorts / IG Reels / TikTok)

5. One caption example you would write for a podcast clip



Please use the subject line: Podcast VA



Only qualified candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: Job Title: Full-Stack Developer (Next.js / Docker / AI SaaS) — Full-Time Remote
description:
About the Work

You'll be building real products used by engineers in industrial automation and pharmaceutical manufacturing. Two active platforms:



PLCcode.ai — an AI-powered IDE for PLC programmers. Think GitHub Copilot, but built specifically for controls engineers. 1,500+ engineers on the waitlist.


 — a commissioning and CQV workflow platform for the AEC/pharma industry.



This is not a "maintain the WordPress site" job. You'll be writing real code, shipping real features, and working directly with the founder on product decisions.



What You'll Work On



Building and iterating on Next.js frontends across both platforms

Backend API development and integration (REST, webhooks, third-party APIs)

Docker-based deployments and containerized environments

Integrating AI/LLM APIs (Anthropic Claude, OpenAI)

Database work (PostgreSQL preferred)

Cloudflare Workers, Pages, and edge deployments

Code reviews, documentation, and async collaboration via GitHub





Required Skills



Next.js (App Router) — you should be comfortable with this, not learning it on my dime

Docker and Docker Compose

REST API design and consumption

Git / GitHub — PRs, branches, clean commits

Strong written English for async communication



Nice to Have



Experience with AI/LLM API integration

Cloudflare ecosystem (Workers, Tunnels, Pages)

PostgreSQL / Supabase

Tailwind CSS

Familiarity with industrial automation, pharma, or engineering software (not required — but if you know what a PLC is, mention it)





About You



You take ownership. If something is broken, you fix it or flag it — you don't wait to be told.

You communicate proactively. Short daily update, flag blockers early.

You're comfortable working with ambiguity on an early-stage product.

You've shipped things. Show me your GitHub and deployed projects — a resume alone won't tell me much.





Logistics



Full-time, 50–60 hours per week — this is a high-output role

100% remote, async-friendly

Overlap with US Eastern Time preferred (a few hours per day)

Long-term engagement — I'm not looking for a one-project hire

In return: real ownership over the product, direct access to the founder, and stable long-term employment





To Apply

Link to your GitHub profile and anything you've deployed

Your experience with Next.js and Docker — be specific

One paragraph on what interests you about PLCcode.ai or SyncCx

Your expected monthly rate in USD - Commensurate with experience — include your expected rate in your application

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Real Estate Video Editor
description:
This is a part time position to start - with the potential for full time fairly quickly. Please do not apply if you do not have experience in MotionVFX! We need someone who can edit in a high level right away. 



What You’ll Do:



-Edit cinematic real estate videos using Final Cut Pro

-Use MotionVFX, Ryan Nangle, and Studio 910-style plugins/effects for modern, trendy visuals 

-Incorporate transitions, motion text, 3D titles, and music in sync with story flow

-Work closely with our internal team via Slack for communication and creative direction

-Share Final Cut Pro timelines (.fcpbundle / XML) for collaborative editing

-Follow our visual standards for brand consistency and quality



We are looking for a long term team player who can grow with our team. We need someone who has a passion for editing as well as being creative and helping create new trendy content for our agents.

title: LinkedIn Outreach & Lead Generation Specialist (B2B – Construction Industry)
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented LinkedIn Outreach Specialist to help connect with business owners in the construction industry and introduce them to our professional training workshops.



This role focuses on targeted outreach and relationship building, not spam or mass messaging.



You will help identify construction company owners on LinkedIn, send personalized connection requests, follow up with conversations, and direct interested prospects to our workshop registration page.



Our audience is established contractors doing $1M–$10M in annual revenue, so professionalism and clear communication are very important.



About Our Company



We provide business education and training programs for construction company owners across the United States.



Our workshops help contractors improve their estimating, financial systems, and profitability.



We work with experienced business owners and professionals, so our outreach must feel authentic, respectful, and professional.



Responsibilities



• Research and identify construction company owners on LinkedIn

• Send targeted connection requests to qualified prospects

• Send follow-up messages after connections are accepted

• Engage in simple conversations to identify interest

• Share workshop information with interested prospects

• Track conversations and leads in a spreadsheet or CRM

• Maintain a daily outreach goal



Daily Targets



Typical outreach activity:



• 40–60 connection requests per day

• Follow-up messages to existing connections

• Track responses and interested prospects



Requirements



• Experience with LinkedIn lead generation or outreach

• Strong written English and professional communication

• Ability to follow messaging scripts while sounding natural

• Organized and detail oriented

• Comfortable using spreadsheets to track leads

• Reliable internet connection



Bonus experience:



• B2B lead generation

• Appointment setting

• Experience with the construction industry



To Apply



Please include the word CONTRACTOR in the first line of your application so we know you read the full post.



Also include:



• A brief description of your LinkedIn outreach experience

• How many connection requests per day you typically send

• Any tools or systems you have used



Important



This role is for manual, targeted outreach.



We are not interested in automated spa
ssaging.



Quality conversations are more important than volume.

About Us:

At MarketU, we believe creativity has the power to move people. We are more than an agency—we are a team of storytellers, strategists, and creators. From bold ideas to polished visuals, we transform concepts into experiences that inspire.
