title: Real Estate Video Editor
description:
We are looking for a full-time real estate video editor to work with our team based in the United States.



The ideal candidate is proficient in Final Cut Pro, experienced with color grading, and comfortable creating high-end, trendy captions and effects using MotionVFX. If needed, we can provide access to MotionVFX.



Our projects range from fast-paced social media reels to slower cinematic listing videos, so you should be comfortable working in both styles.



You would be working closely with our team in Slack and would serve as our lead editor, with strong potential for growth as our company continues to expand.



A few things to be clear about:



If you are easily offended by feedback or revisions, this is not the position for you. Revisions are part of delivering a great final product for our clients and sometimes they can get picky. We don't want someone who is going to take it personal, it's just business and great customer service is what keeps us busy. If you are juggling dozens of clients and cannot give our projects proper attention, this position is also not a good fit.



Our priority is delivering videos our clients love, and we move quickly to make that happen.



That said, we’re a fun, tight-knit team with a dry sense of humor. We keep things light, but we take our work and our business seriously, and we expect the same from you.



If this sounds like the kind of team you want to grow with, we’d love to hear from you. We will also have opportunities to edit other types of media for businesses and events if interested. We work Monday-Friday and are on the East Coast in the US.



Thanks for your time.

title: Virtual Assistant - Document / Data Focused
description:
We are looking for a meticulous and proactive Virtual Assistant to support a consulting practice. This role is best suited for someone who thrives in detail-driven environments, enjoys working extensively with documentation, and can confidently manage structured, form-based submissions.



A substantial portion of this position involves preparing, reviewing, and organizing official paperwork. Candidates with experience drafting, reviewing, or assembling government forms, regulatory filings, or compliance-related documents will be especially well positioned to succeed. The ideal applicant is process-oriented, highly accurate, and comfortable juggling multiple deadlines at once.



Core Responsibilities



- Prepare, review, and maintain a high volume of structured documents, applications, and form-based submissions.

- Track active matters, manage timelines, and proactively follow up on pending items.

- Compile and organize supporting documentation required for regulatory or compliance submissions.

- Maintain accurate internal logs, databases, and project trackers.

- Develop and refine internal workflows, checklists, and procedural guides.

- Conduct focused research on regulatory requirements, licensing procedures, and industry updates.

- Provide administrative and operational support to ensure projects move forward efficiently.



Qualifications



- Previous experience as a Virtual Assistant, Legal Assistant, Administrative Assistant, or in a comparable support role.

- Direct experience drafting, reviewing, or preparing government forms, regulatory filings, or other structured documentation.

- Exceptional attention to detail and strong written communication skills.

- Demonstrated ability to manage multiple assignments while meeting strict deadlines.

- Proficiency in Microsoft Office (including Excel), Google Workspace, and common remote collaboration platforms.

- Self-motivated, resourceful, and capable of working independently with minimal supervision.



Schedule



This is a part-time role. Hours will fluctuate based on project demands but will generally range from 15–20 hours per week. Please apply only if you are seeking part-time work and are available to work during U.S. business hours.



To be considered, please submit:



- Your resume

- A brief cover letter describing your relevant experience (especially any experience drafting or reviewing government forms)

- A short video introduction

- A sample of your work demonstrating drafting or document management skills

- To confirm that you have carefully reviewed this job posting, please include the word Epic in the heading of your message.



Please use at least 5 apply points.

title: IT Delivery and Program Coordinator
Pinterest Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY



If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here:




/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagIckNnVuKAYhim2/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We’re hiring a Pinterest Manager to take full ownership of our Pinterest presence and turn it into a high-performing sales channel.



This role owns both organic Pinterest growth and Pinterest Ads performance, with a strong focus on turning Pinterest into a scalable paid acquisition channel.



This is not a generic social media role—we’re looking for someone who deeply understands how the Pinterest platform works, from its search algorithm and Smart Feed to pin formats, trends, and conversion paths. Your goal: drive meaningful traffic and sales from Pinterest through smart, strategic execution.



Mission Statement: Build and scale a Pinterest strategy that doesn’t just look good—but performs. You will grow impressions, increase outbound clicks, and **drive profitable revenue through both organic content and paid Pinterest campaigns.



Primary Responsibilities





Pinterest Organic Strategy & Execution



- Develop and execute a Pinterest-specific strategy rooted in platform best practices and SEO.

- Stay on top of Pinterest’s evolving algorithm, features (e.g., Idea Pins, video), and trends to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Use keyword research and SEO to craft high-converting titles, descriptions, and hashtags.

- Align Pinterest strategy with seasonal campaigns, product launches, and key retail 
nts.

- Build and maintain a structured Pinterest keyword library to support ongoing SEO efforts.

- Leverage Pinterest keyword insights to inform both organic content and paid targeting.



Pinterest Ads Strategy & Execution



- Plan, launch, and manage Pinterest ad campaigns to drive traffic, conversions, and revenue.

- Develop a full-funnel Pinterest strategy that integrates organic content and paid amplification.

- Own campaign structure across prospecting, retargeting, and catalog sales campaigns.

- Manage budgets, bids, and pacing to hit performance targets.

- Continuously test audiences, creatives, and campaign types to improve efficiency.

- Partner with the eCommerce and analytics teams to ensure proper tracking and attribution.

- Scale winning campaigns while maintaining target CPA/ROAS goals.



Content Creation & Scheduling



- Design and publish optimized pins (static, video, Idea Pins) that speak to our target customer and drive clicks.

- Build and maintain organized boards with strategic themes and branding.

- Manage publishing cadence based on performance data and best practices through Tailwind, Pinterest Scheduler, or similar tools.

- Ensure all pins are visually on-brand and aligned with HiEnd Accents’ positioning.



Performance Analytics & Optimization



- Track and report on KPIs weekly/monthly: outbound clicks, saves, conversions, CTR.

- Run A/B tests on creative, formats, and timing to improve pin performance.

- Continuously refine strategy based on what the algorithm favors and what drives the best ROI.

- Monitor and optimize for downstrea
trics such as assisted conversions and revenue contribution where available.

- Monitor competitor activity and emerging Pinterest trends within the home and interior space.



Cross-Functional Coordination



- Collaborate with our marketing, design, and eCommerce teams to align Pinterest with overall brand goals.

- Repurpose and adapt content for Pinterest from broader campaigns and launches.

- Identify and surface high-potential UGC or inspiration imagery for Pinterest use.



Requirements



- Have 2+ years of hands-on Pinterest Ads and organic Pinterest experience** for a brand or eCommerce business.

- Demonstrated experience managing Pinterest Ads Manager, including campaign structure, audience targeting, and bid optimization.

- Comfortable working with performance data, dashboards, and attribution reporting.

- Passion for interior design, home décor, or lifestyle brands preferred.

- Experience working with luxury, premium, or design-driven brands is a strong plus.

- Must be able to collaborate during overlapping US business hours as needed.

- Understand how Pinterest works as a visual search engine, not just a social platform.

- Have a strong portfolio or case studies that show you’ve driven real traffic and sales from Pinterest**.

- Are skilled with Pinterest SEO, keyword research, and algorithm-based strategies.

- Know your way around Tailwind, Canva, Photoshop, and Pinterest Analytics.

- Are detail-oriented, self-directed, and results-focused.

- Bonus: experience with affiliate marketing, *
 capture from Pinterest, or using Pinterest for DTC sales.

- Please include links to Pinterest accounts, boards, or case studies you have directly managed.



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at [
](
).



Want to get to know us better and learn what it’s like to be part of our growing team in the Philippines? Learn more here: 
/hea-ph-team



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay



Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to continuously learn, grow, and develop their careers



Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

title: Video Editor & Animator
description:
About Cleo+Coco

Cleo+Coco is next-level clean with high-performance deodorants and functional personal care — from deodorant balms, powders, and sprays. We're building a social media presence to sit alongside brands like Salt & Stone and Nimbi, which means we hold ourselves to a high creative standard. Our content must be polished, interesting, and native to the platforms where it lives.



The Role

We're looking for a skilled Video Editor and Animator — ideally someone who does both — to produce high-quality social content for Instagram and TikTok. You'll be working with raw footage, UGC, and brand assets to create edited videos and animated graphics that are visually sharp, on-trend, and true to the Cleo+Coco aesthetic. This could be one person or two complementary freelancers depending on skillsets.



What You'll Create

• Edited short-form videos for TikTok and Instagram Reels — transforming raw footage and UGC into polished, engaging content

• Motion graphics, animated text overlays, and branded transitions that elevate our visual identity

• Product-focused animations and explainer content that communicate benefits clearly and beautifully

• Story and feed graphics that are consistent with our visual brand language

• Thumbnail and cover image assets optimised for TikTok and Instagram

• Ad creatives and paid social video assets when required

• Iterating quickly on content based on performance feedback



What We're Looking For

• Strong portfolio demonstrating high-quality video editing and motion graphics — ideally for consumer brands in beauty, wellness, or lifestyle

• Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or Final Cut Pro for video editing

• Proficiency in Adobe After Effects (or equivalent) for motion graphics and animation

• Strong eye for aesthetics: colour, typography, pacing, and composition — you know what premium content looks like

• Understanding of content formats native to TikTok and Instagram — aspect ratios, attention patterns, caption placement, sound

• Ability to work efficiently with quick turnaround times while maintaining quality

• Experience creating content for natural beauty, wellness, or personal care brands is a strong advantage

• Comfortable receiving creative direction via briefs and reference materials

• Familiarity with Canva and Figma is a bonus

• Experience using AI tools to enhance creative production is a plus



Note on Splitting the Role

We are open to this being two separate roles — one focused on video editing and one on animation and motion graphics. If you specialise in one area, please apply and indicate which. We may bring on both.



How to Apply

Please include in your application:

• A link to your portfolio or showreel — social content examples strongly preferred

• Examples of animation or motion graphics work

• Software and tools you work with

• Your availability, turnaround capacity, and rate

title: Business Development Assistant (BDA)
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Business Development Assistant (BDA) to support our leadership and business development team. This role plays a key part in helping maintain accurate prospect data, manage outreach systems, and keep sales operations running efficiently.



In this position, you will support three team leaders:

• The Business Development Executive (BDE)

• The CEO

• The VP of IT, who oversees the staffing and technical delivery side of the business



The largest portion of this role focuses on list management and data preparation for outbound business development efforts. 

Accuracy, organization, and attention to detail are critical to success in this position.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys research, data accuracy, CRM organization, and supporting sales teams behind the scenes.



Key Responsibilities

*Lead List Building & Data Research

A large portion of your work will involve building and maintaining high-quality prospect lists.

• Creating targeted prospect lists in Apollo based on defined search criteria

• Verifying and enriching contact data including:

Phone numbers

Mobile numbers

 addresses

• Cleaning and validating contact information to ensure outreach accuracy

• Preparing multiple prospect lists each week

• Ensuring lists are ready for immediate outreach by our Business Development Executive



Sales System & Outreach List Management



Once lists are prepared, you will organize them across our outreach platforms.



This includes:

• Uploading and organizing contacts in Apollo

• Adding leads to SmartLead for cold
 campaigns

• Uploading and organizing contacts into LinkedIn Sales Navigator

• Ensuring data consistency across all systems



This list handling and system preparation will represent the largest volume of work in this role.



CRM & Meeting Documentation



You will help keep our CRM system organized and up to date.



Tasks include:

• Downloading meeting transcripts from Otter

• Adding transcripts and notes to the correct records in HubSpot

• Ensuring meetings and conversations are properly documented



Data Cleanup & Lead Replacement



Maintaining clean and accurate prospect data is critical.



Each day you may:

• Review incorrect contact information identified during sales calls

• Research and find replacement contacts

• Update records in Apollo and HubSpot

• Identify bounced
s in SmartLead

• Locate replacement contacts and add them back into campaigns



Reporting & Communication



You will stay closely connected with the team throughout the day.



Responsibilities include:

• Daily communication through Microsoft Teams

• Reporting on list preparation and campaign activity

• Supporting additional research or operational projects as needed



Tools You Will Use



You will work with several business development and CRM tools, including:

Apollo

HubSpot CRM

SmartLead

LinkedIn Sales Navigator

Microsoft Teams

Otter (meeting transcripts)

Google Docs / Spreadsheets



Experience with these tools is helpful, but not required if you are a fast learner.



Requirements



We are looking for someone who is:

• Extremely detail oriented

• Strong at internet research

• Organized and process driven

• Comfortable working with CRM systems

• Strong written English communication skills

• Reliable and able to meet deadlines

• Comfortable working with repetitive but important tasks involving data accuracy



Preferred experience:

• Lead generation or prospect research

• CRM management

• Data enrichment

• Sales operations support



Work Schedule

• 40 hours per week

• Remote position

• Some overlap with U.S. business hours may be required



Compensation

• $6 – $7 USD per hour

• Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

• Potential growth into more advanced sales operations or business development roles



Application Instructions (Important)



Because this role requires attention to detail, we have a short screening step.



Many applicants apply to dozens of jobs without reading the description. We only review applications from candidates who follow the instructions below.



Please complete the following three steps when submitting your application.



Step 1 – Attention to Detail Check

At the very top of your application message, write the phrase:

BDA DATA PRO

Applications without this phrase will not be reviewed.



Step 2 – Research Task

Please answer the following question:



If you were asked to build a list of CEOs of IT companies in Texas with 50–200 employees, what steps would you take in Apollo to find them?



You do not need to be perfect. We want to see how you think and explain your process.



Step 3 – Short Response

In 2–3 sentences, tell us:



Why are you a good fit for a role that involves research, list building, and data accuracy?



Important



Applications that:

• Do not follow instructions

• Contain generic AI responses

• Do not complete the screening steps

will not be considered.



We are looking for someone who enjoys organized work, clean data, and supporting a fast-moving team.



If that sounds like you, we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO (Part-Time ? Full-Time Opportunity)
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and reliable Executive Assistant to support the CEO of a growing technology consulting company.



This role will begin part-time and has the opportunity to grow into full-time as the business continues to expand.



The CEO manages many responsibilities including business development, travel, board positions, philanthropic initiatives, and leadership responsibilities across the organization.



The purpose of this role is simple:

Help the CEO stay organized, prepared, and focused on the highest-value work.



The right candidate will not require constant supervision. Instead, they will be someone who shows up consistently, communicates clearly, solves problems independently, and takes ownership of their responsibilities.



This is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys organization, supporting leadership, and helping complex schedules and projects run smoothly.



Key Responsibilities



Task & Project Organization



All work will be tracked using ClickUp, our task management system.



Responsibilities include:

• Receiving assignments from the CEO via
 or internal communication

• Creating and organizing tasks inside ClickUp

• Tracking progress and ensuring tasks are completed on time

• Maintaining organized workflows so nothing important is missed



The goal is to ensure key priorities are always tracked and executed properly.



Calendar & Scheduling Management

• Manage the CEO’s calendar and meeting schedule

• Coordinate internal and external meetings

• Send meeting invitations and reminders

• Ensure meetings are properly prepared and organized



Research & Business Development Support



The CEO frequently meets with prospective clients and partners.



Responsibilities include:

• Researching companies and individuals prior to meetings

• Preparing short summaries of prospects before calls

• Gathering background information that helps the CEO prepare



Proposal & Presentation Support



You will assist with preparing materials for meetings and business development efforts.



This may include:

• Creating or formatting client proposals

• Preparing presentation decks

• Organizing information into professional documents



Meeting Documentation & Follow-Up

• Download meeting transcripts from Otter

• Organize notes and summaries fro
etings

• Add transcripts and notes to systems such as HubSpot



Executive & Administrative Support



The CEO is involved in multiple initiatives including business operations, board responsibilities, and philanthropic work.



Support may include:

• Coordinating travel arrangements

• Organizing documents and files

• Preparing materials for board meetings or engagements

• Helping manage follow-ups after meetings



This is a dynamic role where tasks may vary from day to day.



Oversight & Team Structure



This role will work directly with the CEO, with operational oversight from the Chief Marketing Officer (CMO) to ensure priorities and processes are executed properly.



Tools You May Use



You will work with several business tools including:

ClickUp

Microsoft Teams

HubSpot

Otter (meeting transcripts)

Google Docs / Google Sheets

Presentation tools (PowerPoint or Google Slides)



Experience with these tools is helpful but not required if you are a fast learner.



Requirements



We are looking for someone who is:

• Highly organized and detail oriented

• Extremely reliable and consistent

• Comfortable working independently

• Strong in written English communication

• Able to prioritize multiple responsibilities

• Able to solve problems and find answers without constant direction



Preferred experience:

• Executive Assistant or Administrative Assistant roles

• CRM systems or project management tools

• Preparing presentations, documents, or proposals



Work Schedule

• Starting part-time

• Opportunity to grow into full-time

• Remote position

• Some overlap with U.S. business hours may be required



Compensation

• $6 – $8 USD per hour depending on experience

• Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

• Opportunity to grow into a larger operational role as the company grows



Application Instructions (Important)



This role requires attention to detail, reliability, and independence.



Please follow the instructions below carefully when applying.



Step 1 – Attention Check

At the very beginning of your application message, write the phrase:

EXECUTIVE SUPPORT READY

Applications without this phrase may not be reviewed.



Step 2 – Reliability Question

This role requires someone who shows up consistently and meets commitments.

In 3–4 sentences, please answer:

How do you ensure you remain reliable and meet deadlines while working remotely?



Step 3 – Problem-Solving Question

Sometimes you may receive a task that you are unfamiliar with.

Please answer:

What steps would you take if you were assigned a task but were unsure how to complete it?



Step 4 – Organization Question

In 2–3 sentences, explain:

How would you keep track of multiple tasks assigned through
 and ClickUp so nothing gets missed?



Step 5 – Executive Support Experience

Please answer:

What is the most challenging executive or manager you have supported, and how did you make their work easier?

Important



Applications that:

• Do not follow instructions

• Contain generic responses

• Do not complete the screening questions

may not be considered.



We are looking for someone who enjoys helping leaders stay organized and making sure important work gets done.



If that sounds like you, we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Lil Blu Stays - Virtual Assistant (Short-Term Rental / Holiday Let Experience Essential)
description:
Lil Blu Stays is a luxury coastal holiday-let management company based in Poole and Sandbanks, Dorset, UK. We manage a hand-picked portfolio of high-end homes and we pride ourselves on a boutique, relationship-first approach to both guests and property owners.



We are looking for an experienced Virtual Assistant who has worked in a similar role for a short-term rental or holiday let company before. This is not an entry-level position. We will not be training someone from the ground up, and we ask that you only apply if you have genuine, hands-on experience managing holiday lets or serviced accommodation as a VA.



The Role



We're a growing business and we're looking for someone who brings real initiative to the table. When things are quieter, we don't want someone waiting to be told what to do. We want someone who will proactively look for ways to improve how we operate, identify gaps, write SOPs, reach out to guests, or suggest ideas that could push the business forward. If you need constant hand-holding, this role isn't for you. If you thrive on ownership and spotting opportunities, it probably is.



Day-to-day, the role will involve:



- Managing guest communications across all platforms with warmth and professionalism

- Coordinating cleaners, maintenance, and property turnovers

- Onboarding new properties onto Guesty and listing platforms

- Creating, managing, and optimising listings on Airbnb, 
, VRBO, and others

- Writing and maintaining SOPs as we grow and develop our processes

- Proactively upselling to guests (early check-in, late check-out, extensions, extras)

- Running marketing
s and supporting owner communications

- General admin and operations support



Requirements



- Previous VA experience working for a short-term rental, holiday let, or serviced accommodation company (essential - please do not apply without this)

- Strong working knowledge of Guesty (essential)

- Experience with Guesty's accounting module and/or bookkeeping is a major bonus

- Excellent written and spoken English - you will be messaging and speaking with guests and property owners directly

- Experience listing and managing properties on Airbnb, 
, VRBO, and similar platforms

- A self-starter mindset with the ability to manage your own workload and prioritise without being prompted

- Strong working knowledge of Notion (the more experience here, the better)

- Familiarity with tools such as PriceLabs, Google Drive, Mailchimp, Canva, Zapier, Stripe, SuiteOp, Signable, Igloo Smartlocks, and Minut is a bonus

- Reliable power and internet connection. Backup systems such as a generator, UPS battery, or mobile data failover are preferable and worth mentioning in your application, but are not a barrier to applying



Hours



Wednesday & Thursday: 2:00pm - 10:00pm UK time

Friday, Saturday & Sunday: 10:00am - 6:00pm UK time



Monday and Tuesday off. We're a growing business and hours may flex and evolve as we find what works best, so we're looking for someone who is comfortable with a degree of adaptability.



Please confirm in your application that you are comfortable working these hours on an ongoing basis.



Salary

?45,000 - ?55,000/month depending on experience. We are open to paying above this range for a candidate with exceptional skills and experience.



How to Apply



Please use the subject line "Lil Blu VA Application" and include:



- A brief intro and a summary of your STR/holiday let VA experience

- Your experience with Guesty, and specifically whether you have used the accounting module

- Your experience with Notion

- A confidence rating (1-10) for each tool listed above

- An example of how you improved guest satisfaction or operational efficiency in a previous role

- Confirmation that you are happy working the hours listed above

- At least one reference from a previous STR or holiday let employer

- A short video (2-3 minutes) introducing yourself, walking us through your relevant experience, and giving us a feel for who you are. This is required, not optional - it helps us understand your communication style and English fluency, both of which matter a great deal in this role



The more of the above you can tick off, the more likely we are to get back to you quickly. Shortlisted candidates may be invited to a paid trial shift before any offer is made.



Please note: Applications must be submitted through OnlineJobs.ph only. Do not contact us via WhatsApp, LinkedIn, or any other platform. Applications received outside of OnlineJobs.ph will not be considered.

title: Order Management Specialist
description:
TO APPLY

If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here:


/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagZk1jvydfqYXGy9/form



Applications submitted through onlinejobs.ph will not be reviewed. We look forward to reviewing your application.



TO BE RESPECTFUL OF YOUR TIME, PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT MEET THE JOB REQUIREMENTS. We evaluate against these requirements strictly. If you do not have the requisite experience, please do not apply.



JOB DESCRIPTION



We are looking for an energetic and detail-oriented individual with extensive experience managing customer order flow to join our growing team. As an Order Management Specialist, you will be responsible for processing customer orders and coordinating fulfillment logistics. The ultimate goal is to ensure that customer orders are processed efficiently, accurately and on-time.



As an Order Management Specialist, you will work as a member of our company’s Operations team. To be successful at the role, the ideal candidate must have strong customer service, communication and interpersonal skills. You will work closely with our internal team and our customers (via
 and phone) to fulfill their orders. You can expect to learn a lot about how our business functions, be professionally challenged and have plenty of opportunities for career development!



We are looking for long-term tea
mbers who will stay and grow at our company! Please apply if you have full-time availability and can commit to a long-term, mutually beneficial role.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

- Bring in customer orders daily from various sources, including customer portals, EDI,
s and faxes

- Respond to incoming
s and phone calls with same-day service

- Confirm purchase order changes and make changes to orders in our ERP system

- Maintain accurate documentation of all actions/conversations/issues (through Front and Airtable)

- Release orders/backorders for shipping in a timely fashion

- Organize order releasing for easy picking and communicate with our Warehouse team for shipment alignment

- Create delivery slips and invoice shipped orders

- Upload/enter shipping and invoicing information to customer portals

- Create, send inventory, shipping and invoicing EDI documents

- Handle payment issues, solve order-related problems and interact with account managers as needed

- Interact with customers and provide them with information on order-related questions (such as inventory availability) and product inquiries

- Understand and ensure departmental KPIs, objectives, and guidelines are followed

- Ensure customer SLAs are followed

- Work on other duties as assigned



WHO YOU ARE

- A Bachelor's Degree

- 1-3 years experience with order management, data entry and customer service

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills; additionally, strong interpersonal skills, particularly in a customer-facing capacity

- EDI experience

- Excellent attention to detail

- Strong organizational skills; self-motivated and proactive

- MS Excel ability

- Excellent English skills

- Ability to work with our US team via
, Slack and Zoom. Highly preferred, but not required: experience with Airtable and Notion

- Positive, kind and easy to work with

- A team player mentality - one team, one dream!

- Positive and kind

- A desire to learn and grow within our organization

- Willingness to learn and adopt new tools

- Reliable and detailed-oriented

- Stable, trustworthy highly dependable. Ideally someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



HOURS

Fixed Schedule, M-F, US Central Time



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS

HiEnd Accents creates designer bedding and home decor. Founded by a husband-wife team in 2005, we remain a family business today. Our customers love our unique designs across a wide range of styles, everyday luxury pricing and commitment to excellent service. We sell on both a wholesale as well as retail basis and are based in Irving, TX.



WHY HIEND ACCENTS?

Our small size and fast-paced culture reward people who act and think like owners. If you're someone who has a growth mentality, strives for exceptionalism, are a committed professional and a straight shooter, you’ll fit in with our culture and go far with our company.



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:

- Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

- Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to continuously learn, grow and develop their careers

- Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented and committed as you are

title: Social Media Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagHKo8CnRtRpX585/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We are looking for an experienced, passionate, and creative Social Media Manager to join our team! As our Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for implementing our Social Media strategy in order to increase our online presence and strengthen our relationship with our customers and fans. You will be working closely with our Senior Social Media Manager and the remainder of our Marketing department. The platforms that you’ll primarily work on and be responsible for are (1) Instagram, (2)
, and (3) Pinterest. As our Social Media Manager, you will have a meaningful impact on our growth, bottom line, and brand identity in an exciting, design-driven company where being creative is just as important as being analytical.



The ideal candidate excels in building relationships, is passionate about social media and interior design, is a strong writer with a keen visual eye, and thrives on performance-driven teams.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will stay and grow at our company. We offer competitive compensation, a good and stable work environment, and plenty of growth opportunities.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Content Development:



- In partnership with our Senior Social Media Manager and Marketing Team, create and maintain a social media content calendar that supports primary brand stories and goals while also tapping into seasonal 
nts and appropriate trends

- Create original, on-brand social media content that our followers will appreciate

- Content will be a mix of product-related content as well as product-adjacent content (e.g., top sleep tips!)

- Leveraging data, identify UGC and inspiration imagery to be considered for posting

- Write effective content. Work with copywriters and designers to ensure content is informative and appealing

- Keep up to date with current news, pausing content and escalating to leadership where appropriate

- Partner with Marketing and eComm tea
mbers to create shot lists for social media, as needed

- Develop Instagram Stories templates and stickers. Using those templates and Instagram platform elements, create our Instagram Stories



Posting:



- Schedule content for
, Instagram feed, Instagram Stories, and Pinterest, either within the app or by using tools such as Sprout Social or Later

- Post Instagram Stories directly from the Instagram app



Affiliate Marketing & Community Management



- Respond to all engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekdays

- Respond to all urgent engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekends

- Respond to engagement during normal US hours (range of acceptable times: 10 pm PH - 9 am PH)

- Author thoughtful, individualized comments and messages in the brand voice in response to comments on our pages, on images where we are tagged or where our product is depicted, and on images posted by brands and people we admire!

- Develop and maintain a live document with common questions and responses

- Adhere to rules and regulations - **no “black hat” social media techniques**! We want to build our brand presence organically



Asset Collection



- Request and gather UGC from our followers and fans in our Airtable database. Request content usage permission for all images that are within our brand guidelines. Follow up via
 or direct message as needed for any assets we are especially eager to share.

- Obtain or verify permissions for any images submitted via direct message,
, influencer collaborations or other means and upload to our visual curation tool, editing beforehand as needed.

- With brand priorities in mind, investigate content leads identified by social media, press, and other means to create a library of aspirational imagery featuring our products



Influencer Marketing



- Identify influencers who we can work with as part of our influencer marketing strategy

- Execute on influencer marketing strategy and management, including cultivating our network of valued influencer partners



Reporting & Strategy



- Assist in regular content performance and competitive reporting and analysis

- Provide ad hoc qualitative social analysis

- Be our in-house expert on social platform updates and trends in social media, interior design, home, and retail, presenting out to the team as needed

- Continuously seek ways to improve processes, recommending any tools or technology needed and subsequently serving as the primary point of contact for the relevant third parties

- Ideate new social activations, such as content series, engagement strategies, contests, and giveaways



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



-Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

-Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to learn, grow and develop their careers continuously

-Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

title: Guest Experience Virtual Assistant, Sierra Sol Elevated Stays
description:
Sierra Sol Elevated Stays is a locally rooted, family-owned property management company serving Northern New Mexico (Santa Fe, Taos, Angel Fire, and Red River) with over 150 properties. Our love for this region is what led us to build Sierra Sol Elevated Stays, focused on providing elevated stays for our guests and elevated stewardship for our homeowners. Our goal is to grow in a way that celebrates what makes New Mexico special – its people, culture, and enchanted lands – while delivering elevated experiences for guests and thoughtful, reliable stewardship for homeowners.



Tech stack (daily tools): Guesty (PMS + guest inbox), Breezeway (tasks/workorders + cleaning), RingCentral (calls/SMS).

Our Elevated Promises



Everything we do is guided by our Elevated Promises. They are our operating standard and the way we earn five-star stays and trusted, long-term homeowner partnerships.



1. Elevated Guest Engagement: Proactive, elevated hospitality from booking to five-star review. 

We believe vacations are special—something people save for, plan for, and look forward to. Our job is to make every stay feel seamless and memorable. We anticipate needs, communicate early, check in during the stay, and resolve issues quickly with warmth and care. Our guest journey is intentionally crafted to deliver the kind of responsiveness, thoughtfulness, and attention to detail that turns great trips into truly elevated experiences.



2. Elevated Home Stewardship: We care for every home as if it were our own.

As homeowners in these markets, we know what true home stewardship looks like. We operate with a proactive mindset of quality, consistency, and pride. Weekly home checks, rigorous cleaning standards, quality control, seasonal readiness, and preventive maintenance are all part of how we ensure every property is clean, protected, and presentation ready, for guests and for you. We treat every home with the same respect and diligence we expect for our own.



3. Elevated Homeowner Partnerships: We treat each home like our own investment.

Every homeowner has different goals – maximizing revenue, balancing personal use, focusing on long-term appreciation, or simply enjoying peace of mind. Our role is to be a true partner in those goals, not simply a property manager. As owners and operators in this region ourselves, our guidance comes from real-world results, not theory. Through regular business reviews, thoughtful design and amenity recommendations, revenue and pricing insights, and brand-building support, we help each property reach its highest potential.



Our Guest Experience team is one of the biggest ways we deliver these promises. This is hospitality work. You are a core part of our team, not an outsourced call-center function.



Job Description:

As a Guest Experience Virtual Assistant, you own guest communication and coordination. You are the voice of Sierra Sol, a core part of our team, and a key driver of five-star stays. You will manage guest messaging and calls, coordinate workorders and cleaning schedules with our local teams and vendors, and bring elevated hospitality and experiences to every stay.



You will own:

• Proactive outreach and warm guest engagement that drives five-star stays

• Guest messaging and phone communication

• Workorder coordination and task follow-through

• Cleaning scheduling and day-to-day coordination with our local team and vendors



Working Hours

We provide live coverage from 7:00am to 11:00pm Mountain Time (MDT). You will be assigned a consistent shift. On-call after hour coverage (11:00pm-7:00am MDT) is handled by a separate rotation.

Mountain Daylight Time (MDT) ? Philippines Time (PHT):

• 7am–3pm MDT ? 9pm–5am PHT

• 11am–7pm MDT ? 1am–9am PHT

• 3pm–11pm MDT ? 5am–1pm PHT

You will be assigned one shift. Overnight shifts include a differential.

On-call: 11pm–7am MDT is handled by an on-call rotation (separate from daily shift expectations).



Compensation and Incentives

• Base pay: $650-$750 USD per month (full-time, based on experience)

• Night shift (9p – 5a): +$50 per month

• Internet/tech allowance: $20 per month

• 13th month pay: offered in December (prorated for partial years)

• Monthly Bonus: Monthly 5-Star Bonus Pool (based on team review quality + individual SLA performance)

• PTO: Accrues at 1 paid days per month (usable after 90 days; no annual rollover)



Monthly 5-Star Bonus Pool

We keep the bonus simple, measurable, and tied directly to delivering elevated guest experiences — the heart of your role.

• Pool funding: $2.00 USD for every 5-star review received during the month.

• Quality gate: Pool funded only if the monthly average rating is 4.85+ and the review rate is 80%+.

• Distribution: The funded pool is divided equally among the Guest Experience Tea
mbers.

• Eligibility: You receive your share when monthly SLA and performance standards are met. Shares are not redistributed from non-eligible members.



Location

These roles are fully remote within the Philippines. However, we are building our core Guest Experience team in Cebu City, and applicants located in Cebu City or nearby areas are strongly preferred.

Concentrating our team locally helps us work more closely, support one another, and build the kind of connected, collaborative culture that lets us deliver truly elevated hospitality. It also allows for optional in-person training sessions, tea
etups, and shared learning opportunities.

Exceptional candidates from other regions will still be considered.



Role and Responsibilities:



Elevated Guest Engagement (Guesty + text/email)

• Answer guest messages (text,
, OTA inbox via Guesty) with warmth, clarity, and genuine care

• Proactively share helpful guidance (arrival, access, weather/roads, home-specific tips) and check in during the stay

• Keep conversations organized and ensure no guest is left waiting or confused

• Ensure every guest experience feels special and elevated



Welcome outreach (required for every reservation)

• Place a welcome phone call to every guest prior to arrival day and send a personalized welcome text

• Confirm access and comfort, offer help, and document any concerns quickly

• Identify opportunities to make the guest’s stay an elevated and memorable experience



Phone support (RingCentral)

• Answer calls quickly and calmly and return missed calls promptly

• Troubleshoot common issues (access, Wi-Fi, amenities, heating/hot tub basics) and escalate when needed



Workorders and coordination (Breezeway)

• Create workorders fast when issues arise and confirm vendor/team acknowledgment

• Track progress, follow up, and close the loop with guests and the local team

• Keep notes and task status clean so handoffs are seamless



Cleaning scheduling and turnovers (Breezeway)

• Coordinate turn cleaning schedules and special requests

• Ensure all turns are scheduled a minimum of one week prior to booking and confirm scheduled cleaner the day prior to a scheduled cleaning and communicate key notes to cleaners



Documentation and handoffs

• Maintain accurate property notes and updates

• Close out open items before shift end and hand off active issues with clear context



Monthly SLA Standards (required for bonus eligibility)

• Guest messages answered within 15 minutes during your shift (text,
, Guesty inbox)

• Phone calls answered within 30 seconds during your shift

• No open guest messages left at shift end; clean handoffs with clear notes

• Workorders created promptly and vendor/team acknowledgment confirmed quickly



Property Listing Management & OTA Updates

• Maintain accurate, up-to-date listings across Guesty, Airbnb, Vrbo, and other OTAs.

• Update photos, amenities, room configurations, access notes, and seasonal details as needed.

• Ensure descriptions reflect the true guest experience with clear, warm, and helpful language.

• Flag inconsistencies, outdated information, or missing details to the Manager for correction.

• Support seasonal updates (ski season, summer events, holiday periods) to elevate guest expectations and reduce pre-arrival questions.

• Ensure every listing reflects our Elevated Promises — clarity, care, and a welcoming tone.



Local expertise

• Become an expert on Santa Fe, Taos, Angel Fire, and Red River, including seasonal rhythms, weather and road impacts, and local norms.

• Learn the best restaurants, cafes, shops, activities, and experiences in each market so you can offer personalized, concierge-level recommendations that elevate each stay.

• Know our homes in detail: complete Matterport and photo walkthroughs; learn layouts, bedding, amenities, quirks, parking, access instructions, and any “good to know” details for guests.

• Stay current on local events and updates by checking event calendars, tourism sites, and community pages (including relevant local
 groups).

• Use your local and property knowledge proactively to help guests plan better stays, avoid common issues, and feel confidently looked after from booking to checkout.



What we look for

• Excellent written and spoken English and a warm, helpful tone

• Hospitality mindset (you enjoy caring for people, not just closing tickets)

• Strong ownership and follow-through, especially on weekends and busy days

• Detail-oriented and eager to learn homes, markets, and local context

• Comfortable learning and working inside Guesty, Breezeway, and RingCentral

• Reliable internet and a quiet, professional work environment



How to apply

Please submit the following:

• Resume/CV

• 2-minute voice recording introducing yourself and your experience (English)

• Speedtest.net result (screenshot)

• Short written samples: How would you respond to the following guest messages?

  - “The hot tub isn’t heating. Can you help?”

  - “Can we request a late checkout tomorrow?”

  - “We’re staying in Angel Fire — any recommendations for a great breakfast spot for our family?”

• Short written samples: These three guests message you at the same time. In what order would you respond and why?

  - “We can’t get into the home, the code isn’t working.”

  - “The Wi-Fi is slow and we need it for work.”

  - “Can we check out one hour later?”

Suggested
 subject line: "NM Guest Experience VA - [Your Name]"

title: SEO Specialist
description:
Triforce Digital Marketing, a leading digital marketing agency specializing in innovative and results-driven strategies, is seeking a talented and experienced SEO Specialist to join our dynamic team. If you have a deep understanding of search engine optimization techniques, a proven track record of driving organic traffic and improving search rankings, and a passion for staying ahead of industry trends, we want to hear from you!



Responsibilities:



Conduct comprehensive keyword research and analysis to identify opportunities for organic traffic growth.

Develop and implement on-page and off-page SEO strategies to improve search rankings and increase organic visibility.

Optimize website content, meta tags, headings, and other on-page elements for improved search engine relevance.

Perform technical SEO audits to identify and address any website performance and crawling issues.

Monitor and analyze website analytics and performance metrics to identify areas of improvement and track SEO campaign success.

Stay up-to-date with the latest SEO trends, algorithm updates, and best practices.

Collaborate with content creators, web developers, and designers to ensure SEO optimization throughout all digital assets.

Provide SEO recommendations and guidance to clients, communicating complex concepts in a clear and concise manner.

Track and report on SEO performance metrics, providing regular updates to clients and internal stakeholders.



Preferred Qualifications:

Experience with local SEO, international SEO, or e-commerce SEO

Familiarity with content management systems, such as WordPress

Experience with A/B testing and conversion rate optimization

Solid understanding of on-page and off-page SEO optimization techniques.

Strong communication and presentation skills, with the ability to explain complex SEO concepts to clients and internal teams.

Detail-oriented and organized, with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

A passion for staying up-to-date with the latest SEO trends and industry developments.

title: Accounts Payable Specialist (A/P Specialist)
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this role feels like the perfect fit and you meet the qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our team in the Philippines and submit your application here:




/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagRcEzAT2P39Rr13/form



Note: Only applications submitted via the above link will be considered.



JOB DESCRIPTION



We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Accounts Payable Specialist to join our close-knit accounting team. In this role, you will be in charge of making sure our company pays all of its bills on time and correctly, including vendors in the U.S. and overseas. If you are great with numbers, organized, and love making sure things are done right the first time, this job is for you.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



- Take ownership of the full A/P process: receive and check invoices, enter them into our system, route them for approval, and make sure they get paid.

- Handle international vendor payments (payments to overseas factories). Carefully review each invoice for accuracy, match supporting documents (like shipping records and POs), and flag any inconsistencies before releasing payments.

- Double-check all invoices to ensure accuracy and compliance with company policies.

- Keep vendor contact info and payment details up to date in our system.

- Match vendor statements with our records and investigate any mismatches or errors.

- Ensure each expense is booked to the correct account, department, or project.

- Run weekly payment batches, including checks, ACH, credit card, and wire transfers.

- Respond to vendor
s and calls professionally and quickly.

- Work with other departments to solve payment issues and help prevent future ones.

- Support month-end close and annual audits by preparing A/P reports and documentation.

- Regularly create reports to help track payables and support financial decision-making.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Bachelor's degree in Accounting or a related field

- 5 to 7 years of hands-on Accounts Payable experience

- Strong skills in Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, VLOOKUPs, etc.)

- Experience with accounting systems like SAP, NetSuite, or similar (a plus)

- Strong knowledge of A/P and general accounting principles

- Excellent attention to detail

- Good written and verbal English skills

- Self-motivated and able to manage deadlines independently

- Quiet home office setup with reliable internet and a dual-monitor setup (strongly preferred)

- Available to work full-time, 40 hours/week, from either 8:00 AM-5:00 PM or 9:00 AM-6:00 PM CST (Note: This is a night shift for PH-based tea
mbers)

- Alignment with our mission and values: 
/3Unr0ub



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows, and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we are committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping, and low order minimums, we have become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 
.



Want to get to know us better and learn what it is like to be part of our growing team in the Philippines? Learn more here: 
/hea-ph-team



WHY HIEND ACCENTS?



At HiEnd Accents, we are a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, a growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights. We are proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



- Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

- Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure they have the opportunity to continuously learn, grow, and develop their careers

- Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you are working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

title: Multi-state Credentialing Specialist for Behavioral Health
description:
About the Role

We are a growing behavioral health practice seeking a detail?oriented Credentialing Specialist to lead our multi?state licensing and credentialing efforts. This role requires someone skilled at navigating regulatory requirements, managing complex applications, and coordinating licensure across multiple U.S. jurisdictions.

- Part-time to Full-time (approx. 20 hrs/week)

- Remote / Flexible schedule

- Long?term, multi?state expansion project



Primary Responsibilities

- Research and interpret state-specific licensing requirements and application processes

- Manage end?to?end licensing and credentialing for behavioral health providers in multiple states

- Review regulatory requirements and ensure compliance across jurisdictions

- Complete and submit detailed applications with exceptional accuracy

- Maintain organized tracking systems for all licensing activities

- Communicate with state boards, regulatory agencies, and credentialing bodies

- Identify regulatory challenges and propose solutions

- Serve as our internal expert on healthcare licensing and credentialing

- Provide regular progress updates and keep projects moving forward



Required Qualifications

- Experience as a credentialing specialist, licensing coordinator, or similar healthcare role

- Strong ability to interpret regulatory and procedural requirements

- Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy in documentation

- Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple applications simultaneously

- Experience with behavioral health licensing or multi?state credentialing (preferred)

- Experience with multi?state licensure compacts (e.g., Counseling Compact, Social Work Compact) is strongly preferred and will place candidates at the top of the list

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills

- Self?directed, reliable, and comfortable working independently

- Comfortable with administrative and data?entry tasks

- Professional home office setup with reliable internet



Ideal Candidate Profile

You thrive on detailed, methodical work; navigate bureaucratic processes with ease; maintain accuracy and organization; and keep long?term projects moving without constant oversight. You understand the importance of compliance in healthcare and enjoy solving regulatory challenges to help providers expand access to care.



About Our Practice

We are a mission?driven behavioral health practice focused on expanding access to high?quality mental health services. As we grow our multi?state footprint, strong licensing and credentialing processes are essential. This role is foundational to our expansion and we’re looking for someone who can begin as soon as possible and grow with our team.

ntum on long-term projects without constant oversight

title: Experienced WordPress/Elementor Developer Wanted - HUGE OPPORTUNITY
description:
We are currently looking for a skilled and reliable WordPress & Elementor Developer to join our team for ongoing website projects.



Most of the work will involve building WordPress websites using Elementor based on Figma designs that we provide. The design work will already be completed, so your role will mainly be converting those designs into clean, responsive, and fully functional WordPress websites. For someone experienced with Elementor and working from design files, this should be a very straightforward process.



The majority of the websites we build are for construction and trades-based businesses such as electricians, plumbers, builders, and landscapers. Because of this, the structure of the sites tends to be quite similar from project to project, making the workflow efficient once you become familiar with the style of builds.



We are looking for someone who is reliable, detail-oriented, and able to meet strict delivery timelines. There will be consistent ongoing work available, and we are ideally looking for someone who can start immediately.



Responsibilities:



• Build WordPress websites using Elementor based on Figma designs provided by our team

• Ensure all websites are responsive, visually accurate, and fully functional

• Work closely with our project manager throughout the development process

• Troubleshoot and resolve any issues during development

• Deliver websites within strict deadlines



Requirements:



• Strong experience with WordPress & Elementor

• Ability to accurately convert Figma designs into WordPress websites

• Solid understanding of HTML & CSS (basic JavaScript knowledge is helpful)

• Strong attention to detail

• Good communication and reliability

• Ability to follow instructions and stay on schedule



To help us filter applications and ensure you have read the listing properly, please include the phrase “I listen to Dylan” somewhere within your application message.



When applying, please include examples of WordPress websites you have built. If you have any examples of construction or trades-based websites (electricians, plumbers, builders, landscapers, etc.), that would be even better as it aligns closely with the type of work we regularly produce.



We are looking for someone who can become a reliable part of our team for ongoing website development work, so if you believe you are a good fit, we look forward to seeing your application.

title: Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED AS AN APPLICANT, PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR MOST UP-TO-DATE RESUME AND A VIDEO INTRODUCTION TAILORED TO THIS JOB POSTING!******



Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Sunday to Thursday, 2:00 PM-10:30 PM PST (30-minute unpaid break) - Subject to client requirements

Salary: $1,200 per month



Job Overview:

We are seeking a highly skilled Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler to join our team. This role focuses on designing and detailing multi-level storage buildings, which require a unique structural approach due to their heavy load-bearing systems and specialized construction methods.

The ideal candidate is not only a strong structural engineer but also a super expert in Revit modeling, capable of creating precise, complex models with minimal supervision.



Key Responsibilities:

Design and model heavy, multi-level storage buildings using Revit.

Perform structural analysis and detailing specific to high-load industrial and storage facilities.

Develop accurate construction documents and shop drawings.

Collaborate with the engineering and design team to ensure models meet structural and architectural requirements.

Identify and solve design challenges with a focus on constructability and safety.

Maintain accuracy and consistency across all Revit models and related documentation.

Coordinate with project managers and other disciplines to ensure seamless project delivery.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, or related field.

Industrial and commercial engineering experience preferred, particularly with heavy load-bearing structures.

Proven expertise as a Revit Modeler, with advanced knowledge of large-scale modeling.

Strong understanding of structural systems, especially for multi-level and heavy storage buildings.

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

Excellent attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication and collaboration abilities in a remote team environment.



Preferred Skills:

Experience with Steel Structures, Concrete Structures, Masonry Construction, Light and Gauge Steel Structures

Familiarity with BIM coordination and clash detection.

Knowledge of U.S. building codes and standards is a plus.

Knowledge of ETABS and SAFE is a plus.



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Graphic Designer / Social Media Manager
description:
About Us

We’re building a global talent pool of exceptional remote creatives to support partner clinics across Australia, the US, the UK, New Zealand, and beyond. These clinics deliver modern healthcare through telehealth and digital services—often blending general practice with wellness, integrative care, and allied health support.



Our shared mission is simple: make healthcare more human—clear, calm, trustworthy communication that helps patients feel informed, supported, and confident to take the next step.



If you’re a designer who can also run social media with structure and strategy, we’d love to meet you.



Role Overview

As a Graphic Designer / Social Media Manager, you’ll create scroll-stopping, on-brand visuals and manage social channels that educate and convert—without hype or misinformation. You’ll work closely with clinic teams to translate services into content that’s patient-friendly, visually consistent, and performance-driven.



This is a pooling / talent pipeline role. Successful candidates may be matched to open roles with clinics based on:

 • Your strengths (design-heavy vs social-heavy, organic vs paid support)

 • Your preferred shift coverage (AU/UK/US)

 • Tools you’ve used (Adobe/Canva, scheduling tools, Meta, etc.)

 • Compensation alignment and scope



What You’ll Do (Key Responsibilities)

 • Design social assets: carousels, static posts, stories, thumbnails, and basic ad creatives.

 • Create or adapt brand templates (fonts, color systems, layouts) to maintain visual consistency.

 • Manage clinic social channels (commonly Instagram +
; sometimes TikTok + LinkedIn).

 • Build and maintain a monthly content calendar aligned to clinic offers, services, and seasonal themes.

 • Write or refine captions in a calm, patient-first tone (clear, warm, non-judgmental).

 • Edit short-form video content when required (reels/shorts): simple cuts, captions, covers, resizing.

 • Community management: respond to comments/DMs using approved scripts; route clinical questions appropriately.

 • Coordinate approvals with clinic stakeholders (especially for healthcare accuracy and compliance).

 • Track performance metrics and report results (reach, engagement, clicks, leads, bookings where available).

 • Support basic marketing tasks: simple landing page visuals,
 banners, lead magnet design.



Must-Have Qualifications

 • 2+ years experience as a Graphic Designer, Social Media Manager, or Content Creator (healthcare/wellness is a plus).

 • Strong portfolio showing social media design (carousels, stories, ads, brand kits/templates).

 • Proficiency in Canva and/or Adobe tools (Photoshop/Illustrator/InDesign) or similar.

 • Solid understanding of social formats and best practices (safe margins, ratios, hooks, readability).

 • Strong English comprehension and ability to follow brand voice guidelines.

 • Organized, deadline-driven, and comfortable working with feedback and approvals.

 • Remote-ready: reliable internet, quiet workspace, consistent availability, proactive communication.



Nice-to-Haves (Bonus Points)

 • Experience designing for clinics, telehealth, health tech, or regulated industries.

 • Short-form video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro/Rush, Final Cut, After Effects basics).

 • Basic knowledge of performance creatives (A/B variants, hooks, CTAs, ad-friendly layouts).

 • Experience with scheduling tools (Later, Buffer, Hootsuite, Metricool).

 • Familiarity with Meta Business Suite and analytics reporting.

 • Copywriting skills for landing pages,
 flows, or campaign messaging.

 • Ability to create simple motion graphics (animated stories, reels overlays).



Tools/Systems Familiarity (Examples)

 • Design: Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Figma

 • Video: CapCut, Adobe Premiere Rush/Pro, Adobe Express

 • Scheduling: Later, Buffer, Hootsuite, Metricool

 • Platforms: Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts

 • Project/ops: Google Workspace, Notion, Trello/Asana, Slack

 • Reporting: Google Sheets, Looker Studio (nice-to-have)



Work Setup & Scheduling (PH-based)

 • Location: Philippines (remote)

 • Shift options: Vary by clinic assignment

 • AU/NZ-friendly (PH day shift)

 • UK-friendly (PH late afternoon/evening)

 • US-friendly (PH night shift)

 • We prefer candidates who can commit to consistent overlap windows and provide clear async updates.



Compensation (General Guidance)

Starts at USD 10/hour. Higher rates may apply for candidates who can lead both:

 • high-quality design output and

 • social strategy + consistent performance reporting.

Some clinic assignments may offer bonuses based on campaign goals (lead volume, bookings, or growth targets).



How to Apply (Required)

Please submit:

 1. CV / Resume

 2. Portfolio link (Behance/Drive/Website) showing social posts, templates, and brand work

 3. A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) covering:

 • Your design + social media experience

Important: Applications without a portfolio may not be considered.



Our Screening Process (What to Expect)

Join the Pool

If you can design beautifully, keep content organized, and communicate healthcare topics with calm clarity, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Part-Time VA for US Realtor Lead Gen + Outreach Scheduling (SaaS Startup)
description:
About the Project:

I'm a solo US developer with one part-time dev building 
 – an easy SaaS popup tool for real estate agents. It adds neighborhood insights to property pages with just 3 lines of code (no redesign, super simple integration). We're testing if realtors with their own websites will add it – need to book 25-50 short Zoom interviews (20-30 min each) with independent realtors/brokers open to website tweaks.

Past marketing was expensive and complicated (tools didn't deliver), so now we're keeping it lean: hire a reliable VA to source leads, send outreach, and book calls so I can focus on the demo and dev.

Main Tasks:



Build targeted lists of
independent US realtors/small brokers who have their own websites (use free/cheap methods: LinkedIn searches, Zillow agent finder, Google, state realtor directories, 
 free tier, etc.).

Send short, personalized cold
s (I'll give templates + access to a simple
 tool or Gmail setup).

Follow up once or twice on replies, qualify them quickly (e.g., confirm they manage their site and are open to easy code integration).

Book qualified realtors on my Calendly for 20-30 min feedback/demo calls.

Log everything in a shared Google Sheet: leads,
s sent, responses, booked calls, key notes (pain points, willingness to integrate).

Target: Help get 25-50 booked interviews in 4-8 weeks.



Required Skills:



Experience in lead research / cold outreach (B2B or real estate a plus, but fast learners OK).

Good written English for
s and replies.

Comfortable with Google Sheets, LinkedIn,
 finders (
), basic
 sending.

Proactive, organized, hits daily targets without constant check-ins.

Bonus: Familiar with real estate agents, appointment setting, or tools like GoHighLevel/Instantly (not required – we'll keep it simple).

Experience with instantly.ai 



What I Need:



Honest, results-focused person who communicates clearly.

Long-term fit possible if this validates (grow to full marketing help).



How to Apply (must include all to be considered):



Start your message with the words "Dream Neighborhood VA".

Short intro: Who you are, why this role fits you.

Your experience with lead gen/outreach (examples, results if any).

Your hourly rate in the $3-7 range.

How many hours/week you can reliably commit right now.



I'll review quickly and schedule short screening chats with the best fits this week. Let's move fast and get those realtor calls booked!
