title: Content Specialist & Video Editor
description:
Do you love video editing and want to grow your career in content creation?



We're looking for talented video editors who are ready to take on a bigger role as a Content Specialist.



In this role, you'll do more than just editing. You’ll be trained on our internal systems to create short-form captions using AI, schedule social media posts through our platform, and manage content workflows for your assigned client.



We are a content agency, and we often repurpose longer-form videos for YouTube Shorts, Reels, and TikToks, as well as audiograms and graphics for social media. We also edit their raw videos for YouTube and edit podcast episodes as well.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Edit short-form and long-form content (YouTube, Reels, TikTok, podcasts)

Use our AI captioning system to create short-form captions

Schedule content to automatically post inside our proprietary platform

Follow creative direction and provide consistent, high-quality execution

Participate in weekly training sessions to continually improve your skills



Who We’re Looking For:



Professional experience with Adobe Premiere, After Effects, or similar tools

Strong eye for motion design and storytelling

Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage your time independently

Positive attitude and willingness to receive feedback

Excellent communication skills and a self-starter mindset

Comfortable learning new tools and systems



What We Offer:



Guaranteed client placement upon successful training

Monthly salary of $700 to $1,000 USD paid directly by the client

Weekly training and ongoing support

100% remote work



If you're interested, please respond with the subject line "It's Me You're Looking For" and include a link to your work. Tell me why we should hire you!

title: Email Marketing Manager — Long-Term Role | Fitness Brand | Full Ownership
description:
We are Ultimate Gainz — a female fitness wear brand based around discipline, strength, and real performance. We sell to women who take their training seriously, and our brand voice reflects that: bold, direct, and unapologetic.

We're hiring an
 Marketing Manager for a long-term, ongoing role. This is not a task-based assistant position. We need someone who takes full ownership of our
 channel — someone who plans, creates, tests, and improves without being asked. Your bonus is tied directly to
 revenue: the more revenue you drive, the more you earn. There is no ceiling.



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF...

• You want a stable, long-term client — not short project gigs

• You take pride in owning something and making it better

• You're proactive — you come with ideas, not just completed tasks

• You understand e-commerce
 marketing (flows, campaigns, segmentation)

• You're comfortable with Klaviyo or similar platforms

• You can write in a direct, bold tone — no fluff, no over-explaining



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

• Plan and manage our monthly
 calendar

• Write or brief copy for campaigns and automated flows

• Run A/B tests and apply what you learn

• Monitor and report on key metrics (open rate, CTR, revenue from
)

• Keep our list healthy — segment, clean, and protect deliverability

• Bring new ideas to improve performance — regularly, without prompting



COMPENSATION & BONUSES

Base: $750/month

Revenue Tier: +$200 per €5,000 in
-attributed revenue above €15,000/month

Quarterly Bonus: Up to $500 for hitting
 revenue/attribution targets we set together

This is a long-term role with room to grow. We reward people who deliver and stay committed.



WHAT WE EXPECT

• Strong async communication — we don't micromanage, but we expect clear updates

• You flag problems early, not after they become issues

• You treat this brand like it's your own responsibility

• Overlap with our working hours for at least 3–4 hours per day



HOW TO APPLY

 campaign or idea you came up with on your own — not something a client or boss asked for. What did you do, and what happened?

title: Short-Form Video Editor & Posting VA (TikTok / Reels / UGC)
description:
We are hiring a highly reliable Video Editor & Posting VA to handle large-scale daily editing and publishing of short-form content across multiple accounts.



This is a high-output execution role. Your responsibility is to turn raw footage into platform-native videos and get them posted accurately, quickly, and consistently.



You will be expected to help process up to 100 posts per day across accounts.

If you are not comfortable working at this volume, this role will not be a good fit.



Core Responsibilities



You will manage the full pipeline from raw files to live posts.



Daily tasks include:



Accessing iCloud folders to retrieve raw video files



Editing videos to match provided references or campaign style



Making content look native to TikTok (CapCut-style editing)



Adding captions, cuts, zooms, timing, and on-screen text



Syncing footage to sounds, music, or voiceovers



Matching lip-sync to audio when required



Finding the correct sound or music when needed



Exporting videos in platform-ready format



After editing:



Remotely controlling company phones from your computer



Uploading videos to the correct accounts



Attaching the correct sound or audio track



Writing or pasting captions and hashtags



Ensuring formatting matches TikTok best practices



Verifying successful upload



Marking posts as completed in the CRM



Technical Requirements



You must be comfortable operating within a structured, high-volume workflow.



Required skills:



Strong CapCut editing skills (mobile-style editing)



Familiarity with TikTok Studio and posting tools



Understanding of TikTok trends and native content style



Ability to work inside iCloud file systems



Experience with remote phone control software



Ability to troubleshoot issues independently



Strong organizational skills across many files and accounts



Comfortable updating spreadsheets or CRM systems



High-speed internet and reliable computer setup



What “Native TikTok Editing” Means



Content should look like it was created inside TikTok itself, not traditional editing software.



You should be comfortable with:



Fast-paced retention editing



Platform-style text overlays



Proper vertical framing



Trend-aligned timing and sound usage



Clean edits that feel authentic, not overproduced



Who This Role Is For



You are:



Extremely detail-oriented



Fast and dependable under heavy daily workload



Comfortable with repetitive but precise tasks



Technically confident and organized



Able to work independently with minimal supervision



Focused on accuracy and consistency



Who This Role Is NOT For



Do not apply if you:



Cannot handle high-volume output



Are new to CapCut or TikTok editing



Miss deadlines or overlook details



Need constant direction



Prefer slow-paced or purely creative work

title: Cash Flow and Financial Modeling
description:
We are looking for a Financial Analyst to support a growing business with rigorous financial analysis and clear decision support. This role plays a key part in building reliable financial visibility across the organization and supporting leadership with actionable insights.

The ideal candidate brings strong analytical judgment, operates with a high degree of ownership, and is comfortable translating financial data into practical insights for decision-makers. Success in this role requires precision, consistency, and the ability to adapt models and forecasts as business inputs evolve while collaborating closely with cross-functional stakeholders.

Core Responsibilities



Build, own, and continuously refine cash flow, P&L, and budgeting models to support forecasting, planning, and multi-scenario analysis.

Lead budgeting and reforecasting processes, incorporating actual performance, business drivers, and updated assumptions.

Own monthly P&L performance tracking, including detailed variance analysis against budget and forecast.

Develop and maintain short- and long-term cash flow forecasts, identifying risks, constraints, and optimization opportunities.

Prepare and deliver clear, actionable financial reporting for leadership, translating data into insights and recommendations.

Support strategic and operational decision-making through ad hoc financial analysis, including sensitivity analysis and what-if modeling.

Partner cross-functionally to ensure financial models reflect real operational and commercial drivers.

Requirements



Demonstrated expertise in financial analysis with a strong focus on cash flow modeling, P&L management, budgeting, and forecasting.

Proven experience supporting e-commerce or direct-to-consumer (DTC) businesses.

Experience building and maintaining complex financial models for business planning and scenario analysis.

Strong background preparing recurring financial reports and conducting variance analysis against budget and forecast.

Experience providing financial insights that support operational and strategic decision-making.

Prior experience operating in a mid- to senior-level analytical role with ownership over financial outputs.

Experience in e-commerce, ideally within the beauty or consumer goods industry, is strongly preferred.

title: Real Estate Research VA – Foreclosure & Lien Research (Long-Term)
description:
Hello,

We are a U.S. real estate research company that identifies surplus funds after foreclosure sales and helps creditors recover money they are legally owed.

We are looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who can research foreclosure cases and identify liens using county court websites and property records.

This is long-term work for the right person.

You will work directly with our research lead and help build cases for our recovery team.

 

Important – Please Read Carefully

Much of this work currently requires manual research using county court websites and public property records.

We are developing internal systems that will make this work faster in the future, but applicants must be comfortable researching manually on government websites.

If you enjoy solving puzzles and finding information online, this job can be a great fit.

 

Your Main Responsibilities

You will help us research foreclosure cases and build a case file for our recovery team.

Tasks include:

• Review foreclosure case dockets on county court websites

• Identify possible surplus funds after foreclosure sales

• Download important legal documents (complaint, lis pendens, final judgment, etc.)

• Search county official records for mortgages and liens

• Identify junior lienholders, including:

• Second mortgages

• HELOCs

• Judgments

• Mechanic’s liens

• HOA liens

• Download and organize documents

• Enter research results into our tracking system

 

Skills That Help With This Job

Helpful but not required:

• experience researching public records

• real estate research

• title research

• foreclosure research

• legal assistant experience

The most important qualities are:

• attention to detail

• ability to follow instructions

• comfort researching information online

• organized work habits

 

Work Hours

Part-time to start (15–20 hours per week)

This role may grow into a long-term full-time position (quickly) for the right person.

 

Pay

Based on experience and negotiable.

 

Important Instructions (Read Carefully)

To show that you pay attention to detail, please follow these steps in your application.

1. Start your application with the word SURPLUS

2. In the middle of your application include a picture of a blue 1970 Ford Mustang Mach 1 fastback

3. Answer this question:

What website would you use to search property records in Miami-Dade County, Florida?

Please answer these questions as well:

1. Have you ever researched property records or court cases before?

2. What tools or websites have you used for research?

3. Are you comfortable reviewing legal documents?

4. How do you stay organized when researching multiple cases?



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

 

Final Question

In one or two sentences, tell us about any experience you have researching property records, legal cases, or public records.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Graphic Designer (Full-Time, Remote):



We are a modern organic marketing agency looking for a full-time Graphic Designer to join our team.



Our agency helps businesses grow using data-backed social media marketing, and we need someone who can create high-performing graphics and carousels for our clients’ social media pages and advertising campaigns.



This role is perfect for someone who is creative, detail-oriented, and comfortable using AI tools to design quickly and efficiently.



Responsibilities:



Your work will primarily involve designing visuals that help our clients grow their audience and promote their services.



This includes:



• Social media graphics

• Carousel posts for Instagram / LinkedIn

• Promotional graphics (sales, announcements, highlights)

• Ad creatives for marketing campaigns



Most designs will be based on content that is already performing well online, meaning you will often:



• Analyze high-performing posts from competitors

• Take inspiration from those designs

• Recreate and improve them using our branding and messaging



You will be working in a data-backed environment, meaning designs are created strategically based on what works — not randomly.



Important: AI Skills Required



We expect our designers to be modern designers who are comfortable using AI tools.



You will have access to unlimited AI tools, including tools like:



• Google Nano Pro

• AI image generation tools

• AI editing tools



In many cases, AI will allow you to create or modify graphics much faster than traditional design methods.



However, you should still be capable of making manual adjustments and edits when needed.



Most of the time you will combine:



• AI-generated visuals

• Inspiration from existing high-performing content

• Custom design adjustments

• Client branding



Requirements:



We are looking for someone who:



• Has strong graphic design skills

• Is comfortable using AI tools in their workflow

• Can follow branding guidelines

• Pays close attention to detail

• Works efficiently and independently

• Is hardworking and takes pride in their work



We value people who take their work seriously and consistently put in effort.



Work Schedule:

•Full-time

•Monday – Friday

•9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (Eastern Standard Timezone)



Compensation:

•$500 per month

•Includes 13th month pay.



Application Requirement (Important)



To apply, you must complete a short design assignment.



Create one data-backed social media graphic or carousel for the brand:



Product Prep



Product Prep teaches automotive finance managers how to sell more cars and warranties.



Your goal is to design a graphic or carousel that would perform well on social media for this audience.



You may:



• Use inspiration from existing posts in the industry

• Use AI tools to help create the design

• Apply your own design skills and creativity



Submit this design along with your application.



We are looking for candidates who clearly take time and effort in their work.



If your submission shows strong effort and skill, there is a very good chance you will be hired.



How to Apply



Please submit:



Your portfolio (if available)



Your completed Product Prep design assignment



A short introduction about yourself



We look forward to seeing your work.

title: Medical Sales Representative - Cold Calling
description:
About Us

We’re building a global talent pool of high-performing remote Medical Sales Representatives (Cold Callers) to support partner clinics across Australia, the US, the UK, New Zealand, and beyond. These clinics deliver modern healthcare through telehealth and digital services—often combining general practice with wellness, integrative, and allied health support.



Our mission is simple: help more people access care through ethical, respectful outreach and a warm, professional patient-first approach.



If you’re confident on the phone, resilient, and enjoy hitting targets without being pushy, we’d love to meet you.



Role Overview

As a Sales Representative (Cold Calling), you’ll be the first voice many people hear. You’ll contact warm and/or cold leads, introduce clinic services, handle basic objections, and book qualified appointments or drive next steps (e.g., intake form completion, discovery call scheduling).



This is a pooling / talent pipeline role. Successful candidates may be matched to clinic openings based on:

 • Your sales experience (healthcare preferred but not required)

 • Your preferred shift coverage (AU/UK/US)

 • Tools you’ve used (CRM/dialers/SMS/email)

 • Compensation alignment and performance expectations



Important: This is healthcare-related outreach. We prioritize professionalism, consent-based communication, and privacy-safe handling of lead data.



What You’ll Do (Key Responsibilities)

 • Make outbound calls to leads (cold, warm, or reactivation lists, depending on clinic assignment).

 • Qualify prospects using a script and criteria (needs, location, readiness, eligibility, where applicable).

 • Clearly explain services and next steps in simple, human language (no hype, no pressure).

 • Book appointments or schedule a consult, and ensure the lead receives confirmations and instructions.

 • Follow up via SMS/email/CRM to reduce no-shows and improve conversion.

 • Handle objections professionally (price, hesitation, timing, trust) and escalate clinical questions appropriately.

 • Keep CRM records accurate: call outcomes, notes, tags, follow-up tasks, and dispositions.

 • Hit activity and outcome targets (calls/day, connects, qualified appointments, show rate).

 • Coordinate with patient support/ops teams for smooth handoffs and accurate scheduling.

 • Maintain compliance: respect do-not-contact rules (if provided), consent preferences, and confidentiality.

 • Participate in coaching, script optimization, and performance reviews.



Must-Have Qualifications

 • 2+ years experience in cold calling / outbound sales/appointment setting (B2C or B2B).

 • Strong spoken and written English with confident phone presence.

 • Comfortable following scripts while sounding natural and empathetic.

 • Resilient mindset: can handle rejection and stay consistent day-to-day.

 • Organized and metrics-driven (can work toward targets and track progress).

 • Strong attention to detail for CRM updates and follow-up scheduling accuracy.

 • Remote-ready: reliable attendance, self-management, and clear async communication.

 • Reliable home setup: quiet workspace, headset, stable internet, and backup plan.

 • Willingness to work shifts overlapping AU/UK/US/NZ depending on assignment.



Nice-to-Haves (Bonus Points)

 • Experience selling or booking for healthcare, telehealth, wellness, or subscription services.

 • Experience with consultative selling (needs-based approach vs hard selling).

 • Familiarity with CRMs (HubSpot, Salesforce, GoHighLevel, Zoho) and dialers (Aircall, RingCentral, Dialpad).

 • SMS/email follow-up experience (Twilio, Podium, Klaviyo, Mailchimp, etc.).

 • Strong objection handling and ability to improve scripts through feedback.

 • Experience with compliance-minded outreach (opt-outs, consent language, data privacy).



Tools/Systems Familiarity (Examples)

 • CRM: HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, GoHighLevel

 • Dialer/VoIP: RingCentral, Dialpad, Aircall, CloudTalk

 • SMS/Email: Podium, Twilio, Gmail/Outlook

 • Productivity: Google Workspace, Slack, Notion/Trello/Asana

 • Reporting: Google Sheets



Work Setup & Scheduling (PH-based)

 • Location: Philippines (remote)

 • Shift options: Vary by clinic assignment

 • AU/NZ-friendly (PH day shift)

 • UK-friendly (PH late afternoon/evening)

 • US-friendly (PH night shift)

 • Preference for candidates who can commit to consistent overlap windows and provide clean handoffs.



Compensation (General Guidance)

 • Starts at USD 10/hour

 • Many clinic assignments include performance incentives, such as:

 • bonus per qualified appointment booked

 • bonus per attended appointment (show rate)

 • monthly performance bonus for hitting targets

Details vary by clinic and will be confirmed during matching.



How to Apply (Required)

Please submit:

 1. CV / Resume

 2. A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) covering:

 • Your cold calling/sales background (industry + results)

 • Your best achievement (e.g., appointments booked/week, conversion rate, revenue)

 • Tools you’ve used (CRM/dialer/SMS/email)

 • Your preferred shift overlap (AU/UK/US)

 • A short example of how you handle a tough objection politely



Important: Applications missing the required CV + video may not be considered.



Our Screening Process (What to Expect)

 • Initial screen (English + sales experience + remote readiness)

 • Practical task: short role-play + CRM note sample + follow-up message draft

 • Structured interview: scenarios on objection handling, ethics, and performance consistency



Join the Pool

If you’re persuasive without being pushy, love the rhythm of outbound calls, and want to help more people access care, we’d love to hear from you.

title: IG Marketing role for experienced professional
description:
BALI HOPE ULTRA

Instagram Content VA

Remote  ·  Part-time (approx. 20 hrs/week)  ·

Applications reviewed on a rolling basis

Hours Approx. 20 hrs/week — flexible scheduling, async-friendly

Rate] USD $5–$8/hr depending on experience (open to negotiation for exceptional candidates)

Contract 1-month initial contract, renewable based on performance

Start date

As soon as possible — campaign is live

Tools used Canva, Google Drive, WhatsApp, AirTable

Reports to Founder of Bali Hope 



ABOUT THE ROLE

Bali Hope Ultra is an overnight 80km ultra marathon through Bali, run in aid of the Bali Children Foundation. Every runner fundraises a minimum of USD $2,000 for children’s education — then spends a week in Bali training, running, and visiting the families they’ve supported.

We have a 63-piece Instagram content strategy — fully written, structured, and ready to execute. What we need is someone to bring it to life: turning strategy documents into published posts, managing the content calendar, building the visuals, and tracking what’s working.

This is not a creative strategy role. The strategy is done. 

This is an execution role for someone who is organised, consistent, and takes pride in getting things right.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



CONTENT PRODUCTION

 • Adapt written content briefs into polished Instagram captions (copy and content is provided — you format, trim, and optimise for platform)

 • Design accompanying visuals using Canva templates (templates provided — you populate and adapt)

 • Create Reels & Storyies using provided footage, quotes, and on-screen text direction from briefs

 • Ensure all posts follow the brief: correct hooks, CTAs, hashtags, and metric goals



SCHEDULING & PUBLISHING

 • Schedule all 30 posts across the campaign calendar (Mar 6 – May 3) using Airtable

 • Maintain the content calendar in Google Sheets — tracking status, publish dates, and results

 • Flag any content that needs clarification before scheduling

 • Monitor publish times and confirm posts go live correctly



COMMUNITY MANAGEMENT

 • Respond to comments on all posts within 24 hours (reply templates and tone guide provided)

 • Flag warm leads and high-intent DMs to the campaign manager daily

 • Tag and log all inbound enquiries in the tracking sheet



REPORTING

 • Pull weekly performance data from Instagram Insights: saves, comments, DMs, profile visits, Calendly clicks

 • Complete a simple weekly report template (provided) comparing actuals vs. targets

 • Surface any posts that significantly over- or underperform so we can respond quickly





WHAT YOU NEED

Essential

 • 2+ years managing Instagram accounts professionally (brand, event, nonprofit, or agency)

 • Confident using Canva to produce clean, on-brand graphics from templates

 • Experience using a scheduling tool (Later, Buffer, Hootsuite, or similar)

 • Strong written English — you’ll be working directly with caption copy and must be able to spot errors and improve readability

 • Organised and self-directed — able to manage a rolling 30-post calendar without needing daily reminders

 • Reliable internet connection and equipment capable of video editing (basic Reels, not production-level)

 • Comfortable working asynchronously across time zones

Highly Desirable

 • Experience working with an event, charity, endurance sport, or cause-driven brand

 • Familiarity with Instagram’s DM automation tools (ManyChat or similar) for keyword-trigger workflows

 • Basic video editing in CapCut, InShot, or Reels native editor

 • Experience pulling and interpreting Instagram Insights data

 • Previous work on a fundraising or awareness campaign

Not Required

You do not need to be a runner, have personal experience with ultra marathons, or have a background in charity work. The content strategy and copy are fully written. You just need to be exceptional at executing it.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



THE RIGHT PERSON FOR THIS ROLE

Gets satisfaction from a calendar that’s fully scheduled, a DM inbox that’s been actioned, and a report that tells a clear story.

Treats a content brief like a brief — follows it precisely, asks smart questions when something is unclear, doesn’t freelance the strategy.

Communicates proactively: flags problems early, confirms key actions, doesn’t go quiet.

Cares about quality: notices when a caption has a typo, when a visual is slightly off-brand, when a CTA is missing.

Takes ownership of their piece of the campaign — you’re not waiting to be told what to do next.



We work with a small, remote team across multiple time zones. Async communication is the norm. You should be comfortable with that, and your work output should be reliable without requiring regular supervision.

WHAT WE OFFER



 • Fully documented strategy: 63 written content briefs, Canva templates, a caption guide, a reply template library, and a reporting template. You won’t be starting from scratch.

 • Flexible hours: as long as posts go live on schedule and DMs are actioned within 24 hours, you can work when it suits you.

 • Clear scope: this is a 1-month campaign March 15 - April 15 . Extensions possible for future campaigns.

 • Competitive rate for the Philippines market, with on-time payment via Wise 

 • Potential for ongoing engagement across future Bali Hope Ultra campaigns (the event runs twice annually).



HOW TO APPLY



 • A brief introduction (3–5 sentences): who you are, what you’ve worked on, and why this role is a fit.

 • 2–3 Instagram accounts you’ve managed professionally — include the handle and your role (post creator, scheduler, community manager, etc.).

 • One example of a campaign or content series you’re proud of. What was the goal, what did you do, and what happened?

 • Your available hours per week and your preferred working hours (in Philippine Standard Time).

 • Your rate expectation (USD per hour).



Selection process

Shortlisted candidates will be given a short practical task (approx. 45–60 minutes): adapting one content brief into a scheduled post, including the visual, caption, and scheduling confirmation. We’ll pay for your time. Interviews are by Zoom.

We review applications on a rolling basis and will close the role as soon as we find the right person. Apply early.



Bali Hope Ultra  ·

title: HIRING! Google Media Buyer (High-budget eCommerce experience only)
description:
This is NOT an entry-level role.

We are only considering experienced eCommerce performance marketers who have managed large product catalogs and high monthly ad spend.





Help scale brands. Own performance. Drive real revenue.

GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company where great ideas don’t sit in slides — they turn into real, measurable growth. We build and scale online brands across international markets, and our tea
mbers take real ownership, grow fast, and help shape the future of the company.



We’re now looking for a performance-driven Google Ads Media Buyer to help take our main revenue channel to the next level.





Please Do NOT Apply If:

- You have never managed $300K+ per month in Google Ads spend

- You have not handled Google Shopping for 10,000+ SKUs

- Your experience is mostly lead gen or small-budget accounts

- You rely on basic campaign setups without deep feed optimization

- You are not comfortable being accountable for revenue performance



We respect your time — and ours.





Why This Role Is Critical

This role plays a meaningful part in the growth of the company.



As a Google Ads Media Buyer, you’ll directly contribute to improving the performance of our Google Ads channel, which drives around 90% of our total revenue, while developing your skills in a performance-driven environment. You’ll help elevate our campaign structure, strategy, and overall account performance, ensuring our ad spend translates into scalable and profitable growth.



This role is ideal for someone who wants to fully own the performance of an account, build systems that improve efficiency, and drive measurable business impact.



What You’ll Own 7 Build

In this role, you’ll be trusted with real responsibility from day one. Your success will be measured in your first 90 days based on the following metrics:

- Developing and implementing a new or improved Google Ads strategy

- Restructuring and optimizing Google Shopping and PMAX campaigns for better scalability and efficiency

- Driving measurable performance improvements that result in a 20%+ increase in revenue from Google Ads

- Taking full ownership of Google Ads accounts, including campaign structure, bidding strategy, and feed optimization

- Building automation systems, scripts, or workflows that improve campaign efficiency and reduce manual work

- Using data insights to continuously refine bidding strategies, segmentation, and feed performance



What We’re Looking For

We’re excited to work with someone who:

- Has 3+ years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads for eCommerce

- Has direct experience managing large Google Shopping accounts (10,000+ products)

- Has personally managed Google Ads accounts end-to-end, including strategy, optimization, and performance analysis

- Has experience handling high-budget campaigns ($300K+ monthly ad spend)

- Is comfortable owning and managing accounts independently (excluding creative production)

- Has experience building or implementing automations (scripts, feed rules, automation workflows, or similar tools)

- Has strong expertise in Google Ads, Google Merchant Center, and Google Analytics

- Ideally has experience with Google CSS Labelizer

- Thinks analytically, enjoys testing and optimizing campaigns, and is comfortable being accountable for revenue impact



Only apply if you meet the above requirements. We’re building a high-performance team, and this role requires proven experience with large-scale eCommerce campaigns.



Hiring Process

Shortlisted candidates will complete a 19-minute Google Ads knowledge assessment to validate hands-on expertise before moving to the HR interview.



Ready to Make an Impact?

If you’re someone who loves ownership, thrives on measurable results, and wants your work to matter, we want to hear from you.

title: Accounting Onboarding Specialist
description:
Accountally is a tech-forward, full-service financial partner that helps businesses take control of their finances and scale with confidence. Our expert team of bookkeepers doesn’t just keep books in order — we help businesses build efficient financial systems that support smarter decision-making and sustainable growth. We’re passionate about precision, powered by innovation, and committed to our clients’ success because when they grow, we grow.



Check out our website: 
/



About the role:

As an Accounting Onboarding Specialist at Accountally, you’ll play a key role in creating a smooth and successful start for every new client. You’ll be the main point of contact during the onboarding process, guiding clients through the documents, tools, and steps needed to get their accounting systems fully set up.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working directly with clients, is highly organized, and has a strong understanding of bookkeeping processes and accounting systems. You’ll help migrate financial data, structure accounting systems properly, and ensure each client is ready for ongoing bookkeeping support. Strong communication and project management skills are essential, as you’ll be handling multiple onboarding projects and addressing client questions or concerns along the way.



What You’ll Do:



*Client Onboarding & Setup

- Set up new clients in our bookkeeping systems, such as QuickBooks Online, and ensure all necessary software and integrations are properly configured

- Guide clients through onboarding requirements and collect necessary financial documents



*Data Migration & Cleanup

- Handle historical data migration from previous accounting systems

- Perform initial reconciliations and cleanup of historical bookkeeping data to ensure accurate records



*Client Communication & Support

- Maintain clear, proactive communication with clients throughout the onboarding process to address questions and provide updates

- Ensure clients understand the onboarding steps and timelines



*Cross-Team Collaboration

- Work closely with account managers and bookkeepers to ensure a smooth transition into ongoing bookkeeping services



*Process Improvement

- Identify and implement improvements to the onboarding process and documentation to make workflows more efficient



Who We’re Looking For:

- Experience with QuickBooks Online and other accounting systems

- Background in bookkeeping, accounting, or financial operations

- Preferred experience with CRMs and ERP systems

- Strong communication and organizational skills

- Experience working with project management tools like 

- Tech-savvy with an analytical mindset and the ability to troubleshoot system or data issues

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, remote-first environment



Requirements:

- Experience in client onboarding or similar roles

- Proven experience managing and communicating with clients in a professional setting

- Professional work setup — a quiet and distraction-free workspace

- Headset for client calls and meetings

- Up-to-date laptop or desktop computer with at least 16 GB of RAM, must be able to handle video calls while apps/software are running

- Stable high-speed internet connection, with contingency plans (Plan A, B, and C) in place for power or internet outages

- Ability to work during Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours



What we offer:

- Competitive pay - $13/hour (USD)

- Paid time off and paid holidays to support work-life balance

- Monthly medical bonus to help cover healthcare expenses

- Fully remote

- Supportive, fast-growing team with real opportunities for growth and development



Please Note:

This is an independent contractor position, meaning you are responsible for managing and filing your own taxes, no government-provided benefits are included, and you must provide your own equipment as outlined above.



Ready to Join Us?

If you're passionate about client experience, know your way around accounting systems, and love making operations run smoother, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Senior Digital Marketing Specialist (HubSpot-Focused)
description:
About the Role

Automotive Parts Solutions (APS) is looking for an experienced Senior Digital Marketing Specialist with strong expertise in HubSpot Marketing Hub. This position is ideal for someone who understands full-funnel digital marketing strategy, execution, automation, and analytics.



You will be responsible for building complete marketing funnels, launching multi-channel campaigns, producing digital content, and using HubSpot to manage and optimize all marketing operations. This role requires a marketer who can make decisions based on data, create compelling content, and improve performance across platforms.



Key Responsibilities



Full-Funnel Digital Marketing

Develop and execute digital marketing strategies that strengthen the APS brand and deliver measurable results.

Plan and manage campaigns across social media,
, HubSpot, and other digital channels.

HubSpot Management

Run and optimize marketing campaigns inside HubSpot Marketing Hub.

Build workflows, set up segmentation, and manage lead nurturing and automation.

Create, monitor, and refine full marketing funnels and sales pipelines.

Use HubSpot analytics to evaluate performance and recommend improvements.

Content Creation and Execution

Create marketing assets including graphics, short-form videos, product promos, and branded visuals.

Manage social media content calendars and community engagement.

Data Analysis and Strategy

Analyze campaign metrics and provide clear insights and recommendations.

Work with leadership to propose new strategies and refine messaging based on performance data.

Optimize targeting, messaging, and funnel performance to improve engagement and conversions.



Qualifications



We are looking for someone who brings both strategic and hands-on marketing skills:

Required Skills and Experience

Strong experience with HubSpot Marketing Hub (automation, segmentation, analytics, workflows).

Proven background in digital marketing strategy and campaign management.

Ability to create graphics, branded content, and short videos.

Strong analytical skills with experience interpreting and presenting data.

Excellent communication skills and the ability to manage tasks independently in a remote setup.



Preferred

Experience building complete marketing funnels from scratch.

Ability to balance creativity with data-driven decision making.



Why Join APS?



Fully remote work setup

Opportunity to influence the direction of the brand

Fast-growing automotive business with room for long-term growth

Creative and strategic role with ownership over digital marketing operations

title: Marketing & Social Media Manager
description:
? Marketing & Social Media Manager ?



Help Us Grow Our Brand, Strengthen Community Awareness, and Support Local Wellness



About Sole Renewal Footcare & Wellness



Sole Renewal Footcare & Wellness is a trusted, community focused nurse-led footcare clinic based in Oshawa, Ontario, Canada. We provide advanced, compassionate footcare services to clients of all ages—both in our clinic and across local private homes, retirement and long term care communities.



We are known for warm, professional care, high clinical standards, and strong relationships with families, facilities, and community partners. We are now seeking a remote Marketing & Social Media Manager to help us elevate our brand, expand our community reach, and support our digital and print marketing efforts.

________________________________________

title: Project & Operations Lead
description:
Project & Operations Lead 

 

*** Please include your resume with the number 1900 as the subject header, along with outlining your relevant experience and qualifications to be considered for an interview. *** 

 



We’re looking for a highly organized, proactive, and strategic Project & Operations Lead to join our team. If you excel at bringing structure to complexity, driving successful project outcomes, and ensuring smooth daily operations, this role is for you. 



 



About the Role 



As the Project & Operations Lead, you’ll be responsible for overseeing both project execution and organizational operations. You’ll collaborate closely with leadership, internal teams, clients, and partners to deliver high-impact results, streamline processes, and support the company’s strategic growth. 



This role requires a strong balance of planning + execution, leadership + collaboration, and strategy + hands-on action. 



 

Key Responsibilities 



A. Project Management 



-Planning & Execution: Develop and implement detailed project plans—including timelines, budgets, resources, and quality standards. 

-Stakeholder Coordination: Work with teams, clients, and partners to clarify project goals and keep alignment throughout the project lifecycle. 

-Progress Monitoring: Track milestones, monitor performance, and ensure projects stay on schedule and on budget. 

-Risk & Issue Management: Identify risks early, develop mitigation plans, and address issues proactively. 

-Reporting & Documentation: Maintain clear project documentation and provide regular updates to stakeholders and leadership. 

-Post-Project Review: Conduct project evaluations to assess outcomes and identify improvements for future workflows. 



 



B. Operations Management 



-Daily Operations Oversight: Manage daily operational workflows and ensure seamless interdepartmental coordination. 

-Process Optimization: Analyze and refine processes for greater efficiency, scalability, and customer satisfaction. 

-Team Leadership: Support and coordinate with cross-functional teams, promoting accountability and performance. 

-Budget & Resource Management: Assist with cost control, financial planning, and resource allocation. 

-Compliance & Risk Management: Ensure compliance with policies, regulations, and organizational standards. 

-Vendor & Partner Coordination: Maintain productive relationships with vendors to support reliable operations. 

-Performance Measurement: Track operational metrics and generate insights to support strategic decision-making. 



 



What You Bring 



-Strong experience in project management, operations, or business execution 

-Ability to manage multiple initiatives simultaneously 

-Excellent communication, leadership, and problem-solving skills 

-A mindset focused on structure, process, and continuous improvement 

-Ability to work collaboratively with both internal teams and executives 



 



Why Join Us? 



-You’ll play a key role in shaping operational excellence and driving successful outcomes across the organization. This is a great opportunity for someone who thrives in fast-moving environments and enjoys bringing clarity, efficiency, and strategy to the table. 

 

*** Important: Please include 1900 in the subject line of your
 and outline your relevant experience and qualifications to be considered for an interview.***

title: E-commerce Supply Chain Coordinator / Specialist
description:
We are a fast-growing European e-commerce brand selling across Amazon EU, 
 and other marketplaces, supported by a main warehouse in the Netherlands and multiple external fulfillment networks (FBA & LVB).



We are looking for a structured and hands-on Supply Chain Coordinator / Specialist to own replenishment execution, shipment coordination, and inventory control.



This is NOT an admin role.

This is a planning, execution and control role.



Responsibilities:



• Plan and execute replenishment to FBA and LVB from our NL main warehouse

• Balance stock across external warehouses while protecting main warehouse levels

• Plan based on daily sales velocity, stock on hand, and incoming inventory

• Prioritize fast restocking of out-of-stock SKUs

• Create and manage FBA shipments in Seller Central (box & pallet)

• Coordinate shipments with our fulfillment partner and carriers

• Manage pallet bookings via Amazon Freight

• Support AGL container planning where relevant

• Maintain shipment tracking and PO planning in Airtable

• Allocate order line quantities across containers (manual allocation)

• Organize and upload shipping documents accurately

• Maintain clear inbound visibility at all times



Requirements:



• 2–4+ years experience with Amazon FBA operations

• Strong understanding of replenishment planning and inventory flow

• Experience with international freight and warehouse coordination

• Strong Airtable / spreadsheet skills

• High attention to detail and structured working style

• Proactive, ownership-driven mindset



Note: LVB is a Dutch fulfillment platform. Prior experience with LVB is not required, as we will train you.



We value structure, precision and accountability.



To apply, answer:



How do you d
 how much stock to send to FBA versus keeping at the main warehouse?



What metrics do you monitor daily and weekly for replenishment planning?



How do you handle an urgent out-of-stock SKU with inbound stock arriving soon?



Describe how you manage multiple shipments and keep visibility across containers.

title: Real Estate Setter
description:
Real Estate Setter 

(Hotel Investment Project – Zanzibar)

Position: Full-Time / Long-Term

Location: Remote

Company: International Hotel Real Estate Developer

Leads Provided – No Cold Prospecting Required



About Us

We are developing a premium hotel real estate investment project in Zanzibar. We attract investors from all over the world through digital marketing campaigns.

We are now looking for a highly experienced Real Estate Sales setter who can immediately follow up with inbound investor leads, qualify them, and set appointments for our senior sales team.

This is a long-term opportunity for a serious professional.



Your Role

- You will be responsible for:

- Calling new inbound leads immediately (ASAP follow-up is critical)

- Speaking with investors from the US, Europe, Middle East, and other regions

- Qualifying buyers based on budget, timeline, and investment goals

- Building trust and authority over the phone

- Setting qualified appointments for our senior sales closers

- Following up consistently via phone, WhatsApp, and

- Updating CRM with clear and structured notes

- Communicating clearly with our internal team



Requirements (DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DON’T MEET THESE)

- Minimum 5 years experience in Real Estate Sales or High-Ticket Sales

- Strong experience with phone-based selling & qualifying

- Fluent English with a clear American accent

- Proven experience setting qualified appointments

- Comfortable speaking with international investors

- Self-managed and independent worker

- Excellent communication and reporting skills

- Stable internet connection and professional home setup



Who We Are Looking For

We want someone who:

- Understands urgency in lead follow-up

- Knows how to control and guide a sales conversation

- Can identify serious buyers quickly

- Is confident, structured, and professional

- Is looking for a long-term role (not short-term freelancing)





Compensation

- Base salary (depending on experience)

- Performance bonuses based on qualified appointments

- Long-term growth opportunity within our real estate group





To Apply

Please send:

- A short introduction about yourself

- A voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself

- Your previous real estate or high-ticket sales experience

- The CRM systems you have worked with

- Your expected monthly salary



Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

Important: To confirm that you have read this entire job post carefully, please start your application message with the word:

“Zanzibar” Applications that do not start with these words will not be considered.

title: Part-Time Virtual Assistant – Hospitality Operations & Guest Communications
description:
Company Overview

Staffify is assisting a hospitality company that manages multiple short-term rental properties. Their mission is to deliver exceptional guest experiences while operating efficiently and profitably. This role works closely with the company’s leadership team and offers long-term growth as the company continues to scale.



Position Summary

We are seeking a highly organized and analytical Virtual Assistant (VA) to support guest communications and day-to-day operational tasks across a short-term rental portfolio.

This position will begin at approximately 5 hours per week, with workload and responsibility increasing as training progresses and performance is demonstrated.

This is an excellent opportunity for someone looking for a long-term role who is eager to learn hospitality systems, operational management, and marketing strategies related to guest retention.

Hours & Growth

• Starting commitment: approximately 5 hours per week

• Paid training provided

• Hours and responsibilities will increase as training is completed and performance is demonstrated

• Long-term opportunity for expanded operational and marketing responsibilities



Key Responsibilities

Guest Communication

• Manage guest communications before, during, and after stays

• Respond professionally and promptly to guest inquiries and issues

• Assist with handling guest claims and resolutions through booking platforms

Daily Operations & Task Management

• Assist with day-to-day operational tasks across multiple properties in coordination with leadership

• Track tasks, priorities, and deadlines across multiple properties

• Support project-based operational initiatives



Systems & Platform Management

• Use property management software for rental management and guest communications

• Maintain Excel / Google Sheets for project tracking and operational organization

Analytical & Problem-Solving Support

• Use an analytical approach to identify issues and recommend solutions

• Assist in improving workflows and guest experience processes

Marketing & Guest Retention (Training Provided)

• Learn how to build and manage campaigns for returning guests

• Support guest retention and follow-up communication strategies

Social Media Content Creation (As Role Expands)

• Assist with creating content for Instagram and TikTok

• Support basic content planning, posting, and engagement

• Help promote properties, guest experiences, and brand personality



Required Skills & Qualifications

• Strong multitasking and task management skills

• Excellent written English communication skills

• Fluent spoken English

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Analytical thinker with strong problem-solving abilities

• Comfortable working with leadership teams

• Proficient in Excel / Google Sheets

• Ability to learn new platforms and systems quickly

Preferred (Nice to Have)

• Experience in hospitality, short-term rentals, or guest communications

• Familiarity with Airbnb host tools and guest claims

• Experience with social media platforms such as Instagram or TikTok

title: Editor for YouTube Channel (TV/Movie Documentary)
description:
The opportunity: 



If you want to build a serious career with a professional channel, then let’s talk.



I’m a Canadian who’s been working in business for over eight years, with a background in consulting, sales, and operations. I built a book of business from the ground up, generating more than $1 million in value, so I understand the level of effort and resources it takes to succeed. 



Combining my unique knowledge of the niche, with my business acumen, I’m confident the results we’ll achieve.



Our YouTube channel is called ScreenPuff. We create high quality Netflix-style documentaries about the stories surrounding TV and film. This includes the successes, failures, production, casting, ideas, as well as actors, writers, and directors. As a cinephile myself, I’ve watched and studied countless shows and films for years, and have a passion for it. 





Are you the right fit…



We’re not looking for an average, run-of-the-mill employee who’s just in it for the money. We want someone who shares our passion for authentic, high-quality content. Someone with a creative eye and a strong drive to improve. I’m always there to support and help you grow, but I also like to give you space, so the more you can take ownership of the work and the process, the better. Revision and feedback are very specific and are done through Frame io. 



Bonus points if you have a strong knowledge or interest in TV / Movies. Just some of my favorites: South Park, Friends, Breaking Bad, Scarface, Fight Club, Forrest Gump, Titanic, Dark Knight, Wolf of Wall Street, Pulp Fiction (anything by Tarantino or Scorsese).  





The future… 



Our goal is to reach 100K subscribers within the first year. We’re looking for someone who wants to grow with the channel; someone ambitious, collaborative, and ready to take on more responsibility as we scale.



If you're driven, take ownership of your work, and see yourself thriving in a long-term role, there will be clear paths to progression, including the potential to move into roles like channel manager, depending on your interests and performance.



Expectation: 4 videos a month



Compensation: $10-$20 per finished minute.



Raises and promotions given based on quality and speed. 



If you’re excited by everything I’ve shared, make sure to apply. Every application gets reviewed.

title: HR Sourcing Associate (Project Based - WFH)
description:
Job Description

The Sourcing Associate is responsible for proactively identifying, attracting, and engaging top talent to build a strong candidate pipeline for current and future hiring needs. They collaborate closely with recruiters and hiring managers to support the company’s talent acquisition strategy.



Job Responsibilities

Candidate Sourcing:

Proactively source candidates using job boards, LinkedIn, social media, and other platforms.

Conduct targeted searches for hard-to-fill and specialized roles.

Utilize Boolean search strategies and other creative sourcing techniques.



Talent Pool Management:

Build and maintain a database of potential candidates for current and future hiring needs.

Organize talent pools by role type (Support, Mid-level, Specialized).

Track sourcing activity and candidate statuses in internal tools.



Initial Outreach:

Draft and send engaging outreach messages to potential candidates.

Conduct preliminary screening to verify candidate interest and availability.

Forward qualified profiles to recruiters for next steps.



Collaboration and Reporting:

Work closely with recruiters and the team lead to align sourcing efforts with hiring priorities.

Provide daily or weekly reports on sourcing activities, including candidate pipelines and outreach response rates.

Identify sourcing challenges and suggest solutions



Job Qualifications

At least 1 year of recruitment or sourcing experience, ideally in a fast-paced environment and offshore accounts.

Familiarity with Boolean searches, job boards, and ATS platforms.

Strong written communication skills for candidate outreach.

Organized, proactive, and detail-oriented.

Able to follow structured sourcing procedures and meet deadlines.

Proactive, adaptable, and goal-oriented — comfortable working independently but aligned with team goals.



Job Requirements

A home office set up that meets the following:

A working computer (minimum 8gb RAM), i5 Windows10 or BigSur for Mac

Stable internet connection (at least 5mbps download and upload)

HD webcam/camera

A quality headset with noise cancellation feature for meetings

A mobile phone that has the capacity to install the Microsoft Authentication app

Able to provide NBI Clearance (for PH applicants).



Compensation

Pay rate starts at Php 49,950.00 and may vary by experience and location.



Employment Terms

Project-based for 6 months — renewable depending on hiring needs and performance.

Work hours: Flexible but aligned with core team hours (1pm - 5pm Pacific time) to ensure collaboration. Not exceeding 40 hours per week.

Semi-monthly, with clear deliverables tied to their output (e.g., number of qualified candidates sourced weekly).

No regular employee benefits.

title: System Administrator I
description:
Job Description:

Join Intelligent Technical Solutions, a dynamic and growing company, as our System Administrator. We're looking for a collaborative problem-solver with excellent customer service skills and a detail-oriented mindset. In this role, you'll be pivotal in providing remote IT support, ensuring our clients receive top-notch technical assistance. You'll handle a range of tasks, from system updates to hands-on troubleshooting, playing a critical role in maintaining our high standards of IT service.



Job Responsibilities:

This role is expected to be able to resolve the following technical issues with little or no assistance:

Workstation operating system issues of any kind.

Printer issues of any kind.

Standard business application (Office, etc.) issues of any kind.

Line-of-business application issues for common applications (SAGE ERP, QuickBooks), and for more niche applications with vendor assistance.

Server issues of any kind.

Basic and intermediate networking issues.

Escalation point for technicians

Participate in an on-call rotation to provide after-hours and weekend support for onsite and remote operations.



Job Qualifications:

Experience with Windows and Mac OS troubleshooting.

Experience with Server 2012 to 2022.

Experience with VMWare and Hyper V Virtualization.

Experience supporting M365 and Azure.

Minimum of three to five years experience in IT Support or a similar role.

Basic knowledge of Firewalls, Switches, Network architecture, and troubleshooting.

Proficient in supporting MS Office, Adobe, Active Directory, backup software, endpoint cybersecurity, mobile devices, and various business applications.

Experience with Managed Service Providers (MSPs) is highly desirable.

Active Server Certifications are preferred.



Job KPIs:

First-touch closed: Each ticket that is completed with only one time entry contributes to this number

Utilization: The percentage of time that you are on the clock and billing time to client tickets

CSAT: Scores filled out by clients using the rating system in tickets



Job Requirements:

A home office set up that meets the following:

Computer: A working computer with a minimum of 8GB RAM and one of the following:

Windows 11 with an Intel i5 or i7 (8th generation or newer), or

AMD Ryzen 5 or 7 (2000 series or newer), or

macOS 12 or newer.

Internet: Stable internet connection with at least 5 Mbps download and upload speeds.

Audio Equipment: A quality headset with a noise-cancellation feature for meetings.

Mobile Device: A smartphone capable of installing the Microsoft Authenticator app.

Webcam: An HD webcam for video calls.

2nd Monitor 

UPS (Uninterruptible Power Supply) if using a desktop (Not needed if using a laptop)

A very strong cultural fit the ITS way (Our core values will be discussed during the interview) 

Excellent command of the English language both spoken and written 

Able to work full time 40 hrs. a week:  8:00 AM to 5:00 PM PST (Monday to Friday)

Able to pass our online behavior and cognitive assessments. 

Preferably, at least two of the following certifications: CompTIA A+, CompTIA Network+, CompTIA Security+, 3cx Basic Certified Engineer.

Able to provide NBI Clearance (for PH applicants).



Compensation:

Pay rate starts at Php 81,200.00 and may vary by experience and location.



Benefits:

Comprehensive Health Plans / HMO (Employee & Dependent/s)

Life Insurance

Flexible Benefit Reimbursement (Dental/Vision/Mental Health/Wellness/Government Contributions)

Paid Time Off (starts at 15 days per year)

Maternity/Paternity Leave

Paid US Holiday

Night Shift Bonus

Salary Advancement/Loan

Health & Wellness Program

Company-paid training and certification

title: Executive Business & Tech Coach (ICF Certified)
description:
*** Please include your resume with the number 2000 as the subject header, along with outlining your relevant experience and qualifications to be considered for an interview. ***  



About the Role  

 

We are hiring an Executive Business & Tech Coach to lead transformation and professional growth at PTOE Global Solutions, a fast-growing solutions company helping entrepreneurs and businesses run and scale with clarity, structure, and systems. 



This is not a traditional corporate coaching role. 



This is for a strategic mentor and technical veteran who wants to take ownership of leadership development and help scale a global, remote-first business by bridging the gap between technical complexity and business growth. 



You will work directly with the founder (Chief Stewardship Officer) to translate vision into high-performance leadership, technical roadmaps, and measurable human results. 



Core Mission 

Empower global leaders to master the intersection of business strategy and technology through world-class coaching. 





What You’ll Be Responsible  



For  Coaching & Transformation  

Deliver high-impact 1-on-1 and group coaching for founders and technical VPs. 



-Own the end-to-end coaching journey—from assessment to breakthrough results. 

-Ensure coaching objectives align with the client’s P&L and technical growth goals. 



Strategy & Frameworks   

Design and implement scalable coaching frameworks specifically for tech-driven businesses. 



-Build SOPs for leadership development, onboarding, and impact reporting. 

-Translate complex technical challenges into actionable business strategies for clients. 



Leadership Development  

Lead and mentor technical teams in transitioning from "doing" to "leading." 



-Establish KPIs for leadership performance and organizational health. 

-Foster a culture of accountability and continuous improvement within client organizations. 



Who You Are  

ICF Certified Coach (ACC, PCC, or MCC) with a proven track record. 



-5–10+ years in leadership roles within technology, SaaS, or engineering-heavy businesses. 

-Dual-brained: You understand software lifecycles as deeply as you understand business operations. 

-Strong systems thinker: You coach for long-term structural change, not just quick fixes. 

-Comfortable working and coaching in a fully remote, global environment. 



What Makes You a Great Fit

You take ownership, not just direction. 



-You are a practitioner first, theorist second (you have "battle scars" from the tech world). 

-You thrive in high-growth environments where speed meets precision. 

-You bring clarity where there is technical or operational complexity. 

-You want to build a legacy of transformed leaders, not just "clock hours." 



Location  

Fully remote (global) 



Compensation * Competitive (based on experience) 



Why Join 

Work directly with the founder on scaling a global company. 



-Take full ownership of the Business & Tech Coaching department. 

-Build frameworks that impact businesses and technical leaders worldwide. 



How to Apply Please apply with: 



-A short note on why this specific hybrid role (Business + Tech + ICF) fits you. 

-A brief example of a leadership or technical transformation you successfully coached. 

-Your location and expected compensation in local currency. 



 

*** Please include your resume with the number 2000 as the subject header, along with outlining your relevant experience and qualifications to be considered for an interview. ***

title: Senior Placement Intake Specialist (Phone-Based)
description:
We are hiring a Senior Placement Intake Specialist for GentlePlacement, our senior placement service based in Los Angeles (PST). Your main responsibility is to call warm home health leads and occasionally hospice leads, collect all necessary intake information, and prepare each case for placement.





YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:



Call incoming leads quickly (within minutes) and professionally



Collect full intake details:



Patient name/DOB



Medical conditions & mobility



ADLs and behavioral notes



Budget & location



Medicare number and insurance details



Timeline/urgency



Family contact information



Enter data into our intake sheet



Follow up with families as needed



Communicate clearly and compassionately



Work U.S. hours (at least partial overlap with PST)





REQUIREMENTS:



Neutral or American-sounding accent (non-negotiable)



Excellent English communication skills



Comfortable making outbound calls to seniors and families



Strong empathy and professionalism



Experience in home health, hospice, senior care, customer service, or medical intake (preferred)



Reliable internet and quiet workspace



Detail-oriented and organized





MANDATORY VOICE TEST (Do Not Apply Without This)



Please send a 20–30 second voice/video recording reading the script below:



“Hello, my name is ______. I’m calling from GentlePlacement. You recently requested information about Medicare-covered home health care in Los Angeles.?Our service is completely free; we simply help seniors connect with licensed home health agencies that accept their insurance. Please give me a call back. I look forward to helping you get started.”



Applicants who do not submit the voice recording will not be considered.

title: Remote Fan Engagement & Sales Assistant (Chat-Based Role)
description:
We are a rapidly growing digital creator marketing agency working with online creators and large fan communities across multiple platforms.



Our agency is expanding quickly, and we are looking for motivated chat specialists to join our team and help manage conversations with followers while building strong relationships within our creator communities.



This is a chat-focused role where communication, confidence, and the ability to guide conversations are extremely important.



You will be interacting with followers daily, keeping conversations engaging, and helping guide interested supporters toward premium content available on the platform.



We are building a team of high-performing chat professionals, and we are looking for people who want to develop strong communication and online sales skills while growing with our agency long-term.



This is not just a simple chat support job.

We are building a team of top performers, and we provide guidance and strategies to help our team become extremely effective at engagement and online sales.



If you are ambitious, competitive, and motivated to improve your skills, this role can grow into a long-term position with increasing responsibility and earnings.



Working Hours



8:00 AM – 4:00 PM (Philippines Time)

Monday – Saturday



Responsibilities



• Respond to incoming messages quickly and professionally

• Maintain engaging conversations with followers

• Build strong relationships with regular supporters

• Identify interested followers and guide conversations toward premiu
dia

• Follow communication guidelines and strategies provided by the agency

• Manage multiple conversations at once in a fast-paced environment

• Track conversations and activity when required



Requirements



• Strong written English

• Comfortable chatting with many people at once

• Confident communicator with a natural conversation style

• Sales mindset (persuasive and engaging)

• Reliable internet connection

• Previous chat support or sales experience is a plus



Compensation



• Hourly base pay – $3 per hour

• Performance bonus – starting at 3% of sales, with potential to increase to 5% for strong performers



High-performing tea
mbers can earn significantly more through performance bonuses and long-term growth within the agency.



We are looking for people who take pride in their work and want to become top performers in online communication and sales.

To Apply



Please answer the following questions:



- Do you have experience in chat-based customer support or sales?



- Do you understand western slang / kept up to date with the western world 



- How fast can you type and manage multiple conversations?



- Describe how you would turn a conversation into a sale.



- Are you comfortable working 8 AM – 4 PM PHT?



Please include the word BLUE in your application so we know you read the full job description.

title: Creative Designer (Brand, E-commerce & AI-Driven Design)
description:
About Us

X-Brands builds and scales brands through smart design, marketing, and innovation. We work with multiple clients to create distinct brand identities, high-performing e-commerce assets, and compelling visual systems.

We’re growing fast and looking for a Creative Designer who can think strategically about branding, execute clean designs, and confidently use modern tools (including AI) to bring ideas to life.





What You’ll Do



Create and evolve brand identities for multiple clients (logos, color systems, typography, visual language).

Design websites and landing pages from a UI/UX and visual design perspective (layout, hierarchy, components, and flows — no coding or development required).

Design Amazon A+ content and storefronts that are visually strong and conversion-focused.

Develop creative assets for ads, social media, and marketing campaigns across different brands.

Use AI tools (ChatGPT, image generators, design assistants) to ideate, iterate, and accelerate creative output—while maintaining quality and originality.

Design packaging and product visuals that stand out both online and on shelves.

(Bonus) Support photo editing, retouching, or light motion/animation when needed.





What We’re Looking For

Strong Amazon design experience (A+ content, storefronts, e-commerce visuals).

Proven ability to create brand identities, not just individual assets.

Comfortable working across multiple brands and clients with different aesthetics.

Confident using AI/ChatGPT in your creative workflow and able to explain how you use it.

A strong portfolio showing branding, e-commerce, advertising, or packaging work.

Proficiency in Photoshop, Illustrator, and other design tools you rely on.

Detail-oriented, fast, collaborative, and able to handle feedback well.

(Nice to have) Photo editing, motion design, or short-form video experience.





The Process



Submit your portfolio (required).

Shortlisted candidates will complete a short creative test:

Amazon design task

Brand/AI-assisted creative exercise





Why Join Us



Shape multiple brands from the ground up.

Work in an environment that values creative thinking and experimentation.

Use creativity + AI to produce work that actually performs.

See your designs make a real, measurable impact across brands.

title: Medical Coder
description:
DESCRIPTION:

 

1. Medical Coding: Translating medical diagnoses, procedures, and treatments into standardized alphanumeric codes using coding systems like ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS.

2. Insurance Claims: Ensuring that codes are correctly assigned for insurance claims processing and compliance with payer policies.

3. Chart Review: Reviewing patient medical records to verify the accuracy and completeness of documentation.

4. Collaboration: Working closely with healthcare providers to clarify diagnoses or treatments when necessary.

5. Compliance: Adhering to government regulations and coding guidelines to maintain accuracy and integrity.

6. Data Management: Maintaining and updating patient records for long-term tracking and analysis.

7. Confidentiality: Handling sensitive patient information with strict confidentiality protocols.



QUALIFICATIONS:

- An AAPC Licensed holder (CPC, CPC-A, CIC, COC, etc.) or an AHIMA certified

- Medical coding experience is an advantage, may consider non-experienced applicants with license

- Equipment ready (Windows-based dual monitor set-up, noise cancellation headphones and with at least 100mbps internet connection.

- Can work in night shift (EST)

- Willing to undergo training



OUR OFFER:

- Up to $1000.00 service fee (salary)

- HMO and Leave credits

- Paid US Federal Holidays

- Annual increase and year-end bonus

- Permanent Work from Home

- Fixed Week End Off

- Provide training (paid)

title: Creative Assistant
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a versatile Creative Assistant to support our Custom Learning and broader creative initiatives.

While PowerPoint design will be a core responsibility, this role extends beyond presentations. You will contribute across multiple formats, including learning materials, digital assets, web-related visuals, and branded content.

This is a functional, systems-oriented design role — not a trend-driven marketing position. We prioritize clarity, structure, usability, and brand consistency.

You will work closely with the Manager of Brand + Design as well as our Learning & Development team of instructional designers, acting as a reliable extension of the team.

 

 

Key Responsibilities

Custom Learning & Presentation Design

Build advanced PowerPoint templates and slide systems

Design structured learning materials and course assets

Translate written content into clear, visually organized layouts

Ensure materials are scalable and easy for non-designers to edit

Maintain strict brand consistency

 

Digital & Creative Production

Design assets such as:

Prepare files for delivery across digital platforms

Resize, version, and adapt creative across formats

Maintain organized files and clean layer structures

 

Creative QA & Review Support

Review creative output (web, video, motion, learning modules)

Provide detailed feedback on alignment, spacing, typography, layout, and brand consistency

Identify small inconsistencies or errors others may overlook

 

Qualifications

Required Qualifications

Advanced PowerPoint expertise (template systems, master slides, structured layouts)

Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign)

Strong understanding of layout, hierarchy, and typography

Experience designing within brand guidelines

Experience working with corporate or L&D teams

Exceptional attention to detail

Ability to execute independently with minimal oversight

A supporting design portfolio

 

Adaptability

Comfortable learning and using new tools and platforms as needed

Quick to adopt new workflows, software, or internal systems

Open to evolving processes and continuous improvement

 

Communication

Fluent, professional English (written and verbal)

Strong written communication skills

Ability to understand project context quickly without extensive explanation

Comfortable working asynchronously

 

Preferred Qualifications

Experience working across multiple platforms and quickly adjusting to new client environments

Experience with instructional design or eLearning environments

Familiarity with Articulate Storyline, 360Learning, or similar tools

Figma proficiency

Basic understanding of UX/UI principles

Experience working with U.S.-based teams

 

What We Value

Structured thinker

Process-oriented

Reliable and responsive

Low ego, high ownership. Takes feedback well. Collaborative.

Design maturity over trend-driven aesthetics

Comfortable with both creative work and production-heavy tasks

title: Car Rental Booking Agent  (Inside Sales including Comm)

title: Claims Specialist (E-Commerce)
description:
Claims Specialist (E-Commerce) – Detail-Oriented & Analytical



We are an established e-commerce company selling products across multiple online platforms and are looking to hire an experienced Claims Specialist to join our team. This role is ideal for someone who is highly detail-oriented, organized, and experienced in creating and managing claims with online marketplaces and shipping carriers.



The primary responsibility of this role is identifying financial discrepancies, gathering supporting documentation, and creating detailed claims to recover lost revenue from damaged shipments, lost inventory, reimbursement errors, and related issues.



The ideal candidate has previous hands-on experience handling claims, understands how to build strong cases with supporting evidence, and can maximize successful reimbursements through thorough documentation and follow-through.



Key Responsibilities

 • Identify reimbursement opportunities and discrepancies across platforms

 • Prepare and submit detailed claims with supporting documentation

 • Track claims and follow up until resolution

 • Maintain organized records of submitted claims and outcomes

 • Analyze reports to uncover additional claim opportunities



Requirements

 • Proven experience creating and managing claims

 • Exceptional attention to detail

 • Strong analytical and documentation skills

 • Ability to gather and present supporting evidence effectively

 • Organized and able to manage multiple claims simultaneously



Job Info:

9am to 6pm EST, with a one-hour break in the middle

Monday through Friday



Compensation:

Pay $750-$1,000 USD monthly. Paid bi-monthly via PayPal

Base salary with opportunity for additional commission based on successful claim recoveries and hyper-detailed claim submissions.
