title: Sales Representative/ Account Manager
description:
NOTE: This is a direct hiring.

PLEASE APPLY HERE: 



Are you a relationship-driven professional who thrives on helping clients achieve measurable results? Do you take ownership of your work and consistently look for ways to deliver more value?



If so, this Account Manager role at 
 might be the perfect next step for you.



At 
, we build and augment sales teams for companies that want to scale. For this position, we’re supporting a client in the branded promotional products space — a trusted provider of high-quality merchandise solutions for businesses and events.



As a Sales Representative, you’ll use outbound calls and
s to build a pipeline of new clients. Additionally, you’ll consistently follow up on existing clients to encourage and secure reorders.



As an Account Manager, you’ll be the primary point of contact for assigned clients — ensuring seamless execution of campaigns, nurturing long-term relationships, and driving continued growth through exceptional service and strategic support.



Responsibilities

• Engage in consistent outbound activity — including dialing,
 outreach, prospecting, and follow-up — to build and maintain a strong pipeline.

• Conduct live, video-based sales calls and product presentations with professionalism and confidence.

• Manage and grow assigned client accounts by maintaining consistent outreach, understanding evolving needs, and recommending suitable product or campaign solutions.

• Collaborate with internal stakeholders and different departments to ensure smooth client and project execution.

• Track client activities, order statuses, and follow-ups using CRM tools and reports.

• Negotiate terms and agreements, closing deals that deliver exceptional client value.



Who We’re Looking For

• Experienced sales professional with solid closing experience, comfortable managing client relationships and ensuring their needs align with the right products.

• Proactive, organized, and relationship-focused.

• Strong outbound habits — comfortable dialing, prospecting, and consistently following up to generate opportunities.

• Target-oriented and motivated to hit — and exceed — monthly goals.

• Comfortable managing multiple client accounts and handling day-to-day communication.

• Strong listener who can identify client needs and align them with creative, strategic solutions.

• Thrives in a fast-paced environment with a mix of independent and collaborative work.

• Confident communicator with a service-first mindset and a drive to exceed expectations.



Skills and Qualifications

• Minimum 3–5 years of meaningful sales closing experience, ideally through live video calls.

• Demonstrated outbound experience, including dialing, prospecting, and follow-up cadence.

• Experience in account management, client success, or B2B relationship management.

• Prior experience with promotional products, marketing campaigns, or branded merchandise is highly preferred.

• Strong written and verbal English communication skills.

• Experience working remotely with US-based clients.

• Proficient in CRM platforms (HubSpot preferred) and project tracking tools.

• Detail-oriented, with excellent follow-up and organizational habits.



Compensation

Hourly Rate: $10–14 USD/hour based on experience.

Bonus Potential: Up to $1,000/month based on account retention, upsells, and client satisfaction metrics.

title: Complete Amazon VA
description:
We’re looking for a skilled Amazon Brand Manager to build, grow, and optimize the Bitcoin Ranch Amazon Brand Store. This role combines creative product setup, sales analysis, and paid advertising management.

About the Brand

Bitcoin Ranch is a Western lifestyle brand where country meets crypto. It has a distinct aesthetic (dark backgrounds, bold Western graphics, Bitcoin orange accents) and a portfolio of sub-brands: Bullieve, ?elieve, Ain’t No, Robots Can’t, and Keep on Stackin. Each sub-brand has its own voice and audience.

What You’ll Be Doing

Build

 ? Creating print-ready t-shirt designs on Printful and Printify using our logos and brand brief

 ? Setting up product listings with all variants (sizes, colors)

 ? Syncing products to Amazon and building the Brand Store with each sub-brand as its own section

 ? Writing listing copy (titles, bullet points, descriptions) matched to each sub-brand’s voice

Grow

 ? Managing Amazon Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display campaigns

 ? Keyword research, bid optimization, and ACOS management

 ? Driving external traffic to the store via social or other paid channels if applicable

Analyze

 ? Monthly sales reporting — what’s selling, what’s not, and why

 ? Identifying top performers by sub-brand and product type

 ? Making data-driven recommendations on new designs, pricing, and ad spend

What We’re Looking For

 ? Proven experience with Printful AND Printify — product setup and Amazon sync

 ? Amazon Brand Store builder experience — full store architecture, not just listings

 ? Hands-on Amazon PPC management with measurable results (share ACOS numbers)

 ? Canva or Adobe skills for graphic creation and mockups

 ? Analytical mindset — comfortable in Seller Central reports and spreadsheets

 ? Creative enough to interpret a brand brief and produce original concepts

 ? This is not generic POD work — brand awareness matters

What You’ll Have Access To

 ? All logo files (Bull ?, Rocking ?, Bitcoin Ranch wordmark)

 ? Full brand brief with color codes, typography direction, and sub-brand breakdowns

 ? Amazon Brand Registry, Seller Central, Printful, and Printify account access

 ? Direct feedback and approval on all designs before publishing

To Apply

Share examples of Amazon Brand Stores you’ve built, PPC campaigns you’ve managed (include ACOS results), and any print-on-demand portfolio work. Bonus points if you include a mockup concept based on the brand description above.

title: Meta Ads Execution Specialist (Part-Time)
description:
About Us



How To Apply



Please reply to this job post with the following:

1. A brief summary of your Meta Ads experience, including typical monthly budgets.

2. Screenshots or summaries of 2 to 3 campaigns you have managed (goal, budget, structure, and results).

3. One paragraph on how you normally set up tracking (pixel, events, CAPI) for a lead gen funnel.

4. Your part-time hourly rate and full-time monthly rate, respectively.



We’re a programming education company that helps experienced software engineers build real-world Rust projects and land Rust roles. We run a high-ticket, cohort-based accelerator plus self-paced training, and reach engineers through YouTube,
, and partnerships.



Role Overview

We are looking for a part-time Meta Ads Operator to implement and maintain our
 and Instagram campaigns. This is an execution-focused role: you will take clear targeting and creative direction from the founder and marketing team, then handle setup, tracking, and ongoing optimizations inside Meta Ads Manager.



Ideal for someone who enjoys clean accounts, accurate tracking, and making data-driven tweaks, not sitting in branding meetings.



Key Responsibilities

1. Implement and maintain Meta Pixel and Conversion API across our funnels (waitlist, applications, bookings, purchases).

2. Set up campaigns, ad sets, and ads according to provided specs (objectives, budgets, audiences, and creatives).

3. Create and manage custom and lookalike audiences from our traffic,
 list, and engaged users.

4. Monitor performance daily on weekdays and execute simple rules: pause obvious losers, keep winners within defined guardrails, and flag issues quickly.

5. Run basic A/B tests on creatives and audiences following our testing framework.

6. Ensure tracking events fire correctly on all key steps and troubleshoot when they do not.

7. Produce a concise weekly report (spend, cost per waitlist opt-in, cost per application, cost per call, cost per student) with 2 to 3 clear recommendations.



You Are A Good Fit If

1. You have 1 to 3 years of hands-on experience running Meta Ads (lead gen or info/education experience is a plus).

2. You are comfortable with Meta Ads Manager, Pixel, standard events, and basic CAPI.

3. You can read numbers and make simple performance-based decisions without drama.

4. You are organized, responsive, and document what you do so others can follow it.

5. You can overlap at least 2 to 3 hours per day with US time zones.

6. You’re currently freelancing or working part time and want a long term core client, not just a one-off project.



This Role Is Not

1. Not a creative director or copywriter (we have a content and
 team).

2. Not a CMO or growth strategist d
 offers, funnels, or pricing.

3. Not a general social media manager (no organic posting, community management, or influencer work).



Scope & Engagement

1. Part-time contractor.

2. We’ll start at 5–10 hours/week for the first 60–90 days while we validate and scale Meta.

3. We guarantee a minimum of 20 hours/month, paid monthly, so your time is predictable.

4. If performance is strong and we scale ad spend, this role can grow into 15–20+ hours/week and potentially a full-time PH position.

5. Remote, flexible schedule as long as SLAs are met and campaigns are monitored on weekdays.



How To Apply



Please reply to this job post with the following:

1. A brief summary of your Meta Ads experience, including typical monthly budgets.

2. Screenshots or summaries of 2 to 3 campaigns you have managed (goal, budget, structure, and results).

3. One paragraph on how you normally set up tracking (pixel, events, CAPI) for a lead gen funnel.

4. Your part-time hourly rate and full-time monthly rate, respectively.

title: Product Operations Manager (Post-Purchase & Documentation)
description:
PS: Google Docs version (same content, easier to read): 

----------------------



PRODUCT OPERATIONS MANAGER (POST-PURCHASE & DOCUMENTATION)

Own install success, documentation, and SKU health (Green/Yellow/Red)



ABOUT MERGE SCREENS????

At Merge Screens, we help truck owners upgrade their driving experience with Tesla?style screens and advanced infotainment systems. Our products are highly technical, installed by real people in real driveways and shops. When installation goes well, customers love us. When it doesn’t, returns and support explode.



We’re looking for a Product Manager who will own that gap.



ROLE OVERVIEW???????????

Your north star:

"You own post-purchase product success after launch. Your job is to turn every SKU into a low?return, low?support, high?review product we can confidently market and scale."



This is not a “feature roadmap” PM role. It’s a hands?dirty, post?purchase, fix?what’s?broken role. You’ll live between our customers, our support team, and our manufacturers to make sure our products actually work in the real world and are safe to scale.



products actually work in the real world and are safe to scale.

This is documentation-heavy. Expect 70–90% of your output to be installation + troubleshooting content and product-page truth alignment across SKUs.



You ensure alignment between product page claims ? what’s in the box ? manufacturer specs ? install steps ? troubleshooting flows.



Most problems you’ll solve are mismatches, missing steps/assets, or unclear expectations — not “new features.”





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES????

1) Fix & standardise documentation + product truth (execution-first | first 30 days)

• Add “What’s in the box” page to every installation guide

• Align product pages with shipped accessories (example: dashcam mismatch)

• Build a manufacturer truth table (amp support, harness differences, etc.)

• Fix key SKU instruction gaps (missing videos/steps)

• Standardize required product page assets (back-of-screen photos)

Output: shipped doc/page updates every week. No “research-only” weeks.



2) Run the post-purchase improvement loop (reduce support + returns)

• Use support tickets/calls + WhatsApp tech groups + return reasons to find patterns

• Write short root-cause summaries for problem SKUs (what’s happening + why)

• Convert recurring problems into documentation upgrades:

   - troubleshooting flows, “do not do this” warnings, checklists, rescue guides

• Close the loop with manufacturers:

   - escalate issues, request fixes/parts, track known issues until resolved

• Improve expectation-setting on product pages:

   - limitations, fitment notes, difficulty/skill level, aligned claims

Output: fewer repeat issues because the answer is now in the docs and on the page.



3) Keep SKUs in a clear “status system” the company trusts

• Maintain a simple SKU status board:

   - Green = safe, Yellow = monitor, Red = fix/pause

• Recommend actions for Red SKUs:

   - pause ads, deactivate SKU, replace variant/manufacturer

• Support “field test before scaling” for risky SKUs (small batch ? document friction ? update ? Green)

Output: clear decisions, fewer “silent bad SKUs,” and predictable scaling.





TOOLS YOU'LL USE????

You’ll work with Shopify, Google Sheets/Docs/Drive, WhatsApp support groups, our support inbox/CRM, and direct manufacturer comms.





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR????????

You’re a fit if you are:

• Outcome-obsessed owner: You take extreme ownership of post-purchase results for your SKUs (return rate, support volume, customer satisfaction).



• Analytical (80/20): You can turn support tickets, return reasons, and WhatsApp chats into clear patterns, priorities, and next actions.



• Strong problem solver: You can separate doc gaps vs product defects vs compatibility vs wrong expectations, and run a plan until it’s fixed.



• Documentation killer (with polish): You create clear, foolproof install guides, checklists, warnings, troubleshooting flows, and versioned updates — with clean formatting and consistent structure. You don’t need to be a designer, but you can brief/collaborate with one to produce high-quality docs.



• Customer-empathic communicator: You think like a DIY installer with low tech knowledge and write in simple, step-by-step language.



• Technically comfortable & assertive: Not an engineer, but confident with hardware basics (wiring, harnesses, connectors, firmware, vehicle basics). You can push suppliers for fixes and keep Customer Support + Marketing aligned on what’s true and safe to promise.



• Fast, organized, and decisive: You ship v1 improvements quickly, track SKU status (Green/Yellow/Red), keep work visible, and have the judgment to recommend pausing/discontinuing a product if it can’t be fixed properly.



Nice to have (not required):

• Aftermarket automotive electronics experience

• E-commerce returns reduction experience

• Knowledge base / SOP building

• Ability to record quick troubleshooting videos





BENEFITS????

• 40h/week full-time long-term position within Merge Screens

• Base salary of USD 1.200/month

• Performance bonus: 15% of additional profit saved from reduced returns and support load (baseline vs current) after base is covered. Paid quarterly, capped at $200/month.

• 15 paid vacation days per year

• Remote?friendly work environment with flexibility to set fixed working hours

• Direct access to founders and fast decision?making (no corporate BS)

• Opportunity to own a mission?critical function and see your work directly impact revenue, customer happiness, and brand reputation



If you’re the kind of person who can’t stand seeing customers struggle, loves fixing real?world product issues, and wants full ownership of the outcome, we’d love to hear from you.



HOW TO APPLY????

1. Short intro (max 200 words)

• Start your intro with the word “BULLSEYE” at the very top to show you read the full job post.

• Applications without this keyword won’t be reviewed.

• Tell us: who you are, where you’re based, and why this role (post-purchase + documentation) fits you.



2) 1-minute voice note (required)

• Record a ~60 second voice message.

• Explain how you think you would help Merge Screens in this role (what you’d improve, how you’d approach it, and what outcomes you’d drive).



3) Screening questions

• Please answer the screening questions below.

• Please answer in your own words. Generic or copy-pasted answers won’t be considered.



A. First 30 days (prioritization): If you joined tomorrow, what are the first 3 things you would fix in the first 30 days — and why? (Bullets only)

B. Truth alignment scenario: The dashcam shown on the website isn’t the same as what’s being shipped. Walk us through exactly how you would resolve this end-to-end (what you verify, who you talk to, and what you update across site/docs/internal notes).

C. Root-cause method: When a SKU has high returns/support, how do you determine whether it’s a documentation issue vs product defect vs compatibility vs wrong expectations? Describe your method.

D. Writing clarity test (DIY installer): Rewrite this for a non-technical customer in 2–4 short steps: “If there is no sound after installation, check the amplifier setting and make sure the correct harness is connected.”

E. Documentation system: How would you ensure installation + troubleshooting documentation stays updated and consistent across many SKUs as new issues appear? (Process/cadence/versioning/templates)

title: AI Mockup Designer – Storefront Signage (Lovart / AI Rendering / Mockups)
description:
Overview



We are a signage company that designs and installs 3D LED storefront signs for businesses. Before producing a sign, we send potential clients a realistic AI-generated mockup showing how their new logo signage could look on their storefront.



We are looking for a detail-oriented AI Mockup Designer who can create clean, realistic storefront renderings with 3D signage using AI tools such as Lovart and other image generation tools.



Your job is to take a real storefront image and a logo and generate sales-ready visualizations of how a new 3D sign could look on the building.



This is not graphic design only — the key skill is creating convincing architectural mockups using AI rendering tools.







Your Responsibilities



You will receive:



• A real storefront photo

• A company logo

• Instructions about the signage



Your job is to:



Recreate the storefront as a clean rendering-style image



Generate 3D sign versions from the logo



Place the signs onto the storefront realistically



Produce multiple sign variations (day & night versions)



Ensure the mockups look professional and realistic enough to show clients







Example of Work



Typical output includes:



• realistic storefront mockups

• front-lit 3D channel letter signs

• day and night lighting versions

• accurate logo proportions

• realistic shadows and mounting



The final result must look like a real installed sign.







Tools



Preferred tools:



• Lovart AI

• ChatGPT (for prompt refinement)

• Photoshop / Photo editing software

• Vector software (Illustrator or similar)







Requirements



You must:



• Be experienced with AI image generation

• Be able to write or refine prompts

• Understand basic perspective and lighting

• Have strong attention to detail

• Follow clear instructions precisely

• Organize files properly



Experience with signage, architectural visualization, or product rendering is a plus.







Output Requirements



For each project you will produce:



• multiple storefront mockups

• day and night lighting versions

• different signage styles

• a vector file of the sign layout with dimensions







Important



Accuracy matters.



Logos must match exactly.

Signs must look realistically mounted.



These images will be shown directly to potential customers.

title: Virtual Assistant – Apartment Hunter
description:
About Us:

We are a growing apartment locating team serving renters across Texas's major metros — San Antonio, Dallas-Fort Worth, Austin, and Houston. We help clients find apartments that fit their unique situations. We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our team with building a liat of apartments for our clients.



This is a legitimate, long-term position with a stable U.S. team. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us — not a short-term gig.



What You'll Be Doing:

This is a data entry, administrative support building apartmemt lists for clients. Your core responsibilities include:



- Review incoming client information — including their desired area, budget, move-in timeline, and any credit, rental history, or background details

- Cross-reference our resources to identify and verify properties that match the client's criteria, including pricing and availability, then enter the verified communities into our list-building platform to create the client's official apartment list

- Generate a shortcode link for the completed list and deliver it to our agent.

- Monitor Slack for requests from our team to modify or update tours, reschedule appointments, or handle other needs — respond within 15–30 minutes

- Keep records organized and flag any discrepancies or questions to the team



Important — Scope of This Role:



This role does not involve advising, or making recommendations to clients. If something doesn't look right or you have a question, you bring it to us.



Who We're Looking For:



- Fluent in spoken and written English (REQUIRED — you will be making phone calls to U.S. apartment communities)

- Confident and professional on phone calls with U.S. businesses

- Detail-oriented and accurate — clients depend on the work you produce

- Able to follow a clear, repeatable process consistently without cutting corners

- Comfortable working with maps, spreadsheets, and online platforms

- Quick to learn new software

- Reliable and self-motivated — able to manage a queue of tasks efficiently

- Patient with repetitive tasks and committed to accuracy

- Responsive and flexible when last-minute changes come through

- Able to problem-solve when community websites have different booking processes



Experience with SmartApartmentData and/or GoHighLevel is a strong plus. These are core tools in our daily workflow, so candidates with hands-on experience in either platform will have a significant advantage.

Also a Plus:



- Experience supporting a US-based real estate or apartment locating team

- Background in data entry, virtual assistant, or administrative roles

- General understanding of rental screening concepts (credit, background, eviction history)

- Experience with Google Maps or route optimization tools



Response Time Expectations:



- Slack messages from our team: Respond within 5–10 minutes during your shift.





Requirements:



- Stable internet connection

- Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Must be available to work Monday–Friday 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST.

- Must be fluent in English and comfortable making phone calls to U.S. apartment communities





Compensation:

$4.5/hr USD to start. Pay increases as your responsibilities grow. This is a long-term role with room to take on more as you prove yourself.



Training and Onboarding:

Fully paid training will be provided during your first week, including video walkthroughs of all systems, processes, tools. We'll set you up for success before you start working independently.



How to Apply:

Please include the following in your application:



1. Begin your application with the word "locator" to confirm you've read the full posting

2. A brief introduction (2–3 sentences) explaining why you're a good fit for this role

3. A link to a short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself in English — upload to Google Drive, Loom, or share a link. This is required so we can assess your spoken English.

4. Your availability and confirmation you can work the posted schedule

5. Any experience you have with 
, GoHighLevel, or similar platforms

6. Results from a DISC assessment

7. Tell us something that you took initiative on in your last role.



Skills Test (Required):

Since this role requires attention to detail, use the word APARTMENT LOCATOR as the title to confirm your interest along with why we should select you for this role.



Why Work With Us:



Long-term, stable position — not a short-term project

Pay increases as responsibilities grow

Opportunities for increased responsibility as you grow with us

Fully paid training

Supportive team environment



We value consistency and accuracy over speed — doing things right matters more than doing things fast. If you're looking for a long-term home where your work is appreciated, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Virtual Assistant – Email Outreach, Lead Generation & Social Media
description:
JOB POSTING

Virtual Assistant –
 Outreach, Lead Generation & Social Media

UK-Based Construction Consultancy | Remote Role



 



About the Company

We are a UK-focused construction consultancy that helps subcontractors recover money they’re owed, protect their contracts, and get paid faster. Our services include payment recovery, contract reviews, and commercial support for trades across the UK construction industry.

We are a growing business in the early stages of building our client base. The founder has 25 years of construction industry experience and manages the business remotely alongside a full-time role. We need a reliable, self-motivated virtual assistant to become the engine behind our outreach and marketing – someone who can take ownership of repeatable tasks and free up the founder’s time to focus on delivering services to clients.

 



The Role

Position: Virtual Assistant – Outreach, Lead Generation & Social Media

Hours: Full-time (40 hours/week) – flexible scheduling

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Start: 2-week paid trial, then ongoing full-time employment

Salary: PHP 25,000–35,000/month (depending on experience) – paid weekly during trial

 



What You’ll Be Doing

1.
 Outreach & Follow-Up Sequences

• Load contact lists into our
 marketing platform and send outreach campaigns

• Monitor
 open rates, click rates, and replies

• Send SMS follow-ups to contacts who open but don’t reply (using provided scripts/templates)

• Flag hot leads (replies, downloads, multiple opens) for the founder to follow up personally

• Maintain clean contact lists – remove bounces, update details, segment by trade/region

2. Lead Generation & Data Collection

• Research and collect UK subcontractor contact details from trade directories, council approved contractor lists, and online sources

• Log contacts into spreadsheets/CRM in a consistent format (company name, contact name,
, phone, trade, region)

• Build targeted lists by trade type and UK region for outreach campaigns

• This is a repeatable process – full training will be provided via video call

3. Social Media Management

• Create and schedule regular posts on 
 and
 (3–5 posts per week per platform)

• Repurpose existing content (e-books, guides, blog posts) into social media posts and graphics

• Use Canva (or similar) to create simple, professional graphics for posts

• Engage with construction industry groups and relevant comments/discussions

• Grow followers and connections within the UK subcontractor market

• All posting will be done through a scheduling tool (e.g. Buffer or Hootsuite) – you won’t need personal access to social accounts

4. General Admin & Reporting

• Provide a simple weekly summary:
s sent, open/reply rates, leads collected, social posts published, engagement stats

• Keep shared spreadsheets/trackers up to date

• Flag any issues or suggestions – we want someone who thinks, not just follows orders

 



Skills & Experience Required

Must Have:

• Strong written English – you’ll be writing/editing content aimed at UK business owners, so grammar and tone matter

• Experience with
 marketing platforms (Mailerlite, Brevo, Mailchimp, GoHighLevel, or similar)

• Comfortable with spreadsheets (Google Sheets or Excel) for data logging and tracking

• Basic social media management experience (
 and
 – posting, scheduling, engagement)

• Experience with Canva or similar design tools for creating simple graphics

• Self-motivated and reliable – able to work independently with minimal supervision once trained

• Attention to detail – especially when collecting and logging contact data

• Available for occasional video calls for training and check-ins (Australian timezone flexibility required)

 

Nice to Have:

• Experience with B2B lead generation or outreach (not just e-commerce/retail)

• Familiarity with social media scheduling tools (Buffer, Hootsuite, Later)

• Experience with SMS outreach or multi-channel marketing

• Any exposure to the construction industry or professional services

• Basic understanding of CRM systems

 



How the 2-Week Paid Trial Works

We’re looking for a long-term working relationship, not a one-off project. The trial is designed so we can both see if it’s a good fit.

1. Week 1: Training & setup. You’ll get video walkthroughs of each task, access to all tools and templates, and clear instructions. We’ll work closely together.

2. Week 2: Independent work. You’ll run the daily tasks with less oversight. We’ll check in regularly but you’ll be expected to manage your workload.

3. End of trial: If we’re both happy, you move to a full-time permanent role with weekly pay.

You will be paid for the trial period.

 



What We Provide

• Full video training on every task – no guesswork

• All
 templates, outreach scripts, and content already created – you’re executing a system, not building one from scratch

• Access to all tools needed 
 platform, scheduling tool, Canva, etc.)

• A clear, respectful working relationship with direct communication

• Room to grow – as the business scales, your role and responsibilities will expand

 



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

• A brief introduction – who you are and why this role interests you

• Your relevant experience 
 marketing, social media, data entry, lead gen)

• Which
 marketing platforms you’ve used

• A sample of any social media content or graphics you’ve created (links are fine)

 

APPLICATION TEST TASK

To help us assess your skills, please complete this short task and include it with your application:



 

• Search Google for “UK electrical contractors” or “UK plumbing subcontractors”

• Find 10 real UK subcontractor companies and log them in a spreadsheet with these columns: Company Name, Contact Name (if available),
, Phone, Trade, Region/City

• Attach the spreadsheet to your application

 

This should take no more than 20–30 minutes. It shows us your research ability, attention to detail, and data entry quality.



 

We’re looking for one great person to grow with us. If you’re reliable, detail-oriented, and ready to take ownership of your work – we’d love to hear from you.

title: Senior Graphic Designer (Freelance)
description:
About Surface Scan



Surface Scan is a specialist 3D scanning, reverse engineering, and 3D printing service based in Ramsgate, Kent. We work with clients across a wide range of industries, helping them solve complex engineering challenges using cutting-edge technology. Alongside our core business, we’re also building a new SaaS product and preparing to launch another exciting venture – so there’s no shortage of creative work to get stuck into.



The Role



We’re looking for a senior-level Graphic Designer who can produce high-quality visual content across multiple brands. Each project has its own distinct identity, tone, and audience, so the ability to shift your creative approach and work comfortably across different styles is essential.



This isn’t a role for template-style graphics. We need a designer who produces rich, layered, thoughtful visuals – work that feels crafted, not clipped together. Sometimes you’ll have a detailed brief to follow; other times you’ll be given minimal direction and will need to use your creativity and judgement to produce the right design for the situation. We value designers who can do both with equal confidence.



You’ll work closely with our Content Creator, Video Editor, Copywriter, and Marketing Manager as part of a collaborative remote marketing team. You’ll also play a key role in shaping and evolving the visual identity of each brand over time – not just executing, but contributing creatively to how these brands look and feel.



This is a freelance position with flexible hours and full remote working. We see this as a long-term relationship with a clear path to scaling up hours and pay as we grow together.



What You’ll Be Doing



Design & Visual Content



• Designing high-quality graphics for social media, websites, ads,
 campaigns, blogs, and lead magnets across multiple brands.

• Creating visuals that range from clean, simple layouts to fully custom, multi-layered, dynamic designs – adapting your approach to what each piece needs.

• Developing unique assets for key webpages, campaigns, promotions, product launches, and new service rollouts.

• Producing icons, illustrations, infographics, diagrams, and other supporting visuals that bring complex technical concepts to life.

• Creating graphics for downloadable resources such as PDF guides, checklists, case studies, and lead magnets.

• Working with large 3D files (STL, STP) as part of the design process where needed.



Collaboration & Team Support



• Supporting the Content Creator by providing custom graphics, thumbnails, and visual assets for video content.

• Supporting the Copywriter by creating visuals to accompany articles, guides, LinkedIn posts, and other written content.

• Collaborating closely with the wider marketing team through Slack or similar tools – sharing ideas, asking for what you need, and contributing to creative discussions.

• Providing design input during ideation stages, particularly when direction is open-ended – we want you to bring ideas to the table, not just wait for instructions.



Brand Development



• Working within existing brand guidelines while actively helping to evolve and strengthen the visual identity across all companies.

• Ensuring consistency across every touchpoint – from social posts to website assets to printed materials.

• Bringing a strong visual perspective to new projects, helping to define how new brands and products look and feel from the outset.



Workflow & Delivery



• Managing a consistent flow of design tasks, balancing ongoing work with quick-turnaround needs when they arise.

• Ensuring all designs that include text maintain flawless English accuracy.

• Staying organised and proactive – keeping work moving, flagging bottlenecks early, and maintaining a smooth production flow.



What We’re Looking For



We want a designer whose portfolio makes us stop and look. Someone with genuine creative instinct, not just technical ability. If your work has depth, personality, and range, we want to hear from you.



You should be:



• A senior-level graphic designer with strong digital design experience and a portfolio that proves it.

• Capable of producing polished, professional, layered graphics that feel dynamic, considered, and well-composed.

• Comfortable designing across multiple brand identities, styles, and tones – and able to switch between them seamlessly.

• Confident working from detailed briefs as well as open-ended, minimal-direction prompts where you’re expected to lead creatively.

• Experienced across a wide range of visual assets: ads, social graphics, web visuals, lead magnets, infographics, icons, and illustrations.

• A strong creative thinker who proposes ideas and solutions rather than waiting for instructions.

• Detail-oriented, particularly when working with text – strong English comprehension and an eye for accuracy.

• Skilled in modern design software and tools. We’re flexible and open to your preferred workflow.

• A clear communicator who collaborates proactively and fits naturally into a remote team.

• Reliable and well-organised, capable of managing a steady flow of tasks and meeting deadlines without being chased.



Nice to have:



• Animation or motion graphics ability.

• Experience working with 3D files (STL, STP) or in engineering, manufacturing, and technical industries.

• Experience designing for SaaS products or tech startups.

• Illustration skills beyond standard graphic design.



Why Work With Us?



• Creative variety. You’ll work across multiple brands, industries, and project types – no two weeks will look the same.

• Real creative input. We don’t just want a pair of hands – we want a designer who shapes how our brands look and feel.

• Interesting subject matter. 3D scanning, reverse engineering, cutting-edge manufacturing – visually compelling, technically fascinating work that stands out from the usual design briefs.

• A collaborative team. You’ll be working alongside a content creator, video editor, copywriter, and marketing manager who all pull in the same direction.

• Room to grow. This is a long-term role with a clear path to increased hours, pay, and responsibility as the business scales.

• Full remote working with flexible hours and a team that values quality output over rigid schedules.



How to Apply



To apply, please
 the following to 



• Your CV.

• A cover letter telling us why this role interests you and what you’d bring to the team.

• A portfolio showcasing your best and most relevant design work. We particularly want to see examples that demonstrate your ability to work across different styles, tones, and concepts.

title: Ecom AI Performance Video Editor
description:
We are 7 Figure is looking for a D2C Supplement Brand Video Editor looking to join our team! As our video editing specialist, you will be responsible for editing high-converting UGC ads, direct response video creatives,VSL’s and psychology-based video content to be used across paid marketing channels (primarily Meta).



We are looking to hire someone with 1.5+ years of ecommerce work experience. The ideal candidate has prior experience editing paid advertisements specifically for Meta Platforms, UGC content,VSL’s direct response marketing & bonus points if experience with supplement/health brands.



Key Objectives:



-Edit 1-15 high-converting video ads per week from raw UGC footage and stock content

-Transform raw creator footage into polished, direct response ads optimized for Meta platforms

-Drive measurable improvements in core advertising metrics (CTR, Hook Rate, Hold Rate) through superior editing

-Create multiple variations and iterations of winning ad concepts quickly

-Use data from creative performance on Meta to analyze what editing techniques, hooks, and structures are driving results

-Work with our creative strategist to bring scripts and concepts to life through compelling editing

-Maintain organized asset libraries and editing workflows for maximum efficiency

-Provide quick turnaround times on revisions and new edits to support rapid testing cycles



Requirements:



-Fully remote

-Fluent in English

-Direct Response Editing Expertise: 1.5+ Years experience editing performance creative for DTC brands or working at a creative agency is a must

-Software Proficiency: Expert-level skills in Adobe Premiere Pro or After Effects or CapCut, Heygen, Veo 3, Higgfield is a must and familiarity with DaVinci Resolve. Mobile editing experience (CapCut mobile) is a plus

-UGC Editing: Extensive experience editing raw UGC footage into high-converting paid ads with native platform aesthetics

-Fast & Efficient: Ability to produce high-quality edits quickly without sacrificing performance. Speed is critical

-Creative & Data-Driven: Understanding of what makes ads perform (hooks, pacing, captions, sound design, effects) and ability to analyze performance data to inform editing decisions

-Portfolio Required: Must provide portfolio showcasing DTC video ads (preferably supplements, health, or e-commerce)

-No issue working overtime or on the weekends if needed. You wouldn't know what to do with your free time if you were working less. You are passionate about your work

-Excellent cultural fit as per our values above

-Are excited to play a big role in scaling the company and work closely with the founders

-Understanding of direct response principles and how editing impacts conversion

-Include word "banana" in your application to prove your legit



Accountabilities:



-Edit 10-20 video ads per week from provided scripts, raw footage, and assets

-Create multiple variations of winning ads (different hooks, text overlays, pacing)

-Add compelling captions, text overlays, sound effects, and visual effects that enhance performance

-Maintain consistent turnaround times (24-48 hours for standard edits, same-day for urgent)

-Organize and manage all video assets, footage libraries, and project files

-Collaborate with creative strategist to understand video concepts and execute the vision

Source and integrate b-roll, stock footage, and motion graphics as needed

-Adapt editing style to emerging trends and platform best practices

-Review performance data on edited ads and identify patterns in what's working

-Iterate quickly on underperforming ads and create new versions based on data insights

-Create editing templates and systems to increase output efficiency

-Maintain brand consistency across all video content while optimizing for performance



How Our Hiring Works & How We Operate:



When hiring, we'll work with you to define the KPIs you'll be responsible for and set targets. This removes ambiguity around wondering if you're doing a good job after you start.



Initial soft interview, then a technical interview + test project (edit 2-3 ads from provided footage), and a final interview to ensure culture fit. We plan to hire within ~8 - 10 days of conducting these interviews. We pride ourselves on timely responses and updates for applicants.



For this specific role, we will walk you through the long-term vision and opportunities that have us excited about this business - and how you fit in. We will show you our current structure and where we are headed!

title: Hyper-Realistic AI Avatar & B-Rolls
description:
We are looking for someone who can generate hyper-realistic AI avatars and high-quality B-roll content for marketing creatives, advertisements, and brand content.



To be very clear — we are looking for the BEST OF THE BEST.



If you are average, still learning, or unsure of your skills, this role is NOT FOR YOU.



We are looking for someone who is highly skilled, hardworking, and takes pride in producing extremely realistic visuals that look natural and authentic — not fake or overly “AI-looking.”



This is not a short-term freelance role.

We are looking for someone long-term who can grow with our team and become a key part of our creative production process.



You will be working closely with our marketing team and contributing to content for multiple brands as we continue to expand.



Role Overview



Your main responsibility will be creating hyper-realistic AI avatars and B-roll footage that can be used in ads, marketing creatives, and brand content.



To help you succeed, we will provide a full SOP and step-by-step process showing exactly how to use the AI software and tools required to generate the avatars and B-rolls. You must be able to follow structured systems carefully and execute consistently.



We are looking for someone who can combine technical execution with creativity to produce high-quality visual content.



REQUIRED Skills (IF YOU DO NOT HAVE THESE, DO NOT APPLY)

title: Experienced Product Lister Google & Meta
description:
We are a growing ecommerce brand dedicated to creating a seamless online shopping experience for our customers. We're now looking for a detail-oriented and experienced Product Lister to join our team!



About the Role

You will be responsible for listing new products in our Shopify store following a clear SOP. This includes importing products, generating product descriptions with ChatGPT, configuring variants and pricing, assigning collections, and uploading size charts. Your work will directly impact how our customers see and experience our products. At the very bottom, please include the number of application points listed under so we know you’ve read everything carefully.



What You'll Do

- Import product URLs via Poky and verify listings in Shopify

- Generate clean and structured product descriptions using ChatGPT templates

- Set up correct colours, sizes, and product images

- Use British English for all content and double-check formatting via DeepL

- Assign accurate pricing based on internal documents

- Update product URLs to match naming conventions

- Add products to the correct collections

- Create and assign accurate size charts in BF Size Chart (IN or CM)



Who You Are

- Experienced in Shopify product listing (Poky/DSers knowledge is a plus)

- Detail-oriented and extremely careful with formatting, matching colours, and variants

- Proactive, you spot issues and bring in solutions

- Communicative, not afraid to ask when something is unclear

- You enjoy routine tasks but also suggest improvements to make things more efficient

- Fluent in English (British spelling knowledge preferred)



What We Offer

- A long-term remote position with flexible hours

- Clear SOPs and supportive team

- Space to share your ideas and grow with us

- Opportunity to work in a creative and fast-paced e-commerce environment





Please send a short message answering the following:



- Briefly describe your previous experience with Shopify product listing.

- What tools or strategies do you use to ensure accuracy when uploading product details?



We can't wait to meet someone who’s as passionate about precision as we are! Please let me know your favorite fruit. And please don't respond if you don't have at least 1+ year experience with this.

title: Shopify Store Builder - Shrine Theme Pro
description:
Shopify Store Builder - Shrine Theme Pro (AraLumi Skincare)

Job Type: Project-Based | Remote | Start Immediately



About AraLumi

AraLumi is a premium skincare brand focused on clean, results-driven formulations. We are building our flagship Shopify store and need a skilled, detail-oriented developer to bring our brand vision to life using the Shrine Theme Pro.

This is a paid project with the potential for ongoing work across multiple brands. We work fast, communicate clearly, and pay on time. We expect the same professionalism in return.



What You Will Be Doing

– Installing and configuring the Shrine Theme Pro to match the AraLumi brand aesthetic (colours, fonts, layout, spacing)

– Building all core pages: Home, Shop, Product pages, About, Contact, FAQs, and collection pages

– Setting up product listings with proper variant structures, imagery placement, and SEO-friendly descriptions

– Configuring the cart, checkout flow, and upsell/cross-sell sections within the theme

– Adding and configuring Shopify apps as directed (reviews,
 capture, loyalty, etc.)

– Ensuring the store is fully mobile-optimised and fast-loading

– Setting up basic on-page SEO including meta titles, descriptions, alt text, and URL structure

– Integrating payment gateways and shipping settings

– Testing the full purchase journey end-to-end before handover

– Providing a short Loom video walkthrough showing us how to manage the store after launch



Requirements

– Proven experience building Shopify stores from scratch, not just minor edits

– Direct, hands-on experience with the Shrine Theme Pro. Do not apply if you have not used this specific theme

– Portfolio of at least 3 completed Shopify stores with live URLs

– Experience in health, beauty, skincare, or wellness niches is a strong advantage

– Strong eye for design including brand aesthetics, whitespace, and visual hierarchy

– Excellent attention to detail

– Reliable, fast written communication in English

– Available to start immediately. This is not a position for someone who can begin in a few weeks



Nice to Have

– Experience with Shopify 2.0 and metafields

– Basic Liquid, HTML, or CSS knowledge for custom theme tweaks

– Familiarity with Klaviyo, Loox, ReConvert, or similar apps

– Previous work with direct-to-consumer beauty or skincare brands



How to Apply

To be considered, your application must include all of the following. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Links to 3 or more Shopify stores you have built (live stores preferred, with your role on each)

Confirmation that you have used the Shrine Theme Pro and a description of what you built with it

Any health, beauty, or wellness stores in your portfolio, highlighted specifically

Your estimated timeline from brief to launch-ready

Your fixed project rate or hourly rate with estimated total hours

Confirmation that you are available to start immediately



Copy-paste cover letters will be ignored.



What We Offer

– A clear, detailed project brief so you know exactly what is needed

– Fast feedback and decisions

– Prompt payment on milestone completion

– Potential for ongoing work across additional brands if the project goes well

– A professional and respectful working relationship

title: AI Automation Builder (Invoice Processing & Expense Tracking System)
description:
Overview



We are looking for an experienced AI Automation Builder to build a system that automatically processes incoming invoices and receipts.



The goal is simple:

When an invoice or receipt is sent to our
, the system should automatically download, analyze, rename, store, and log the data so our bookkeeping becomes fully automated.



This is a one-time project with potential for long-term work if the system performs well.



What You Will Build

You will create an automation system that does the following:



1.
 Monitoring

Monitor the
 inbox:



When a new
 arrives with an invoice or receipt:

Detect attachments (PDF, image, etc.)

Download the invoice automatically



2. AI Invoice Analysis

Use AI / OCR to analyze the invoice and extract key data:

The system should extract:

Company name

Invoice date

Invoice number

Total amount

VAT amount

Currency

Category (if possible)

Description of purchase

The AI should work even if invoices have different layouts or formats.



3. Smart File Renaming

The invoice PDF should automatically be renamed into a clean format like:

YYYY-MM-DD – Company Name – Amount.pdf



Example:
– Google Ads – 248.30.pdf

This makes searching invoices easy.



4. Google Drive Storage

The file should automatically be stored in:

Google Drive ? Facturen (Invoices) folder

Structure example:

Google Drive

  ? Invoices

      ? 2026

          ? 03 March

              ? invoice.pdf



5. Google Sheets Logging

All invoice data should automatically be logged into Google Sheets.

Columns should include:

Date

Company

Description

Amount

VAT

Currency

Invoice number

File link (Google Drive)

Category

This sheet will function as a real-time expense dashboard.



6. Receipt Upload Option



We also want a way to easily upload receipts.

Example options:

Picture send to 



The system should then:

Analyze the receipt

Extract data

Add it to Google Sheets

Store it in Google Drive



Preferred Tools

You can use tools like:

Make (Integromat)

OpenAI / GPT

OCR tools

Google Drive API

Gmail API

Google Sheets



We are open to your best technical solution.



Requirements

You should have experience with:

AI automation

API integrations

OCR / invoice parsing



Google Workspace automation

AI data extraction



Bonus if you have built:

Invoice automation systems

Accounting automations

Expense tracking workflows



What Success Looks Like

When the system is finished:

An invoice arrives in

The system downloads it automatically

AI analyzes the invoice

The file is renamed automatically

The file is stored in Google Drive

All data appears in Google Sheets

Everything is searchable and organized

Completely hands-off.



Budget

Please include: $50-$100



To Apply

Start your message with:

“AI Automation Builder”



And include:

A short introduction

Tools you will use

Similar automation projects you built

Your timeline

How you think we can execute this best. 



lets make this work!

title: Paid Ads UGC Video Editor
description:
Join Blackboard Agency – Video Editor Wanted



At Blackboard, we create scroll-stopping, high-performing ads for some of the fastest-growing DTC and ecommerce brands. Your Role

Can edit fast without sacrificing quality.

Work on exciting global wellness, beauty, and lifestyle brands.

How to Apply



Send your portfolio & past UGC ad edits.

Only send your best UGC work.



Apply now and help us create ads that don’t just look good – they perform.

title: General Virtual Assistant
description:
We are looking for a highly organized, proactive General Virtual Assistant to support our growing team inside The Forbes Factor, a global personal brand and education company led by Forbes Riley.



This role is ideal for someone who has previous experience working inside a course, coaching, or info-product business and is comfortable managing operations, systems, and marketing support tasks.



You will work closely with the sales and marketing team, ensuring our backend systems run smoothly while helping support campaigns, launches, and day-to-day operations.



Key Responsibilities



Operations & Admin



• Manage and update Notion dashboards and internal documentation

• Maintain and update Google Sheets trackers and reporting dashboards

• Assist with organizing internal processes and SOPs

• Coordinate tasks between the sales, marketing, and operations teams



CRM & Sales Support



• Manage and update contacts inside 
 CRM

• Assist with pipeline organization and lead tracking

• Help maintain sales reports and lead scoring sheets

• Ensure leads and contacts are correctly tagged and segmented



Marketing Support



• Create and edit simple graphics using Canva (social posts, webinar slides,
 visuals)

• Support webinar and campaign preparation

• Assist with organizing marketing assets and content



General Team Support



• Help manage internal communication and task tracking

• Assist with organizing files, documents, and workflows

• Support new projects as the company scales



Requirements



We are specifically looking for someone who:



• Has previous experience working with a course, coaching, or info-product company

• Is fluent in English (written and spoken)

• Is highly organized and detail-oriented

• Has strong experience with:



Required Tools

• Notion

• Google Sheets

• Canva

• 
 (or similar CRM)



Nice to Have

• GoHighLevel

• Slack

• Zapier

• Webinar platforms



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is someone who:



• Is extremely organized and reliable

• Can follow systems but also improve them

• Is proactive and communicates clearly

• Has experience working with remote teams

• Understands the fast pace of online education businesses



Working With Us



You’ll be joining a fast-growing education company that helps entrepreneurs learn how to pitch, sell, and scale their expertise globally.



This is a long-term opportunity with the potential to grow into operations or marketing roles as the company expands.



How to Apply



Please include the following:



- A short introduction about yourself

- Your experience working with course or info-product businesses

- Examples of systems you have managed (Notion, CRM, spreadsheets, etc)

- Your hourly rate or salary expectations



The word “Forbes” in the first line of your application so we know you read the job description.

title: Video Editor & Content Creator — Mobile Gaming (Creative Production Team)
description:
Full-Time | Remote | Monthly Contract



We're growing our creative production team and looking for a talented video editor and content creator with a passion for gaming. You'll have access to a library of raw gameplay footage and existing creatives, and your job will be to turn them into polished, high-performing edits that capture attention and drive results.

If you love gaming content, understand what makes a clip go viral, and enjoy experimenting with creative formats — this role is for you.



What You'll Be Doing

    - Editing raw mobile gameplay footage into engaging, shareable content

    - Creating "Noob vs Pro" style videos and level progression edits (Level 1 ? Level 5 ? Level 20 etc.)

    - Building montages with fast cuts, strong pacing, and satisfying flow

    - Applying zoom effects, colour grading and colour adjustments to raw footage

    - Adding VFX overlays to bring energy and polish to gameplay clips

    - Writing and animating narrative text edits that guide the viewer through the story

    - Creating original content pieces alongside editing — not just cutting, but contributing ideas

    - Leveraging AI tools we'll provide access to, including AI voiceover, video generation, and image generation, to enhance 

      and elevate your edits



What We're Looking For

    - Strong After Effects skills — this is the core tool for the role, and we expect polished motion work including 

      transitions, animated UI elements, and end cards

    - Comfortable picking up additional tools as needed (we're outcome-focused, not tool-prescriptive)

    - A genuine feel for gaming content and what resonates with that audience

    - Someone creative who brings ideas, not just someone who executes briefs

    - Self-directed with good communication — you'll be working remotely and managing your own output

    - Portfolio with examples of gameplay edits, motion work, or similar content is essential



Nice to Have

    - Experience editing gaming content for YouTube, TikTok, or similar platforms

    - Familiarity with AI tools (ElevenLabs, Runway, MidJourney, or similar)

    - Ability to concept and script short-form content as well as edit it

    - Decent internet speed (Download / Upload)



To Apply

    Send your portfolio or 2–3 examples of your best edits — gaming content preferred but not essential.

    Tell us briefly what tools you use day-to-day and what kind of content you enjoy making most.

title: Virtual Executive Assistant to Entrepreneur
description:

 inbox

---



## Ideal Candidate

---



## Required Skills

---

title: Short Term Rental Pricing Manager
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Short-Term Rental Pricing Manager to lead and execute dynamic pricing strategies across our portfolio of short-term rental properties. This role is responsible for optimising revenue performance across major OTA platforms including Airbnb, 
, and other online travel agencies (OTAs).



The ideal candidate is an expert in revenue management for short-term rentals, understands market demand dynamics, and is highly proficient in PMS and channel management systems. This person thrives on data, precision, and organization, and has a strong commercial mindset.



Key Responsibilities

- Pricing & Revenue Optimization

- Develop and implement dynamic pricing strategies to maximize occupancy, ADR, and RevPAR

- Continuously analyze market demand, seasonality, competitor pricing, local events, and booking trends

- Adjust daily pricing across all platforms based on performance data and market conditions

- Conduct weekly and monthly performance reviews and revenue forecasting

- Monitor and optimize minimum stay rules, gap nights, discounts, and promotional strategies

- OTA & Channel Management

- Manage and optimize listings across Airbnb, 
, and other OTAs

- Ensure rate parity and consistency across all channels

- Work within PMS and channel manager systems to push pricing updates accurately

- Troubleshoot rate discrepancies, sync errors, and distribution issues

- Coordinate with marketing and operations teams to align pricing with promotions and availability

- Systems & Reporting

- Utilize Property Management Systems (PMS) and Channel Managers efficiently

- Build and maintain pricing dashboards and reports

- Track KPIs such as ADR, occupancy rate, booking pace, and revenue growth

- Use data-driven insights to guide pricing decisions

- Required Skills & Qualifications

- Proven experience in short-term rental revenue management

- Strong expertise in dynamic pricing strategies

- Advanced understanding of OTA algorithms and ranking factors

- Deep familiarity with PMS and channel manager systems

- Exceptional attention to detail

- Highly organized with strong process discipline

- Strong analytical and data interpretation skills

- in Excel/Google Sheets (advanced formulas, forecasting models)

- Ability to make fast, confident decisions based on data

- problem-solving skills

- English written and verbal communication skills

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple properties simultaneously



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience managing large short-term rental portfolios

- Familiarity with revenue management software tools

- Experience in hospitality, real estate, or property management

- Knowledge of market analytics tools (AirDNA, PriceLabs, Beyond, etc.)

- Bachelor’s degree in Hospitality, Business, Finance, or related field



Ideal Candidate Profile



The ideal candidate is:

- Extremely detail-oriented and structured

- Data-driven and commercially minded

- Proactive and forward-thinking

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment

- Tech-savvy and systems-oriented

- Accountable and results-focused



What Success Looks Like



- Increased occupancy and revenue across the portfolio

- Accurate and consistent pricing across all channels

- Improved booking pace and market competitiveness

- Clear, actionable reporting and forecasting

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer | Lead Architect (AI-Driven Compliance for Care Homes)
description:
Job Title: Senior Full-Stack Developer | Lead Architect (AI-Driven Compliance for Care Homes)

Job Type: Full-Time / Part-Time (Specify your preference)

Salary: $1,200 - $2,500 USD/month based on experience]



About the Project

We are building Regulens, an innovative platform designed to simplify complex compliance guidance for Care Home Managers.



To date, we have successfully validated the concept using a high-fidelity prototype built with AI-assisted tools (Gemini and Lovable). However, as we integrate deeper AI logic to handle regulatory frameworks and care standards, we need a seasoned professional to take over the codebase, architect a "production-ready" environment, and ensure we don't fall into "prototype hell."



The Role

I am looking for a Senior Developer who can take the stress off my plate. You won't just be taking tickets; you will be the technical lead responsible for turning AI-generated components into a robust, secure, and scalable application.



The Challenge: You will be leveraging AI (LLMs) to provide real-time, actionable compliance guidance. This requires a developer who understands how to manage structured data, prompt engineering, and the "human-in-the-loop" UI/UX necessary for the care sector.



Key Responsibilities

Production Architecture: Move the project from a "low-code/AI-prompted" state into a clean, maintainable, and professional codebase (Next.js/Supabase preferred).



AI Integration: Implement and optimize LLM features (OpenAI/Gemini APIs) to parse regulatory documents and provide guidance to managers.



Data Integrity & Security: Ensure the platform handles sensitive care home data with professional-grade security and RLS (Row Level Security).



Refactoring: Clean up the existing prototype logic to ensure it can scale as we add more regulatory modules.



Technical Leadership: Act as my partner in making tech-stack decisions that prevent future technical debt.



Required Experience

5+ years in Full-Stack Development.



Deep expertise in React, Next.js, and TypeScript.



Experience with AI/LLM API integrations (not just using AI to code, but building AI features).



Strong backend skills with Supabase, PostgreSQL, or similar.



Proven ability to take an MVP and turn it into a polished, commercial-grade product.



Bonus: Experience in HealthTech, EdTech, or RegTech (Compliance).



Why Join Us?

High Autonomy: I provide the vision; you provide the engineering excellence. No micro-management.



Meaningful Work: We are solving a massive headache for care home managers, helping them stay compliant and focus on care.



Stability: This is a long-term role with the opportunity to grow as the lead of the engineering team.



How to Apply

Please send a message with:



Your experience building AI-integrated applications.



A brief description of a time you had to "clean up" or rebuild a prototype into a professional product.



Why you are interested in working on a tool for the Care Home/Healthcare sector.



Type "Regulens Compliance" at the top of your application.

title: Philippines-Based Bookkeeper in UK (Short-Term Rental / Airbnb Specialist)
description:

We are looking for an experienced Bookkeeper based in the Philippines with proven expertise in Airbnb property management accounting and Hostaway for UK Properties



This is a specialist role focused strictly on bookkeeping and financial reconciliation for a short-term rental management company.



Role Overview



The successful candidate will be responsible for:

Reviewing and reconciling monthly income and expenditure

Cross-checking all receipts against Airbnb payout statements and Hostaway reports

Ensuring financial records are accurate and complete

Identifying discrepancies and providing clear reports

Preparing end-of-month financial summaries

This role will be paid at a flat monthly rate for end-of-month financial reconciliation.



Must-Have Requirements



Speaks excellent English

At least 1-2 years bookkeeping experience with an Airbnb or short-term rental management company

Experience using Hostaway

Strong background in accounting and bookkeeping

Experience working with Airbnb financial reports

Experience reconciling payouts, fees, commissions, and expenses

High attention to detail

Ability to work independently and deliver accurate monthly reports

Strong Preferences

Someone who understands the UK tax system

Someone who has previously done bookkeeping for a UK-based short-term accommodation company



Application Questions



Please answer the following questions in your application:



Approximately how many properties did you manage in your previous property management role?

What did your day-to-day responsibilities typically involve?

Important



Please only apply if you have direct experience in accounting and bookkeeping within the short-term rental industry using Airbnb and Hostaway.



This is a specialist role and requires prior relevant experience.



Please send your CV and answers to the questions above to:

title: Short-Form Video Editor
description:
Hi! We’re Shoutout Digital, an Australia-based digital marketing agency that works with dental clinics and service businesses across the country.



This time, we’re on the lookout for a Short-Form Video Editor to help us create scroll-stopping social media videos. You’ll be working with a mix of raw video content, B-rolls, client-submitted footage, and other assets to produce short-form videos optimised for platforms like Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok.



These aren’t heavy long-form edits, just fast, creative, punchy videos that get attention and get results.



What You’ll Be Doing



 • Create short, ad-ready videos

 • Use tools like CapCut, Premiere Pro, or AI-assisted editors. Whatever gets the job done well

 • Edit videos for Meta, TikTok, Instagram. Mostly 15–30 sec videos

 • Add captions, transitions, animations, music, and hooks to make content engaging

 • Collaborate with our team for asset handovers and feedback



What We’re Looking For



 • Solid experience editing short-form videos for social media 

 • Eye for timing, pacing, and flow. You know when a video just feels right

 • Familiarity with platform trends (especially Meta & TikTok)

 • Comfortable working with raw B-roll and turning it into polished output

 • Able to receive feedback and iterate with ease

 • Good file management and timely handovers



Work Hours & Setup



 • This is a full-time role with a typical workload of around 30 to 40 hours per week. It may occasionally extend depending on what’s needed.

 • Work is only from Monday to Friday, so no weekend work is required.

 • You’ll have control over your schedule. We just ask that you’re mindful of our business hours (10 AM to 5 PM PHT) in case we need to touch base or align on anything.



Perks You’ll Enjoy



 • Paid leaves (yep, we want you to rest too)

 • Bi-weekly payouts, always on time

 • Performance bonuses when you do great work

 • All-expense paid team dinners and team buildings



How to Apply



We like to keep things simple. Just fill out this short form:



https://tally.so/r/LZP2aO



We’ll review your answers and reach out if shortlisted. Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: B2B Lead Generation & Outreach Specialist
description:
(Industrial / Construction Projects – Europe)



We are looking for a smart and proactive person who enjoys solving problems and finding creative ways to reach decision makers in large companies.



Our company works in the industrial construction sector in Europe (data centers, industrial plants, energy projects, HVAC, piping and electrical installations). We support large contractors by providing skilled installation teams.



This is not a typical outreach job where someone just copies templates and sends hundreds of messages.



Decision makers in our industry receive many sales messages every week. Standard outreach does not work anymore. What works are smart ideas, research, creativity and attention to details.



I am looking for a person who thinks independently, comes with ideas, and enjoys experimenting with different outreach strategies.



If you are the type of person who likes to say:

“Let’s try this approach. I think this might work.”

then this role might be a good fit.



Over time, the right person can grow into a sales role with performance bonuses and percentage from deals generated.



Our outreach channels



In our company we actively use several communication channels to reach decision makers:



•
 outreach

• LinkedIn outreach

• WhatsApp communication

• Cold calls (phone calls)



A good candidate should be able to think creatively about how to combine these channels and how to approach decision makers in a way that stands out.



Simply sending generic messages will not work.

The key is how you research the person, what details you mention, and how you structure the first contact.



Your responsibilities



• Research potential industrial / construction / EPC companies in Europe

• Identify decision makers (Project Managers, Construction Managers, Procurement Managers, etc.)

• Develop creative outreach strategies

• Write targeted messages and outreach campaigns

• Test different approaches and continuously improve results



Important: small details matter



In this business, success is often in the details.



Not just sending a message, but:



• what exact information you include

• what project detail you mention

• how you personalize the message

• what angle you use to get attention



A generic message will simply be ignored.



Selection process



We are looking for people who think and create solutions, not just copy templates.



After the first contact, selected candidates will receive a short practical task where you will show how you would approach outreach and lead generation.



This task is designed to understand how you think and how you solve problems.



How to apply



Instead of sending a long CV, please send a short introduction directly to WhatsApp.



Introduce yourself briefly and tell us why you think you would be good at generating leads for industrial projects.



WhatsApp: 
Selected candidates will receive the next step and a short task to complete.



What we offer



• Long-term opportunity

• Flexible remote work

• Opportunity to implement your own ideas

• Growth into a sales role with commission on deals generated

• Work with European industrial and construction projects



If you enjoy solving problems and finding smart ways to reach decision makers, we would be happy to hear from you.

title: Virtual Assistant & Video Editor - YouTube (Long-Form)
description:
About the Role:

We're running multiple YouTube channels and need a reliable, task-oriented VA to help with repetitive production work. This isn't a creative role—we have systems in place for everything. Your job is to follow instructions, execute tasks efficiently, and help us scale.



What You'll Do:

- Write scripts using our systems with Claude.ai

- Generate voiceovers with provided tools

- Simple video editing (assembling clips, adding captions - nothing complex)

- Possibly create thumbnails using our process

- Other production tasks as needed (everything has clear instructions)



What We're Looking For:

- Task-oriented and organized: you love completing work efficiently

- Strong at following instructions: if there's an SOP, you follow it

- Good English (written and verbal)

- Hardworking and reliable: we need consistency

- Available full-time, Monday-Saturday

- Editing skills are a bonus but NOT required (we'll teach you our simple workflow)



Requirements:

- Full-time availability (Monday-Saturday)

- Reliable internet connection

- Access to Claude.ai (or willing to get it immediately)

- Comfortable learning new tools and systems

- Can work independently without constant hand-holding



Compensation & Growth:

- Month 1 (trial): $350/month full-time

- Month 2+: Around $500/month (based on workload and performance)

- Long-term: As we hire more people, you'll have first opportunity for team lead/management roles

- As our first VA, you have the strongest career progression potential



Why This Role Matters:

You're our first hire. If you prove to be reliable and understand what we need, you won't just be doing tasks forever—you'll help us build and manage the team as we scale.



How to Apply:

- Send your resume

- Answer these questions:

What makes you good at following instructions and staying organized?

Put "SYSTEMS READY" in your subject line



Starting ASAP - hiring 1 VA within the next week.
