title: Meta Ads & Creative Specialist VA – Facebook/Instagram Campaigns & Creatives (E-commerce Wellness Project)
description:
We’re running a fast-moving e-commerce launch for wellness/supplement products (targeting women 35–55 with weight loss/menopause focus). We need a skilled Meta Ads Specialist to take full ownership of
 & Instagram ad campaigns: setup, targeting, creative production, testing, optimization, and daily performance management. You’ll run the traffic engine independently after initial handover, delivering leads for owner to close via WhatsApp. Goal: High ROAS (return on ad spend) with low-risk creatives that avoid platform flags.

Key Responsibilities



Build, launch, and manage Meta ad campaigns 
 & Instagram) using Ads Manager/Business Suite.

Define & refine audiences: Women 35–55, interests (weight loss, menopause, wellness, Ozempic alternatives, fitness after 40), behaviors, lookalikes from pixel data.

Create & refresh ad creatives: Use Canva to design images (before/after transformations, urgency overlays), short videos if possible, write compelling copy (emotional hooks, testimonials, scarcity). Produce 5–10 variations per test.

Run A/B tests: Low-budget daily tests ($20–$50/day initially), analyze results (clicks, CPC, CTR, conversions), scale winners, pause losers fast.

Set up & monitor pixel/events for tracking (views, add-to-cart, leads).

Optimize daily: Adjust bids, budgets, placements, targeting based on data.

Report simply: Daily/weekly Google Sheet updates (spend, ROAS, leads generated, top creatives).

Light organic support: If experienced, post subtle seeding/comments on relevant Reddit subs (follow strict guidelines to avoid bans).

Follow provided guidelines: Avoid direct drug/medical claims in ads/copy to reduce ban risk.



Required Skills & Experience



1–2+ years hands-on experience managing Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns (e-commerce, lead gen, or wellness preferred).

Proficient in Meta Business Suite/Ads Manager, pixel setup, audience targeting, A/B testing, scaling.

Strong Canva skills (or basic Photoshop) for quick ad image/copy creation.

Solid English communication (written reports, clear updates).

Data-driven mindset: Comfortable analyzing metrics and making optimization decisions.

Reliable internet, quiet workspace, backup power (common in PH).

Honest, proactive, and able to work independently with minimal supervision once trained.

Bonus: Experience with Reddit/social seeding, lookalike audiences, or running urgency/FOMO campaigns.



What We Offer



Weekly payments on time.

Clear templates, targeting lists, ad guidelines, and training handover (I’ll share everything needed to run autonomously).

Opportunity for more hours/pay if you deliver strong ROAS in first 2 weeks.

Long-term role if it’s a great fit.

Direct owner communication (no agency layers).



How to Apply

Reply with:



Your full name & OnlineJobs.ph profile link (or resume/portfolio link).

Short intro: Why are you a strong fit for Meta ads + creative production in e-commerce/wellness?

Your hourly rate expectation ($8–$12 range).

Years of experience specifically with Meta ads (campaign management, not just general social).

Attach 2–3 screenshots/examples of past Meta ad campaigns/creatives you’ve created or managed (blur any sensitive/client info; show targeting, copy, images, performance if possible).

Your typical availability (hours/day, timezone) and if you can overlap with Thailand evenings for quick chats.



Serious applicants only – top candidates will get a quick paid test task ($30–$50, e.g., “Set up a mock campaign for women 35–55 wellness audience + create 3 ad variations”). We respond within 24 hours.

Looking forward to your application!

Thomas

Marketing drives our growth, and we’re looking for a talented PPC Specialist to help us expand into YouTube and Google Ads while optimizing our existing lead generation strategies. Our teams are collaborative, fun, and growth-focused—we support one another to create, innovate, and thrive together.



Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced PPC Specialist to manage and optimize our paid advertising efforts across YouTube and Google Ads. In this role, you will design, implement, and optimize campaigns that generate high-quality leads while maximizing ROI.

You will work closely with our marketing and creative teams to ensure all campaigns align with our brand messaging and overall marketing strategy.



Key Responsibilities

- Campaign Management: Create, manage, and optimize YouTube and Google Ads campaigns

- Strategy Development: Build comprehensive PPC strategies targeting the right audiences with the right messaging

title: Account Specialist
description:
The Perfect Sales Job!



We are looking for the top 10% of sales performers in the world. If you have a strong history of sales success, this might be the dream role for you.



What We Offer



Starting with a great base salary, this job offers incredible earning potential:

* Base Salary: $750 USD per month

* Commissions: 5% on all new sales

* Quality Leads: 100% work-from-home with preset and pre-qualified appointments (No cold calling!)



Plus, after your first year, you unlock:

* Health and dental program

* Performance bonuses

*Retirement program



About the Role & Training



Like we said, this is the world's perfect sales job! This role was designed by our CEO, Steven Lloyd, author of four books on selling, internet, and AI technology.



You will not be left to figure things out on your own—you will be personally trained by one of the best salespeople in the world.



Minimum Requirements



Please review these carefully. We are highly selective, and there are no exceptions to these requirements:



* Location: You must be based in the Philippines. Our entire team is built and managed in the Philippines.

* Language Skills: You must be able to speak, write, and communicate in near-perfect American English. A very slight Filipino accent is acceptable. (If you are from Cebu or have extensive BPO phone experience, you might be a perfect candidate!)

* Experience: At least 1 year of experience working US East Coast hours (8:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST / 9:00 PM to 5:00 AM PHT).

* Workspace: A private home working environment completely free of background noise (no barking dogs, crowing roosters, etc.). No exceptions!

Equipment: ?

-- A good working computer (at least 2.5 GHz clock speed, 8 GB of RAM, and an SSD for storage).

-- A high-quality USB headset with a noise-canceling microphone (or the willingness to purchase one).

* Tech Skills: Familiarity with online digital backup. It is easy to learn, and we will train you if necessary, but you must be trainable!

* Tea
etings: Must be able to attend a weekly Zoom tea
eting every Friday at 8:30 AM PHT. Working from home is fun but can be lonely; this ensures you remain independent while feeling like an important part of our international team.



Earning Potential & Expectations



This is honestly the perfect sales job from home. An above-average salesperson can and will generate $50,000 USD (approx. 2.9 million PHP) a year. Take this seriously!



Note: Please do not assume that just because you've worked the phones for a BPO, you are automatically a salesperson. We are truly looking for top-notch sales professionals. If you make the cut, you will be treated like royalty in our company!



HOW TO APPLY (Crucial Step)



To qualify for a personal interview, you MUST put the following exact sentence in the first line of your application:



"I understand and agree with all of the requirements and I honestly believe that I qualify for an interview."



Any application received that does not contain this in the very first line will be immediately discarded and not read. Please do not waste our time, and we will not waste yours!



Then send us a 1-minute video recording of you talking about why we should hire you.

title: Accounts Payable Assistant
description:
Position

Accounts Payable Assistant



Job Purpose

The Accounts Payable Assistant is responsible for supporting the efficient and accurate processing of supplier invoices, payments, and expense claims, ensuring compliance with company policies and UK accounting standards.



Key Responsibilities

Invoice Processing

• Process high volumes of supplier invoices accurately and in a timely manner

• Match purchase orders and invoices effectively 

• Resolve invoice discrepancies and queries with suppliers and internal teams

 

Payments

• Support multi-currency payments to suppliers 

• Ensure suppliers are paid in line with agreed terms

• Maintain accurate supplier records and bank details including bank reconciliation

• Assist staff expenses processing and payments 

 

Reconciliations & Controls

• Reconcile supplier statements and investigate variances

• Assist with month-end closing activities related to accounts payable

• Support audit requests and maintain appropriate documentation

 

VAT & Compliance

• Ensure invoices are VAT compliant in line with UK VAT regulations

• Support with VAT reporting and HMRC requirements where applicable

 

Communication & Support

• Respond to supplier and internal finance queries professionally

• Liaise with operational teams to resolve issues

• Support continuous improvement of AP processes



Reporting & accountability

• Respond to supplier and internal finance queries professionally

• Liaise with operational teams to resolve issues

• Support continuous improvement of AP processes









Experience & Key Characteristics

• Previous experience in an Accounts Payable or finance assistant role

• Organised with a good understanding of invoice processing and payment procedures

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy

• Proactive problem solver

• Able to handle confidential information with the upmost discretion

• Confident using Microsoft Excel and accounting systems

• Ability to manage workload and meet deadlines

• Team focused with a positive attitude



Qualifications

• Experience with ERP systems (e.g. Sage, Xero)

• Knowledge of UK VAT rules

• AAT qualification or working towards one (Desirable)



If you are a motivated and ambitious professional looking to take the next step in your career, we invite you to join our team at FoodClean. Apply today to be part of a dynamic and growing organization that values you.

title: SEMrush Specialist (Remote)
description:
About Us:

gigCMO is a growth consultancy that provides strategic marketing leadership to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs. As part of our ongoing efforts to enhance our clients' digital presence and performance, we heavily rely on SEMrush for data-driven insights and strategy development. We are seeking a SEMrush Specialist to manage our SEMrush platform, analyse its data, and provide actionable recommendations to optimise our clients' digital strategies.





Job Summary:

We are looking for an experienced SEMrush Specialist to oversee the management and analysis of SEMrush data, offering insights and recommendations to various internal teams. This role is critical for developing and refining SEO and digital marketing strategies, based on in-depth analysis of SEMrush data. The ideal candidate will be highly proficient in using SEMrush and have a strong understanding of SEO, PPC, and competitive analysis.





Key Responsibilities:



Manage and monitor the SEMrush platform to track SEO performance, keyword rankings, and overall site health for our clients.

Analyse SEMrush data, providing detailed reports on SEO, PPC campaigns, competitor analysis, backlink profiles, and content performance.

Develop and recommend strategies for improving organic search rankings, increasing website traffic, and optimising digital marketing efforts based on SEMrush insights.

Collaborate with content, SEO, and marketing teams to align strategies with SEMrush data, ensuring all digital efforts are data-driven.

Conduct keyword research using SEMrush to identify high-potential keywords and provide recommendations for content optimisation.

Identify and track competitors' activities, providing insights on their strengths and weaknesses using SEMrush competitive analysis tools.

Stay up to date with SEMrush updates, new features, and industry trends to ensure we are maximising the platform's potential.

Generate regular reports on SEMrush performance metrics for different teams, including SEO health, keyword movements, and traffic changes.

Offer training and support to internal teams on SEMrush best practices and usage to ensure everyone is leveraging the platform effectively.

Work with teams to ensure technical SEO issues flagged by SEMrush are addressed and resolved.



Required Skills and Qualifications:



Proven experience in using SEMrush as a core tool for digital marketing analysis and strategy development.

Strong understanding of SEO, PPC, keyword research, and competitive analysis.

Ability to interpret SEMrush data and translate it into actionable insights and strategies.

Experience in creating reports and dashboards that effectively communicate SEMrush findings to various teams.

Familiarity with SEO best practices, on-page optimisation, and technical SEO.

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to prioritise recommendations based on impact.

Strong communication skills to present data and insights to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Familiarity with digital tools like HubSpot, Basecamp, and SharePoint or similar for managing workflows and collaboration.



Preferred Skills:



Experience in SEO strategy development, using SEMrush data as a foundation.

Knowledge of content marketing and its relationship to SEO performance.

Familiarity with Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and other digital marketing tools.

Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a remote work environment.



Personal Attributes:



Detail-oriented with strong analytical skills.

Proactive in identifying trends and making strategic recommendations.

Self-motivated and able to work independently while collaborating with teams across departments.

Eager to stay up to date with the latest SEO trends, SEMrush updates, and digital marketing innovations.



Application Process:

This role requires full-time commitment. To apply, please fill out the form using this link: 



Note: Only successful candidates will be contacted for interviews.



Compensation: Php 30,000 (depending on whether the applicant meets 100% of the requirements)

title: Senior Data Analyst (Freelance)
description:
About Surface Scan



Surface Scan is a specialist 3D scanning, reverse engineering, and 3D printing service based in Ramsgate, Kent. We work with clients across a wide range of industries, helping them solve complex engineering challenges using cutting-edge technology. We’ve been growing steadily, but we know we’re sitting on years of valuable data that we’re not making the most of. We need someone who can change that.



The Opportunity



We have years of data spread across multiple platforms – Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Google Ads, Zoho CRM, Xero, our
 marketing platform, our online ordering system, and more. 



We’re looking for a Data Analyst who can dig into what we already have, surface the insights we’ve been missing, and then help us build the systems and processes to make data-driven decision-making a permanent part of how we operate. This is a genuinely exciting opportunity for someone who loves getting stuck into messy, real-world data and turning it into something actionable.



This is a freelance position to start, with flexible hours and full remote working. We see this as a long-term relationship with a clear path to scaling up hours and pay as we grow together and the value becomes clear – which we’re confident it will.



What You’ll Be Doing



Unlocking Our Existing Data



• Diving into years of historical data across GA4, Search Console, Google Ads, Zoho CRM, Xero, our
 platform, and our online ordering system to find meaningful patterns, trends, and insights we’ve been missing.

• Identifying opportunities for growth – whether that’s untapped customer segments, underperforming channels, revenue patterns, cost inefficiencies, or gaps in our sales funnel.

• Connecting data across platforms to build a complete picture of how our marketing, sales, and operations are actually performing – not just in isolation, but end to end.

• Presenting findings in a clear, practical way that non-technical tea
mbers can understand and act on. We don’t need a data dump – we need “here’s what this means, and here’s what we should do about it.”



Building the Right Systems Going Forward



• Auditing our current tracking and analytics setup across all platforms, identifying gaps, and ensuring we’re capturing everything we should be.

• Setting up robust attribution so we can confidently trace leads and revenue back to their source – understanding what’s actually driving results, not guessing.

• Recommending and implementing tools, integrations, or process changes that will improve our data quality and make ongoing analysis more effective.

• Future-proofing our setup so that as we add new services, platforms, or marketing channels, we’re tracking from day one.



Dashboards & Reporting



• Creating Looker Studio dashboards that the team can use day-to-day and in meetings – clear, visual, and built around the KPIs that actually matter for each department.

• Delivering regular reports with insights and recommendations, not just numbers. We want someone who tells us what the data means and what action to take.

• Helping us define and track the right KPIs across marketing, sales, and operations, and making it easy to compare performance across departments.



Strategic Input



• Working closely with the Marketing Manager and Founders to inform business decisions with data – from marketing spend allocation to service expansion, pricing, and beyond.

• Proactively flagging opportunities or risks as you spot them, rather than waiting to be asked.

• Helping the wider team develop a stronger data culture – making sure insights are understood, trusted, and used.



What We’re Looking For



We want someone who is as comfortable asking the right questions as they are finding the answers. You should be able to take a tangled web of data from multiple sources and turn it into clear, actionable insight.



You should have:



• Strong experience working with analytics and reporting tools, particularly GA4, Google Search Console, Google Ads, and Looker Studio.

• Experience working with CRM data (Zoho or similar) and understanding how to connect marketing activity to sales outcomes.

• A solid understanding of attribution modelling and the ability to build reliable tracking across multiple channels and touchpoints.

• The ability to work across multiple data sources and join the dots to produce a unified view of business performance.

• Excellent communication skills – you can present complex data in a way that’s clear, concise, and focused on what matters.

• A proactive, self-directed approach. You’ll be working remotely with a lot of autonomy – we need someone who takes ownership and delivers without needing to be chased.

• A commercial mindset. We’re not looking for someone who just reports numbers – we want someone who thinks about what the data means for the business and makes recommendations accordingly.



Nice to have:



• Experience with Xero or other accounting platforms, and the ability to incorporate financial data into performance analysis.

• Familiarity with SQL, APIs, or scripting for more advanced data extraction and manipulation.

• Experience in e-commerce, service-based businesses, or B2B environments.

• Experience setting up or auditing tracking implementations (GTM, conversion tracking, event setup).



Tools & Platforms



You’ll be working across the following (with more likely to be added as we grow):



• Google Analytics 4

• Google Search Console

• Google Ads

• Looker Studio

• Zoho CRM

• Xero

•
 marketing platform

• Online ordering / quoting system



Why Surface Scan?



• A genuine greenfield opportunity. You won’t be maintaining someone else’s dashboards – you’ll be building the entire analytics function from the ground up.

• Real impact. The insights you uncover will directly shape business decisions, marketing strategy, and growth.

• Years of untapped data to explore. If you’re the kind of person who gets excited about digging into a rich dataset and finding what everyone else has missed, this is your playground.

• A growing business with ambitious plans. As we scale, so does this role – there’s a clear path to increased hours, pay, and responsibility.

• Full remote working with flexible hours and a team that values results over presenteeism.



How to Apply



To apply, please
 the following to 



• Your CV.

• A cover letter telling us why this role interests you and what you’d bring to Surface Scan.

• Any relevant sample work you think we should see – dashboards, reports, case studies, or anything else that demonstrates your approach and capabilities.

title: meta ads specalist
description:
We are currently seeking a skilled Meta Ads Specialist to manage and 
 and Instagram advertising campaigns for two growing brands operating across the UK and Ireland.



This role is ideal for a results-driven digital marketing professional who understands lead generation, campaign optimisation, and performance-based advertising.



The successful candidate will play an important role in generating high-quality enquiries and helping scale our marketing performance.



About the Businesses



You will be managing campaigns for two established brands:



Bespoke Garden Rooms Ballycastle

A premium provider of bespoke garden rooms and outdoor living spaces designed for residential properties.



Ballycastle Climbing Frames

A specialist manufacturer of high-quality climbing frames and outdoor play equipment for families and outdoor spaces.



The primary objective of advertising campaigns will be to generate qualified enquiries and consultation bookings.



Key Responsibilities



Plan, create, and manage
 and Instagram advertising campaigns



Develop effective lead generation strategies and campaign funnels



Build and optimise custom audiences, lookalike audiences, and retargeting campaigns



Write engaging ad copy and messaging



Work with our team to convert existing images and videos into high-performing ads



Monitor campaign performance and optimise for cost per lead and return on investment



Conduct A/B testing of creatives, audiences, and campaign structures



Ensure Meta Pixel and conversion tracking are correctly implemented



Provide clear insights and reporting on campaign performance



Requirements



Proven experience managing Meta Ads 
 & Instagram) campaigns



Strong understanding of lead generation advertising



Ability to analyse campaign data and optimise for improved performance



Experience with audience targeting, retargeting, and campaign scaling



Strong communication skills in English



Experience with CRM systems or landing pages is beneficial but not essential



Ability to work independently and manage campaigns efficiently



Position Details



Remote position



Part-time initially with opportunity for long-term collaboration



Work with a growing team supporting two established brands



Opportunity to contribute to marketing strategy and campaign growth



Application Instructions



To apply for this position, please include the following in your application:



Examples of Meta advertising campaigns you have managed



Performance results or case studies (such as cost per lead or conversions achieved)



A brief explanation of your experience with lead generation campaigns



A short summary explaining why you would be a good fit for this role



To confirm you have read this job description carefully, please include the word “GardenLead” at the beginning of your application.

title: Mobile App Marketing Specialist
description:
We are looking for a Mobile App Marketing Specialist who understands how to promote and grow mobile applications on the Apple App Store and other mobile platforms. This role is ideal for someone who has experience with App Store Optimization (ASO), user acquisition, and mobile growth strategies.



You will be responsible for helping improve app visibility, increasing downloads, and executing marketing strategies tailored for mobile apps.



Responsibilities

 • Develop and execute marketing strategies to increase mobile app installs

 • Perform App Store Optimization (ASO) including keywords, descriptions, screenshots, and rankings

 • Research competitors and analyze market trends for mobile apps

 • Manage or assist with App Store and Play Store listings

 • Plan and run user acquisition campaigns (organic and paid if applicable)

 • Identify opportunities to improve app visibility and conversion rates

 • Track app performance metrics such as installs, rankings, and retention

 • Work with the team to test and optimize marketing strategies

title: CSR & SMM (Healthcare and Insurance) | Full Time | 13month Bonus + Yearly Raises
description:

This position is ideal for someone who is customer-focused, highly organized, tech-savvy, and comfortable communicating in a healthcare or insurance-related environment. The ideal candidate is empathetic, detail-oriented, and confident handling both client-facing communication and administrative responsibilities in a remote setup.

Customer Service

, and social media platforms

mbers

Opportunities for long-term growth within the company

title: Social Media Marketing Specialist (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
================================================================================

ABOUT ENTVAS TECHNOLOGY

================================================================================



Entvas Technology is a US-based custom software development and technology consulting company headquartered in St. Petersburg, Florida. We specialize in building AI-ready, end-to-end business systems for growing companies.



We help businesses transition from scattered, disconnected tools to unified, custom platforms that streamline operations and prepare them for the AI-driven future. 



We're a small but growing team that values initiative, clear communication, and people who take ownership of their work.



================================================================================

THE OPPORTUNITY

================================================================================



We're looking for a Social Media Marketing Specialist who can own our entire social media presence—from strategy to execution. This isn't a "just post content" role. We need someone who thinks like a marketer, understands lead generation, and can connect social media efforts to real business results.



You'll be the person driving our brand visibility, creating engaging content, and building systems that generate qualified leads for a B2B technology company.



If you're someone who gets excited about creating content strategies that actually work, analyzing what's performing, and continuously improving—we want to hear from you.



================================================================================

WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

================================================================================



STRATEGY & PLANNING

- Develop and execute social media strategies aligned with business goals

- Create monthly content calendars across all platforms

- Research industry trends, competitors, and audience behavior

- Plan campaigns that drive traffic, engagement, and lead generation

- Track performance metrics and adjust strategies based on data



CONTENT CREATION

- Design eye-catching graphics for social media posts (LinkedIn,
, Instagram, X/Twitter)

- Write compelling copy that speaks to business decision-makers

- Adapt content for different platforms and audiences

- Maintain consistent brand voice and visual identity



COMMUNITY & ENGAGEMENT

- Manage daily posting and engagement across all platforms

- Respond to comments, messages, and mentions professionally

- Build relationships with followers and industry connections

- Identify opportunities for brand visibility and thought leadership



REPORTING & OPTIMIZATION

- Monitor analytics and report on key performance indicators

- A/B test content to improve engagement rates

- Provide insights and recommendations based on performance data

- Stay current with platform algorithm changes and best practices



================================================================================

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

================================================================================



MUST HAVE:

- 2+ years of experience in social media marketing (B2B experience strongly preferred)

- Proven track record of growing social media accounts and driving engagement

- Strong graphic design skills using Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator) OR Canva Pro

- Excellent written English communication skills

- Strategic thinking ability—you understand HOW social media drives business results

- Experience creating content calendars and executing consistently

- Portfolio showing your design work and content examples

- Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace



NICE TO HAVE (Big Plus):

- Video content creation and editing experience (Reels, short-form video)

- Paid social media advertising experience 
 Ads, LinkedIn Ads)

- Experience with AI tools for content creation (ChatGPT, Midjourney, etc.)

- Experience marketing for technology, software, or professional services companies

- Basic understanding of SEO and how social media supports organic search

- Experience with social media management tools (Buffer, Hootsuite, Later, etc.)



================================================================================

WORK SCHEDULE & ARRANGEMENT

================================================================================



- Full-time: 40 hours per week

- US time zone overlap required: You must be available during US Eastern Time business hours for at least 4-5 hours daily (we can discuss exact schedule)

- This may mean working evenings or early mornings Philippine time

- Long-term position with opportunity for growth

- You'll communicate primarily via Slack and video calls



================================================================================

WHAT WE OFFER

================================================================================



- Competitive salary: $800 - $1,200/month (up to $1,500 for exceptional candidates with strong portfolios)

- Long-term, stable position with a growing US company

- Direct collaboration with company leadership

- Opportunity to shape and own our entire social media strategy

- Room for professional growth as the company expands

- Paid Philippine holidays (negotiable)

- Performance-based salary increases



================================================================================

HOW TO APPLY

================================================================================



To apply, please send:



1. YOUR RESUME - highlighting relevant social media and marketing experience



2. PORTFOLIO - links to:

   - Social media accounts you've managed (or screenshots if confidential)

   - Examples of graphics/content you've created

   - Any campaign results or metrics you can share



3. COVER LETTER answering these questions:

   - Why are you interested in working with a B2B technology company?

   - What's one social media campaign you're proud of and why did it work?

   - What's your availability for US time zone overlap?

   - What is your expected salary within our range?



4. SHORT VIDEO (optional but highly recommended to get recognized):

   - 1-2 minute video introducing yourself

   - Tell us about your experience and why you'd be a great fit

   - This helps us see your communication style and personality



================================================================================

IMPORTANT NOTES

================================================================================



- Please include "SMM Specialist - [Your Name]" in your application subject line

- Applications without a portfolio will not be considered

- We will conduct a paid test task for shortlisted candidates

- We're looking to hire quickly but will take time to find the right person



We're excited to find someone who wants to grow with us. If you're strategic, creative, reliable, and ready to own this role—apply now!

title: DTC CREATIVE EDITOR
description:
We are looking for a proactive Creative Editor who can support creative strategy and own execution of Terra’s content across Meta, Tiktok and Instagram - primarily short-form video. 



You will be responsible for turning raw footage and material into high-quality content that stops the scroll for football fans and fashion-forward consumers alike. We value standards over volume — we'd rather publish three pieces that hit than ten that dilute the brand.



You will work closely with the co-founders in a close-knit, fast moving team - collaborating on creative direction while being trusted to operate independently, edit at pace, and maintain high standards on all content.



Core Responsibilities



- Creative Execution: Edit and deliver high-quality short-form video ads and organic content across Meta, TikTok, and Instagram 

- Creative Research: Stay ahead of platform trends, competitor creative, and football culture 
nts. Surface opportunities before they're obvious, bring references, angles, and ideas proactively.

- Hook Development: Contribute hook variations and opening concepts for every brief. The first 3 seconds d
 everything — you bring ideas and instinct to the table, not just executions.

- Iteration & Testing: Work within a test-learn-iterate loop alongside the founders to identify highest-performing angles, formats, and hooks. Each round of ads informs the next — you flag what's working, suggest what to test, and evolve your approach based on real performance data.

- Brand Consistency: Every piece of content — paid or organic — must reflect Terra's visual identity, cultural references, and tone. You are a guardian of the standard, not just an executor of briefs.

Etsy Listing: Write optimized Titles, 13 Tags, and engaging Descriptions.

Requirements:



Strong aesthetic sense for mode



Proficiency with AI prompting (Gemini)



Experience with Etsy SEO (Keywords).

mber to support our brand’s growth across digital and offline channels. You will play a key role in processing POs, coordinating marketing campaigns, managing events, and driving strategies that connect with our beauty brand presence.

title: E-commerce Ad Creative Designer (Images + Video)
description:
Meta Ads Creative Designer & Video Editor (Image + Short-Form Video) – Streetwear Jewelry Brand (Warpedsense®)



About Warpedsense®

Warpedsense® is a fast-growing, genderless/unisex jewelry brand inspired by streetwear, internet culture, and bold, unique aesthetics.



Our pieces stand out with unusual shapes, rich textures, and edgy details – visuals that demand attention in ads. We sell online across Europe (core market: Germany) and the USA, backed by 50k+ Instagram followers and live Meta campaigns that drive real revenue.



We're searching for a talented, fast-moving creative to craft scroll-stopping ads that convert – and grow alongside us.



Your Role

Work directly with the founder to:

- Research trends & winning ads

- Ideate powerful hooks

- Produce high-performing static image ads + short-form video ads for Meta 
 & Instagram)



Focus: Create multiple variations fast for A/B testing, transforming raw product shots into high-converting creatives.



Key Responsibilities

- Research top-performing ads in jewelry, fashion, streetwear, and direct-response (Meta, TikTok etc.)

- Brainstorm creative concepts & hooks aligned with our style

- Design static image ads (Photoshop/Canva) – macro shots, textures, modern layouts

- Edit short-form videos/Reels (CapCut) – hooks, transitions, text, music sync

- Deliver 5–15+ variations per concept (layouts, copy, formats) for rapid testing

- Support sourcing, organizing & maintaining our creative asset library

- Daily communication via Slack – quick, clear feedback loops



Our Visual Style

- Dark, moody, clean aesthetics

- Unusual jewelry shapes & bold textures (strong macro/close-up focus)

- High-contrast, minimal yet striking compositions

- Streetwear + internet-culture vibe – edgy, modern, authentic



Requirements

- Proven experience in social media/image ads or Meta creatives

- Strong skills in short-form video editing (TikTok/Reels/Ads style)

- Proficient in CapCut (must-have for fast edits)

- Solid knowledge of Photoshop, Canva or similar tools

- Ability to research ads and spot performance drivers (CTR, conversions)

- Excellent written & spoken English

- High attention to detail + quick turnaround

- Reliable, proactive, and passionate about e-commerce growth



Big Bonus Points If You Have

- Experience with e-commerce or product-focused brands (jewelry/fashion ideal)

- Hands-on with AI creative tools (Midjourney, Flux, RunwayML etc.) for rapid ideation

- Knowledge of direct-response / Meta ad best practices

- Portfolio with high-converting ads or streetwear-style content



Tools We Use

- CapCut (main video tool)

- Photoshop / Canva / AI tools

- Slack (daily communication)

- Google Drive / asset libraries



Workload & Schedule

- Part-time: 20–30 hours per week (flexible hours)

- Good overlap with European time zones preferred

- Long-term role with potential to increase hours or take on more responsibility as we scale



Compensation

$1,000 – $1,400 USD per month (depending on experience, skills, and proven results)

+ Performance bonuses for creatives that scale or outperform benchmarks



How to Apply

To show you've read this fully, start your message with: WARPED



Then include:

1. 1–2 examples of static image ads or short videos you've created (or ones you rate highly)

2. Short explanation: Why do they work? (hooks, visuals, conversion potential)

3. Your portfolio link (Behance, Instagram, Drive etc.)

4. Your expected rate within our range + your availability (hours/week)



We're genuinely excited to see your work – only serious, creative applicants, please!

title: Experienced Video Editors (Long-Term Opportunity)

title: Virtual Executive Assistant to Entrepreneur
description:
Job Title: Virtual Executive Assistant to UK based Entrepreneur  



Location: Remote (UK time zone preferred but not essential)



Hours: Part-time (20 hours per week initially)





## About the Role

I am an entrepreneur managing a property portfolio and building a new technology product in the care home sector. I am looking for a highly organised Virtual Executive Assistant to help manage administrative tasks, communications, and coordination across my projects.



The goal of this role is to help streamline operations, reduce administrative workload, and allow me to focus on strategic work.



This is a long-term role with opportunities to grow into a bigger role.



---



## Key Responsibilities



### Executive Support

- Manage and triage
 inbox

- Calendar management and meeting scheduling

- Prepare weekly summaries and updates

- Coordinate appointments and travel bookings



### Property Portfolio Support

- Liaise with property management companies

- Track rent payments and maintenance issues

- Maintain a simple property performance dashboard

- Escalate important issues for review



### Project Coordination (Cyprus House Build)

- Communicate with construction team when required

- Collect weekly updates and summarise progress

- Track key deadlines and decisions



### App Development Support

- Help organise care home focus groups

- Conduct basic research

- Coordinate meetings with potential partners and developers

- Organise documentation and project files



### Finance & Admin

- Organise invoices and receipts

- Liaise with accountant when needed

- Track financial tasks and deadlines



### Personal Assistance

- Travel arrangements

- Online purchases

- Household scheduling (cleaners, services, etc.)

- Miscellaneous errands



---



## Ideal Candidate

- Highly organised and detail-oriented

- Excellent written communication

- Strong problem-solving mindset

- Comfortable working independently

- Proactive and able to anticipate needs



---



## Required Skills

- Strong English communication

- Experience with Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

- Task management tools (Notion, Trello, Asana, etc.)

- Basic spreadsheet skills

- Ability to summarise information clearly



---



## Bonus Skills (Not Required)

- Property management experience

- Startup or tech project exposure

- Research and data organisation

- Project coordination experience



---



## Success in This Role Looks Like

- Inbox stays organised

- Projects move forward without constant oversight

- Administrative workload is reduced

- Clear weekly updates are provided



---



## How to Apply

Please include:

1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your previous assistant or admin experience

3. Tools you are comfortable using

4. Your hourly rate

5. Availability per week



Applications that include the phrase “organised and proactive” in the first line will be prioritised

title: Google Ads Manager
description:
Google Ads Specialist (Long-Term | Client-Facing | Strategy + Setup | White Label for UK Agency)



 Job Description



We are a growing UK-based paid ads agency looking for a highly skilled Google Ads Specialist to manage client accounts and help us scale.



We already have our first Google Ads client ready to launch.



We need someone who can:



• Build and structure accounts from scratch

• Conduct keyword research based on budget

• Create a clear campaign plan of action

• Set up full tracking (GA4, GTM, conversions, call tracking if needed)

• Write high-converting ad copy

• Optimise weekly

• Communicate professionally with clients via
 (cc’ing the agency owner)

• Provide structured weekly optimisation reports

• Help set up our own Google Ads account to generate more clients for this service



The agency owner will handle all video calls and strategy calls.

You will handle the execution and technical delivery.



This is a long-term role with growth potential.



???? Important: This Is Not For Beginners



You MUST:



• Be confident building accounts from zero

• Understand match types and intent

• Know when to use Manual CPC vs Smart Bidding

• Be able to explain your strategy clearly

• Be comfortable diagnosing high CPL issues

• Have strong English written communication



If you just “set up campaigns and let Google optimise” — this role is not for you.



We are looking for a strategist, not a button pusher.



???? Your Responsibilities



1?? Client Account Setup

– Full keyword research

– Campaign structure based on budget

– Negative keyword planning

– Conversion tracking setup

– GA4 + GTM configuration

– Extensions and ad assets



2?? Ongoing Management

– Weekly optimisation

– Search term mining

– Bid adjustments

– Ad testing

– Budget reallocation

– Performance diagnostics



3?? Reporting 
-Based)

Each week you will send:



• Spend

• Leads

• Cost per lead

• What was optimised

• What is being tested next

• Recommendations



4?? Internal Growth Support

You will also help build and optimise our own Google Ads account to attract more clients.



???? Required Experience



• Minimum 3 years managing Google Ads

• Experience with lead generation campaigns

• Experience setting up conversion tracking manually

• Experience using GA4 and Google Tag Manager

• Strong understanding of search intent

• Ability to explain strategy clearly



Bonus if you have:

• Agency experience

• Experience with UK or European markets

• Experience working white-label



???? Pay Structure



We prefer a fixed monthly rate per account.



Please apply with:



• Your monthly rate per account

• Your hourly rate (if applicable)

• Case studies or results

• Screenshots of accounts you’ve managed (remove client names if needed)



This is long-term work for the right person.



???? IMPORTANT – To Apply



In your application:



1?? Explain how you would structure a £1,500/month lead generation campaign.

2?? Explain your full tracking setup process from scratch.

3?? Tell us about a campaign that failed and what you did to fix it.

4?? Start your message with the word “STRATEGY” so we know you read everything.



Applications without this will be ignored.

title: Video Editor & Social Media Manager
description:
Looking for a Video Editor & Social Media/Creative Assistant



We’re seeking a talented Video Editor & Social Media/Creative Assistant to support our agency clients, primarily in beauty and fashion.



What we’re looking for:

- Video editing (highly important): Creating engaging, cinematic videos for clients using Adobe Premiere, Final Cut, or similar.

- Strong aesthetic eye: Ability to curate beautiful feeds and visuals.

- Social media savvy, with a strong eye on trends.

- Excellent English: Strong copywriting skills and ability to adhere to brand tone.

- Design skills: Canva is essential; Photoshop highly regarded.

- Attention to detail: Able to humanise and refine any writing generated by AI tools like ChatGPT.

- Plans ahead: Can map out content calendars, campaigns, or creative ideas that align with overall brand strategy.



You’ll help us bridge creativity and strategy, making sure our visuals, copy, and campaigns are not just beautiful, but purpose-driven.



We would love to see examples of your work or personal projects - we’re looking for someone with a keen visual taste and polished creative output.

title: Long-Form VSL Video Editor for Facebook Ads (Direct Response | 10–40 Min VS
description:
We’re looking for a skilled long-form VSL video editor who understands direct response marketing for
 ads and can edit 
–40 minute VSLs as well as short VSLs (3–5 minutes).



This is not typical YouTube editing.

You must understand sales psychology, pacing, and retention for paid traffic.



If you’ve never edited long-form direct response 
 for
 ad funnels, this role is not for you.



Inspiration for the Style We Want



Here is an example of the type of long-form VSL editing style we are looking for:







You should be able to create similar pacing, storytelling, and visual engagement.



What You’ll Be Editing



• Long-form VSLs (10–40 minutes) for
 ad funnels

• Short VSLs (3–5 minutes)

• Advertorial-style videos

• Performance marketing creatives



Typical editing elements include:



• b-roll

• motion graphics

• captions

• charts / visual explanations

• pattern interrupts

• stock footage

• sound design

• pacing optimized for viewer retention and conversions



Requirements



You must have experience editing direct response VSLs used in paid traffic funnels.



You should understand:



• retention pacing

• emotional storytelling

• direct response structure

(hook ? problem ? mechanism ? solution ? proof ? CTA)



Tools typically used:



• Premiere Pro / After Effects / Final Cut

• Motion graphics

• Stock footage sourcing



IMPORTANT — Application Instructions



To apply, you must send:



1?? 1 long-form VSL (10+ minutes) you edited

2?? 1 shorter VSL or ad (3–5 minutes)

3?? The editing software you use



Applications without long-form VSL examples will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Social Media 
 (Remote – Philippines)



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Contract: Full-time, contractor basis (home-based)



Working style: 100% remote, with twice-yearly in-person tea
etups (you should be reasonably accessible to Manila for these)



Hours: Full-time, with overlap required with UK working hours for collaboration



About Kitto



Kitto is a specialist marketing and branding agency working exclusively within the recruitment industry. We partner with recruitment businesses around the world to help them stand out through strategic, creative marketing — spanning employer brand, content, campaigns, design, video, animation, and copywriting.



We operate as a fully remote global team, collaborating across time zones to deliver high-quality creative work that makes recruitment brands feel more human, more credible, and more impactful.



The Role



We’re looking for a Social Media Manager to lead and level up social for Kitto and support social delivery across a selection of client accounts.



This is not a “just schedule posts” job. You’ll be responsible for shaping social direction, building content plans, improving performance, and making sure our channels (and our clients’) show up consistently, confidently, and creatively — especially on LinkedIn, with support across Instagram and TikTok.



You’ll work closely with strategists, copywriters, designers, and account leads, and you’ll be a key part of our growing Philippines-based team function.



What You’ll Do



Social Strategy & Planning

- Own and evolve the social media approach for Kitto (and selected clients): positioning, content pillars, formats, and channel plans.

- Translate campaign and brand strategy into practical, platform-native content plans.

- Build and manage content calendars that balance consistency, creativity, and commercial impact.



Content Creation & Copy

- Create and oversee engaging, on-brand content across LinkedIn, Instagram, and TikTok (posts, carousels, short-form video, stories/reels).

- Write smart, personality-filled copy tailored to platform, audience, and brand voice.

- Brief designers and creatives clearly (and jump in to create yourself when needed using Canva/CapCut/Adobe Express-level tools).



Publishing, Community & Engagement

- Manage publishing schedules and ensure content goes out on time, with quality control.

- Proactively engage with followers, communities, and relevant conversations to build visibility and trust.

- Spot and respond to trends early — turning insights into content ideas, not just observations.



Performance & Optimisation

- Track and report performance (reach, engagement, follower growth, clicks/leads where relevant).

- Turn data into actions: testing formats, improving hooks, refining messaging, and making recommendations.

- Share regular performance updates internally (and with clients when applicable), including what’s working and what to try next.



Collaboration & Delivery

- Work closely with account leads and the wider team to bring campaigns to life across social.

- Support content shoots/interviews remotely (and occasionally help plan what’s needed to get strong social cut-downs).

- Communicate clearly, flag blockers early, and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced agency environment.



This Role Suits Someone Who…

- Has 3–5+ years experience managing social media (agency, in-house, or freelance), with clear examples of results.

- Is confident owning social strategy and executing the work (not one without the other).

- Can write sharp, conversational copy — especially for LinkedIn — and understands what makes content perform.

- Understands the difference between “posting content” and “building a social presence.”

- Is organised, dependable, and comfortable juggling multiple accounts and timelines.

- Communicates clearly in English (written and spoken) and collaborates well across time zones.

- Has strong creative judgement and a point of view — but isn’t ego-driven.

- Enjoys experimenting, learning, and improving performance through iteration.



Tools & Platforms



Required

- LinkedIn (advanced understanding), plus
, X, Instagram and TikTok

- Scheduling tools and content calendars (you don’t need to be loyal to one tool — just competent)

- Canva + basic short-form video editing tools (CapCut and/or Adobe Express level)

- Strong working knowledge of analytics/insights and reporting



Desirable

- Experience supporting employer brand, recruitment marketing, or B2B social

- Basic paid social understanding (boosting, targeting, campaign basics)

- Experience briefing creatives (design/video) for social-first execution



What We Offer

- Fully remote working (Philippines-based)

- Structured contractor engagement with paid public holidays, annual leave, and sick leave entitlement

- A collaborative, supportive team environment with mentoring and professional support

- Exposure to a wide variety of global recruitment brands and creative projects

- Opportunities to develop across strategy, campaigns, and emerging tools

- Twice-yearly in-person Phillipines tea
et-ups for collaboration and celebrations



Kitto is committed to maintaining fair and transparent holiday and sickness policies that support work/life balance and wellbeing across our global team.

title: Multi-Channel Outreach & Campaign Executive (Email, LinkedIn & WhatsApp) - UK Recruitment Market

, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp) and generate qualified booked calls for our directors.

 campaigns!

Channels You Will Manage

LinkedIn Outreach

Skills & Experience Required

s for lead generation

Who This Role Suits

- Seeking long-term remote opportunity  





Shortlisted candidates will complete a small paid test task before hiring.

Project details



Remote

title: WordPress Developer (Breakdance + Headspin)
description:
Project role with potential long term position



We are a premium UK property company looking for a skilled WordPress developer to help restructure and standardise our website.



Our website is already live and built in WordPress using Breakdance and Headspin. We now have a new design ready, and the first phase of this role is to implement that design and bring consistency to the entire site both frontend and backend.



This role starts as a defined project, but if the collaboration works well it may develop into a long term development role including automation, integrations and system development.



Project Overview



Our website currently contains many pages built using Wordpress/Breakdance and Headspin, but pages were created over time and now need to be standardised.



Your first task will be to:



• Implement a new design across the website

• Standardise layouts and templates in Breakdance

• Organise and clean up Headspin components

• Ensure the entire system is structured and consistent

• Improve responsiveness and layout quality

• Ensure everything is maintainable moving forward



The goal is to turn the site into a clean, structured and scalable system.



Responsibilities



You will:



• Implement supplied designs across our existing WordPress site

• Rebuild layouts using Breakdance builder

• Create reusable templates and components

• Standardise styling using Headspin

• Improve responsiveness across devices

• Clean up inconsistent layouts and structures

• Ensure strong performance and maintainability



You should be comfortable reviewing an existing site structure and improving it methodically.



Technical Requirements



You must have strong experience with:



WordPress Development



• WordPress architecture

• Theme and template structure

• Performance optimisation



Breakdance Builder



• Building templates and layouts

• Reusable components and sections

• Clean page builder structure



Headspin Framework



• Design system structure

• Consistent component styling



Front End Development



• User Interfaces

• HTML

• CSS

• JavaScript



You should write clean, structured and maintainable code within Wordpress/Breakdance.



SEO and Performance Knowledge



You must understand how development affects SEO and performance.



Important areas include:



• Semantic HTML structure

• Page speed optimisation

• Mobile performance

• Core Web Vitals awareness

• Clean heading hierarchy

• Structured page layouts



The goal is a fast, search engine friendly website.



Working Structure



You will work directly with the CEO, who built and manages the current website structure.



Because of this, it is important that you can:



• Analyse an existing WordPress setup

• Ability to retain existing SEO with the new design

• Understand how the system currently works

• Identify inconsistencies and structural issues

• Implement improvements in an organised way



You should be comfortable reviewing and improving an existing architecture rather than starting from scratch.



Clear communication and attention to detail are important.



Future Opportunities



If the first phase goes well, the role may expand into ongoing development work including:



• WordPress feature development

• System integrations

• Automation workflows

• AI assisted tools and infrastructure



We are exploring tools such as:



• OpenClaw

• n8n automation

• Custom integrations



This role could grow into a long term technical position within our development ecosystem.



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



• Writes clean and organised code

• Understands structured systems

• Has strong attention to detail

• Communicates clearly in English

• Takes pride in producing high quality work



You enjoy turning messy systems into clean scalable platforms.



We are looking for a high quality developer.



To Apply



Please include:



• Links to WordPress websites you have built

• Examples of Breakdance work if available

• Your experience with CSS and JavaScript

• Your availability for this project



Please begin your application with the words:



Structure first



This helps us filter automated responses.

title: Virtual Assistant – Lead Follow-Up & Appointment Setter (Part-Time, Remote)
description:
Overview



We are hiring a Virtual Assistant who can start responding to leads immediately. This role is focused on real-time lead follow-up, customer messaging, and booking appointments.



You will be communicating directly with potential customers on Day 1 using proven scripts and processes. If you are comfortable jumping into conversations and keeping a calendar full, this role is for you.





What You’ll Do (Day 1 Expectations)

 • Respond to inbound leads as they come in

 • Follow up via SMS,
, and
 Messenger

 • Use provided scripts (with room for natural conversation)

 • Ask basic qualifying questions

 • Book appointments directly onto our calendar

 • Update lead status and notes in the CRM immediately after conversations

 • Send confirmations and reminders



Additional Responsibilities (As Needed)

 • Re-engage older or inactive leads

 • Keep CRM clean and organized

 • Flag hot leads or urgent requests

 • Help improve scripts and follow-up flows

 • Light admin support as assigned



Required Skills (Non-Negotiable)

 • Excellent written English

 • Confident communicating with customers

 • Experience responding to leads or customer inquiries

 • Comfortable following scripts while sounding natural

 • Strong attention to detail

 • Able to work independently without constant supervision

 • Reliable internet and fast response time



Strongly Preferred

 • Appointment setting or sales support experience

 • CRM experience (any platform)

 • Prior work handling live chats, SMS, or inboxes

 • Ability to respond quickly during assigned hours



Schedule & Pay

 • Full-time 40 hours plus more availble

 • Set coverage hours required

 • Pay based on experience

 • Performance bonuses for booked appointments



What Success Looks Like

 • Leads are contacted quickly and consistently

 • Calendar stays full with qualified appointments

 • CRM is clean and up to date

 • Customers feel professionally handled

 • You become a trusted part of the operation



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



To be considered, you MUST:

 1. Start your application with “Ready to Respond”

 2. Briefly describe your experience responding to live leads

 3. Confirm you are comfortable messaging customers immediately

 4. Complete the trial task below



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.



Trial Task (Day-1 Simulation)



Scenario:

A lead filled out a form 1 minute ago asking about your service.



Task 1 – First Response



Write the first message you would send within 5 minutes of receiving the lead.



Task 2 – Follow-Up



Write one follow-up message if the lead doesn’t respond after 24 hours.



Rules

 • Friendly, professional, confident

 • Not pushy

 • Goal is to book a call

 • 2–3 sentences max per message

title: Brand Manager – Hungry Artisan
description:
Purpose:

Oversee brand strategy, performance management, product lifecycle, inventory, and PPC coordination, ensuring all business activities align with Hungry Artisan’s & TrekTek Outfitters growth goals, brand identity, and profitability targets.



Reporting To: CEO (Justin Hopkins)

Works Closely With: PPC Specialist, Product Development & Optimization Specialist and Marketing & Customer Experience Specialist



Core Responsibilities:

Brand Strategy & Positioning

-Define and refine the brand’s identity, message, and customer persona.

-Translate business goals into actionable marketing strategies.

-Develop and maintain an annual brand calendar (launches, promotions, content themes).

-Manage project management tool Asana



Performance Management & KPIs

-Set measurable KPIs for Amazon, Shopify, social media, and
 marketing.

-Analyze data weekly and monthly to identify growth opportunities and inefficiencies.

-Partner with PPC Manager to manage TACoS, ACoS, and ROAS goals.

-Track profitability by channel and report to CEO monthly.

-New Product Development & Launch



Manage the entire lifecycle of new products:

-Research opportunities (alongside Product Research & Optimization Specialists).

-Validate product potential based on market demand, competitor landscape, margins, and brand fit.

-Create and optimize product listings for Amazon, Walmart, Shopify, and other marketplaces.

-Ensure SEO optimization and keyword strategy for maximum visibility.

-Handle ongoing listing updates, optimization, and performance tweaks.

-Coordinate product launches across all channels, including PPC campaigns, social media, and
 marketing.

-Maintain a New Product Tracker with project status, samples, listing details, inventory, and financial projections.

-Ensure all current and future listings are fully optimized 



Inventory Management:

-Monitor inventory levels across all platforms and markets & work with CEO to develop orders.

-Ensure all listings reflect accurate stock counts across marketplaces.

-Work proactively to prevent stockouts or overselling.



Amazon Support & Issue Resolution:

-Serve as the point of contact for Amazon Seller Support escalations.

-Resolve listing issues, account notifications, and other platform-related problems.

-Maintain knowledge of Amazon policies, tools, and best practices to prevent disruptions.



Campaign Oversight:

-Approve and oversee ad campaigns, social promotions, and
 themes.

-Ensure brand message consistency across channels.

-Review creative and copy assets before deployment.

-Operational Systems Ownership & Process Optimization

-Develop, implement, and maintain all brand SOPs to ensure clear, repeatable processes across the team.

-Own the organization and ongoing management of team Google Drives, ensuring files, templates, assets, and documentation are logically structured and easily accessible.

-Manage and optimize Asana project workflows, including task creation, timelines, dependencies, and team accountability.

-Continuously audit and refine operational systems to improve efficiency, eliminate bottlenecks, and support scalable brand growth.

-Train team members on new processes and tools, ensuring consistent adoption and compliance across all functions.



Analytics & Reporting:

-Produce a Monthly Brand Performance Report summarizing

-Sales, TACoS, ad spend, and profit performance

-Product-specific performance

-Social,
, and traffic metrics

-KPI tracking and insights

-Next-step recommendations

-Conduct quarterly review meetings with CEO



Deliverables:

-Weekly Summary Report: Overview of campaigns, performance, inventory, and product pipeline status.

-Monthly Brand Performance Report: KPI tracking, insights, and next steps.

-Quarterly Growth Plan: Strategy roadmap (new products, marketing initiatives, optimization focus).



Change Log (shared with PPC Manager):

-Daily Emergencies: Any performance or budget corrections.

-14-Day Optimizations: Planned updates and tests.

title: AI Operations Specialist
description:
This is not a task-completion role. We are not looking for someone to follow a list of instructions. We are looking for someone who will look at how CPH currently operates, identify what is slow, repetitive, or being done manually, and tell us clearly: this can be done better, and here is how. You will also bring knowledge of AI tools we have not yet discovered. We currently use a set of tools that work for us, but we do not believe for a second that we are using the best possible stack. We want you to challenge that. If there is an AI tool that would save us time, reduce manual effort, or improve the quality of our output, we want to know about it. In short: come in, look around, find the gaps, fix them, and show us what we are missing.



"Pay is straightforward. You earn $6/hr as a base. On top of that, every time you identify and implement an improvement that saves CPH meaningful time or effort, we agree on a bonus for that delivery. The more value you bring, the more you earn."



Ongoing Responsibilities

AI Tool Discovery

• Continuously research new and emerging AI tools across any category relevant to CPH:
, content, scheduling, outreach, CRM, automation, data, and beyond

• Trial tools and present clear, practical findings to the Founder so decisions can be made quickly

• Do not limit yourself to what we already use. If something better exists, we want to know

Process Improvement

• Audit CPH workflows on an ongoing basis and identify what is repetitive, manual, or inefficient

• Propose specific improvements and, once agreed, implement them

• Track the time or effort saved from each improvement so bonuses can be calculated fairly

AI Workflow Management

• Build, refine, and document AI-powered workflows and prompts for repeatable CPH tasks

• Manage and optimise our use of current tools: GHL, Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Manus, Opus Clip

• Write clear SOPs so other tea
mbers can follow any new process you put in place



What We Are Looking For

We will judge every application first on one thing: what AI tools have you actually used, and what difference did they make? That is more important to us than years of experience or a long CV.



You are the right person if:

• You can name specific AI tools you have used and explain clearly what they did for the business you worked in

• You have looked at a manual or repetitive process before and found a smarter way to do it

• You follow AI developments closely and know what is new, what is overhyped, and what is genuinely useful

• You are comfortable working independently with minimal supervision and presenting your findings clearly

• You write and communicate in clear, professional English

• You are motivated by results and comfortable being paid based on what you deliver



Familiarity with any of the following is a bonus:

• Our current stack: GoHighLevel (GHL), Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Manus, Opus Clip

• AI-powered
 management tools

• Automation platforms such as 
 or n8n

• Content scheduling or social media automation tools



What You Can Expect

• $6/hr base pay, paid for hours worked on agreed tasks

• A bonus agreed upfront for each improvement or project you deliver that saves CPH meaningful time

• Direct working relationship with the Founder, with real input into how the business runs

• A role that grows with you: if you deliver consistently, hours and pay increase

• A team that takes AI seriously and will actually implement what you recommend

title: US LLC EXPERT
description:

GenZone is an international business services firm helping entrepreneurs launch and operate global businesses. We assist clients with US LLC formations, payment processor setup, banking, compliance, and global tax structuring.



We work with clients from around the world and help them establish efficient business structures in the United States and Dubai.

ITINs submitted



Cases pending with the IRS



Average EIN extraction time

Required Skills & Qualifications

• Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken)

• Comfortable speaking with government representatives on the phone

• Strong attention to detail and documentation

• Ability to work during US business hours

title: Jewelry Concept Designer (Product & Collection Design)
description:
About Warpedsense®

Warpedsense® is an independent jewelry brand inspired by streetwear, internet culture and bold modern design.

We create genderless / unisex jewelry with dark aesthetics, unusual shapes and strong textures.

We sell online across Europe (main market Germany) and the United States.

We're looking for a creative concept designer to help us accelerate new product launches and expand collections – turning moodboards and references into fresh, on-brand jewelry ideas.



Your Role

Work directly with the founder to generate design concepts and variations that fit our modern streetwear vibe. Focus: Creative ideation and visualization – no technical CAD modeling required (our production partner handles final CAD and prototyping).



Key Responsibilities

- Create jewelry design concepts from moodboards, references and briefs

- Generate 8–12+ design variations quickly (rings, pendants, bracelets, chains etc.)

- Develop new product ideas and complete collections

- Expand existing designs into matching pieces (e.g. ring, pendant, bracelet, set)

- Prepare simple design sheets / tech packs for selected concepts (front/side views, key dimensions, materials, textures, notes)

- Collaborate closely via Slack – fast feedback and iterations



Example Workflow

1. Founder sends moodboard + references + brief

2. You deliver 8–12 initial concepts (sketches/mockups)

3. Founder selects 2–3 favorites

4. You refine and create simple tech pack / design sheet

5. Selected designs go to production and they send CAD files back for final approval



Our Design Style

- Dark, moody, clean aesthetics

- Bold, unusual shapes & rich texture

- Genderless / unisex with strong streetwear and male appeal

- Edgy, modern, internet-culture inspired – authentic and wearable



Skills Required

- Experience in product design, jewelry/accessory design or fashion-related concept work

- Strong ability to create multiple variations fast

- Excellent eye for modern, streetwear-aligned aesthetics

- Ability to visualize ideas through:

  • Digital sketches

  • Design sheets / moodboard-style presentations

  • Mockups (2D or simple 3D)

  • Basic renders or illustrations

- Good written & spoken English

- Reliable, proactive, fast turnaround



Nice to Have

- Experience with jewelry production / manufacturing processes

- Understanding of casting, materials (Silver etc.) or producibility

- Passion for streetwear, fashion or internet/trend culture

- Familiarity with tools like Adobe Illustrator, Procreate, Photoshop, Clo3D, Blender (simple mockups) or similar



Tools We Use / Expect

- Adobe Illustrator / Photoshop / Procreate for sketches & sheets

- Optional: Blender / Clo3D / Midjourney for quick mockups & renders

- Google Drive for file sharing

- Slack for daily communication



Work Setup

- Fully remote

- Part-time: 20–30 hours per week (flexible hours)

- Good overlap with European time zones preferred

- Long-term collaboration with potential to grow hours/responsibility as we scale



Compensation

$850 – $1,250 USD per month (depending on experience, portfolio quality and speed)

+ Performance bonuses for concepts that get selected for production or help launch new drops



How to Apply

To show you've read this fully, start your application with: DESIGN CONCEPT



Then include:

1. Link to your portfolio (focus on product/jewelry/accessory concepts – Behance, Drive, Instagram etc.)

2. Tools / software you mainly use for concept work

3. 1–2 examples of designs you created from a moodboard or reference (brief description: what was the inspiration, why it works)

4. Your expected monthly rate within our range + your availability (hours/week)



We're genuinely excited to see creative work that matches our edgy streetwear vibe – only serious applicants with relevant portfolio, please!

 One-Off Project With Potential Ongoing Technical Support

This project is for the **Institute of Cosmetologie**, a professional beauty and aesthetics training academy.



This will be a **custom website build**, not just a simple WordPress theme installation. The site will need to support courses, booking systems, integrations and a student learning portal.

---

The website will need to support a training academy that offers:



• Professional training courses

• Course booking and calendar system

The functionality should be similar to this example website:

We also work with a **separate automation specialist who builds workflows inside Zoho**, so the website must allow for these integrations to function correctly.



---



# LMS / Student Portal
