• access theory training modules

• download course materials

• access post-training resources



We are open to suggestions on the best LMS solution to implement.



---



# Project Type



This role is for a **one-off website build project**.



However, we would like to work with someone who is open to providing **occasional technical support in the future** if required.



---



# Payment



Payment will be made **every two weeks during the project build**.



We are open to discussing a **fixed project price** depending on experience.



---



# Ideal Skills



We are looking for a developer with experience in:



• Custom website builds

• WordPress or similar CMS platforms

• LMS systems or course platforms

• CRM integrations (preferably Zoho)

• Booking systems and ca

title: VSL Video Editor (Direct Response / AI-Assisted) for eCommerce Ads
description:
Hey there,



My team and I are looking for a highly skilled Video Editor specialized in VSLs and Mini-VSLs to join our fast-growing eCommerce company.



We are building a creative team focused on high-converting video sales letters (VSLs) and performance marketing creatives.



This is not just a typical editing role.



This is a creative performance role where your work directly impacts the growth of the company.



We primarily advertise to older audiences (50–70 years old) in Western markets.



Because of this, our style is story-driven, structured, and persuasive — not fast TikTok-style editing.



We are looking for someone who understands direct response marketing and can turn scripts and angles into compelling VSL-style video ads.



You will work closely with the CEO and the creative team to build powerful ads that convert.



---



ROLE



Your main responsibility will be editing VSLs and Mini-VSLs for performance marketing.



These videos will be used for:

-
 & Instagram ads

- Advertorial funnels

- Direct response campaigns



You will take scripts, angles, and concepts and turn them into high-converting video ads using strong storytelling and pacing.



---



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Edit VSLs and Mini-VSLs for performance marketing

- Turn scripts into engaging video stories

- Source and structure B-roll to support the narrative

- Use AI tools to generate visuals and clips when needed

- Improve pacing, emotion, and clarity in videos

- Create multiple variations of ads for testing

- Collaborate with the creative team to improve concepts



---



REQUIREMENTS



You MUST:

- Have experience editing direct response VSLs or video ads

- Understand basic direct response principles (hooks, storytelling, problem ? solution, testimonials, authority angles)

- Be comfortable working with AI creative tools



Experience with tools like:

- Higgsfield, NanoBanana Pro or similar image generation tools

- Video generation models such as Veo3, Kling, or Sora



You should also:

- Be able to work independently

- Have a reliable laptop or computer setup

- Have fast and stable internet

- Be fluent in English



---



BIG PLUS



- Experience creating VSLs for ads or funnels

- Understanding of performance marketing creatives

- Ability to suggest new creative angles

- Strong storytelling intuition



---



RESULTS WE EXPECT



- 4–6 high quality VSL / Mini-VSL ads per week

- Strong hooks and storytelling structure

- Continuous improvement in editing quality

- Your own ideas for improvements

- Clear communication with the creative team



---



COMPENSATION



- Starting rate: $5/hour

- 2-week paid trial period

- Performance bonuses for winning ads/edits (up to $250 for editing winning ad)

- Pay increases over time based on performance

- Opportunity to grow into a long-term part-time or full-time position



We are building a long-term creative team, not just hiring freelancers.



---



IMPORTANT – HOW TO APPLY



When applying, please include:

1. Examples of your best VSLs or video ads

2. Tell us if you have experience with Higgsfield or image generation models

3. Tell us if you have used video generation models like Veo3, Kling, or Sora

4. Explain shortly what makes a VSL convert

5. If you read the whole job post, include the word “VSL” at THE END of your application



Applications that do not follow these instructions WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.



---



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us and contribute creatively, not just edit clips.



If you are disciplined, creative, and passionate about performance marketing, this could become a strong long-term opportunity.



Looking forward to your application.



—



Kacper Jegier

CEO, KJ ECOMMERCE LIMITED

Monitoring occupancy, revenue, and expense performance



Assisting in underwriting new acquisition opportunities



Preparing investor and executive performance reports



Ideal Candidate Profile



We are looking for someone who:



Has 3+ years of real estate financial analysis or asset management experience



Has worked with U.S.-based commercial or multifamily properties



Is highly skilled in Excel (financial modeling required)



Understands NOI, CapEx, IRR, occupancy metrics, and budget forecasting



Has experience reviewing full property P&Ls



Is confident working independently with U.S. leadership

title: DESIGN PROJECT COORDINATOR
description:
Remote – Philippines (Full-Time Preferred)

Nicole Greene Interiors



Schedule



Must overlap with U.S. Eastern Time



?



ABOUT NICOLE GREENE INTERIORS



Nicole Greene Interiors is a U.S.-based luxury residential interior design firm specializing in new construction, spec homes, custom builds, and vacation rentals. We work closely with builders and private clients and are expanding rapidly.



We are hiring a Design Project Coordinator to serve as the operational and communication backbone of our design team.



This role is not a junior position. You will be trusted to manage communication, workflow, and follow-through across multiple projects.



?



WHAT THIS ROLE DOES (CORE PURPOSE)



Your primary responsibility is to keep projects moving forward — on time, organized, and calm.



You will:

 • Protect designers’ deep work time

 • Communicate clearly with clients, builders, and vendors

 • Track tasks, approvals, and deliverables

 • Support marketing and monetization initiatives



?



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



 PROJECT & WORKFLOW COORDINATION (PRIMARY)

 • Track multiple projects simultaneously

 • Maintain timelines, task lists, and priorities

 • Follow up on approvals, missing information, and decisions

 • Prepare clear status updates for internal and external teams

 • Ensure designers receive complete, organized inputs



?



CLIENT, BUILDER & VENDOR COMMUNICATION

 • Fluent English (written AND spoken) required

 • Communicate professionally with U.S.-based clients and builders

 • Handle vendor outreach, follow-ups, and coordination

 • Schedule meetings and manage ongoing communication

 • Act as first point of contact for project logistics



?



 SPECIFICATION & PROCUREMENT SUPPORT

 • Send specification requests to vendors

 • Collect pricing, lead times, and availability

 • Organize selections and documentation (Google Sheets) 

 • Track orders and delivery status

 • Support design presentations and spec books (Microsoft power point and Good sheets) 



?



 MARKETING & CONTENT SUPPORT (SECONDARY)

 • Assist with Instagram posts and Reels coordination

 • Schedule and organize Pinterest content and ads

 • Create simple graphics using Canva templates

 • Help organize and upload products to an Amazon Affiliate Storefront

 • Coordinate content across platforms (not responsible for strategy)



?



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE



Fluent spoken and written English

Strong customer service and professional communication

Project coordination or operations experience

Excellent follow-up and organization skills

Comfortable working with deadlines and multiple stakeholders

Canva (basic to intermediate)

Instagram & Pinterest

Must be able to create and edit Google spreadsheets to track projects 

Must have excellent attention to detail

title: Podcast & YouTube Producer – Terri Talks
description:
???? About Terri Talks & Built to Last:

Terri Talks is a bold, faith-forward media platform and podcast that centers real people, real challenges, real solutions—and real estate. Powered by *Built to Last*, a purpose-driven coaching and consulting company focused on legacy and generational wealth, we equip our audience with personal and financial development strategies that shift lives.



We’re on a mission to reach more ears, more eyes, and more hearts with powerful stories and game-changing education.



???? Role Overview:

We’re hiring a Podcast & YouTube Producer to grow our digital audience, optimize content strategy, and elevate Terri Talks across platforms. You’ll manage end-to-end production, book powerhouse guests, edit video and audio, and strategically grow organic reach on YouTube and podcast platforms.



???? Roles & Responsibilities:

Content Production:

   - Edit, produce, and publish podcast episodes and YouTube videos weekly

   - Handle intro/outro, transitions, sound quality, and upload formatting

   - Repurpose content for social clips, reels, and shorts



Audience Growth & Optimization:

   - Optimize SEO for YouTube titles, tags, and thumbnails

   - Grow podcast listeners via organic marketing and distribution strategies

   - Manage upload schedule and audience engagement

   - Monitor analytics and adjust strategy based on performance



Guest Management:

   - Research, pitch, and schedule high-impact guests

   - Prepare guest onboarding packets and interview briefs

   - Handle follow-ups and post-show communication



Content Planning:

   - Collaborate with Terri to plan content calendar aligned with brand goals

   - Create campaign themes for launches, series, and special segments

   - Propose content that aligns with current events and audience pain points



???? Expectations:

        - Must have a reliable, high-speed internet connection

        - Must have a computer capable of handling large video/audio files without lag

        - Must have access to backup power and systems to ensure work continuity

   - Growth-minded with a proven track record of building an audience

   - Creative, coachable, and aligned with the values of *Built to Last*

   - Able to meet production deadlines and deliver polished, branded content

   - High attention to detail and willing to go the extra mile for audience impact

   - Comfortable with faith-based, real estate, financial, and empowerment content



????? Tools Required (or Willing to Learn):

   - Adobe Premiere Pro or Final Cut Pro (video editing)

   - Audacity, Descript, or Adobe Audition (audio editing)

   - Canva (thumbnails, graphics)

   - YouTube Studio (channel management + SEO tools)

* Riverside.fm or Zoom (interview recording)

* Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Calendar)

* Trello or ClickUp (content pipeline)

* Libsyn, Podbean, or Buzzsprout (podcast distribution)

* CapCut or Recut (short-form content)

* **Backup power supply (e.g., UPS or generator)**

* **Laptop or desktop with at least 16GB RAM and fast storage (SSD preferred)**

* **Stable internet connection with at least 25 Mbps download & 10 Mbps upload speed**



Bonus if You Have:

* Experience growing channels to 10K+ subscribers or podcast downloads

* Familiarity with social media marketing (IG Reels, TikTok, etc.)

* Graphic design, animation, or branding experience

* Knowledge of real estate, business, or Christian entrepreneurship

description:

Perfectly Fast Moving Company is a full-service long-distance moving company based in the U.S. Unlike brokers, we handle everything with our own trucks and crews. We are expanding our remote team and hiring motivated individuals to join us as Customer Sales Representatives.



Job Description:

You will begin as a call opener, engaging with potential customers and collecting their moving details. With training and strong performance, you will grow into a closer - handling full sales calls and securing bookings. This role offers a clear career path and high earning potential.



Responsibilities:

- Answer inbound calls and make outbound follow-ups.

- Provide excellent customer service with fluent, confident English communication.

- Transition into a closer role to handle complete sales calls and secure bookings

- Strong communication and listening skills.

title: Video Editor

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Are you someone who thrives in a dynamic environment and enjoys taking on a variety of tasks throughout the day? Do you have a passion for organization and helping businesses run smoothly? If so, we’d love to have you join our team!

About Us:

We’re a growing real estate photography business that prides itself on delivering high-quality visuals to our clients. We believe in working hard, having fun, and supporting each other along the way. We’re looking for a Virtual Assistant who shares our values and is eager to help us streamline our operations.

What You’ll Be Doing:

Quality Control & Photo Delivery: Review and deliver photos in the morning when they come back from our editors.

Retouch Requests: Handle requests for photo retouching throughout the day, ensuring our clients get exactly what they need.

Client Acquisition: Use our Instagra
thod to send outbound messages and help us connect with potential new clients.

s & Phone Calls: Manage communication with our clients, keeping them informed and satisfied.

What We’re Looking For:

Willingness to Work in Eastern Standard Time (7 a.m. to 3 p.m. EST): Since most of our clients are based in this time zone, we need someone who’s ready to work when we are.

A Positive Attitude: We’re all about keeping things friendly and supportive, and we want you to be a part of that vibe.

Why You’ll Love Working with Us:

Supportive Team: We’re here to help each other out, and we’ll make sure you have everything you need to succeed.

Room to Grow: As our business expands, so do the opportunities we are able to give you.

If you are interested:



Send your resume, a screenshot of an internet speed test, and a video introducing yourself to 
 and we will reach out with next steps!

title: Pinterest Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY



If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here:







Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



 Job Description



We’re hiring a Pinterest Manager to take full ownership of our Pinterest presence and turn it into a high-performing sales channel.



This role owns both organic Pinterest growth and Pinterest Ads performance, with a strong focus on turning Pinterest into a scalable paid acquisition channel.



This is not a generic social media role—we’re looking for someone who deeply understands how the Pinterest platform works, from its search algorithm and Smart Feed to pin formats, trends, and conversion paths. Your goal: drive meaningful traffic and sales from Pinterest through smart, strategic execution.



Mission Statement: Build and scale a Pinterest strategy that doesn’t just look good—but performs. You will grow impressions, increase outbound clicks, and **drive profitable revenue through both organic content and paid Pinterest campaigns.



Primary Responsibilities





Pinterest Organic Strategy & Execution



- Develop and execute a Pinterest-specific strategy rooted in platform best practices and SEO.

- Stay on top of Pinterest’s evolving algorithm, features (e.g., Idea Pins, video), and trends to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Use keyword research and SEO to craft high-converting titles, descriptions, and hashtags.

- Align Pinterest strategy with seasonal campaigns, product launches, and key retail 
nts.

- Build and maintain a structured Pinterest keyword library to support ongoing SEO efforts.

- Leverage Pinterest keyword insights to inform both organic content and paid targeting.



Pinterest Ads Strategy & Execution



- Plan, launch, and manage Pinterest ad campaigns to drive traffic, conversions, and revenue.

- Develop a full-funnel Pinterest strategy that integrates organic content and paid amplification.

- Own campaign structure across prospecting, retargeting, and catalog sales campaigns.

- Manage budgets, bids, and pacing to hit performance targets.

- Continuously test audiences, creatives, and campaign types to improve efficiency.

- Partner with the eCommerce and analytics teams to ensure proper tracking and attribution.

- Scale winning campaigns while maintaining target CPA/ROAS goals.



Content Creation & Scheduling



- Design and publish optimized pins (static, video, Idea Pins) that speak to our target customer and drive clicks.

- Build and maintain organized boards with strategic themes and branding.

- Manage publishing cadence based on performance data and best practices through Tailwind, Pinterest Scheduler, or similar tools.

- Ensure all pins are visually on-brand and aligned with HiEnd Accents’ positioning.



Performance Analytics & Optimization



- Track and report on KPIs weekly/monthly: outbound clicks, saves, conversions, CTR.

- Run A/B tests on creative, formats, and timing to improve pin performance.

- Continuously refine strategy based on what the algorithm favors and what drives the best ROI.

- Monitor and optimize for downstrea
trics such as assisted conversions and revenue contribution where available.

- Monitor competitor activity and emerging Pinterest trends within the home and interior space.



Cross-Functional Coordination



- Collaborate with our marketing, design, and eCommerce teams to align Pinterest with overall brand goals.

- Repurpose and adapt content for Pinterest from broader campaigns and launches.

- Identify and surface high-potential UGC or inspiration imagery for Pinterest use.



Requirements



- Have 2+ years of hands-on Pinterest Ads and organic Pinterest experience** for a brand or eCommerce business.

- Demonstrated experience managing Pinterest Ads Manager, including campaign structure, audience targeting, and bid optimization.

- Comfortable working with performance data, dashboards, and attribution reporting.

- Passion for interior design, home décor, or lifestyle brands preferred.

- Experience working with luxury, premium, or design-driven brands is a strong plus.

- Must be able to collaborate during overlapping US business hours as needed.

- Understand how Pinterest works as a visual search engine, not just a social platform.

- Have a strong portfolio or case studies that show you’ve driven real traffic and sales from Pinterest**.

- Are skilled with Pinterest SEO, keyword research, and algorithm-based strategies.

- Know your way around Tailwind, Canva, Photoshop, and Pinterest Analytics.

- Are detail-oriented, self-directed, and results-focused.

- Bonus: experience with affiliate marketing, *
 capture from Pinterest, or using Pinterest for DTC sales.

- Please include links to Pinterest accounts, boards, or case studies you have directly managed.



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at [
](
).



Want to get to know us better and learn what it’s like to be part of our growing team in the Philippines? Learn more here: 



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay



Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to continuously learn, grow, and develop their careers



Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

title: Order Management Lead - Remote Based
description:
APPLY HERE:

Job Description



We're seeking a highly capable and proactive Operations Lead to join our dynamic team at HiEnd Accents. This role is critical in ensuring seamless order management and operational excellence across our organization. The ideal candidate will be a problem-solver with strong leadership skills and a track record of driving operational efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Oversee and optimize the entire order management process, from intake to fulfillment, including:

• Bringing in customer orders from various sources (portals, EDI,
s, faxes)

• Confirming and making changes to orders in the ERP system

• Releasing orders/backorders for shipping and organizing for easy picking

• Creating delivery slips, invoicing shipped orders, and managing EDI documents

• Uploading shipping and invoicing information to customer portals

- Lead and mentor the Order Management team, driving accountability and ensuring KPIs and SLAs are consistently met or exceeded.

- Manage key accounts with complex requirements, ensuring high customer satisfaction through:

• Responding to inquiries with same-day service

• Handling payment issues and order-related problems

• Providing information on inventory availability and product inquiries

• Phone outreach

- Proactively identify and resolve operational issues, developing and implementing solutions to prevent recurrence.

- Drive continuous improvement by:

• Analyzing operational data to identify trends and opportunities

• Collaborating cross-functionally to implement strategic changes

• Contributing to special projects aimed at improving performance and scalability

- Spearhead process documentation (SOP) creation, encompassing both refinement of existing procedures and development of new ones.

- Develop and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders, including customers, vendors, and internal teams.

- Maintain accurate documentation of all actions, conversations, and issues using designated tools (e.g., Front and Airtable).

- Communicate effectively with the Warehouse team for shipment alignment.

- Perform other duties as assigned.



Who You Are



- A seasoned professional with 5+ years of experience in operations management, preferably in e-commerce or retail

- An experienced team manager

- Bachelor's degree in Business, Operations Management, or a related field

- Must have recent night shift (PH time) experience and be willing to report to work during CST hours

- Proven track record of contributing to team success and driving operational excellence

- Expert in order management systems, EDI, and inventory management

- Strong analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable insights

- Excellent problem-solving skills with a solutions-oriented mindset

- Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills

- Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities

- Proficient in the MS Office suite, with advanced Excel skills

- Experience with ERP systems and process automation tools

- Experience with SAP is not a requirement, but definitely a plus



Why HiEnd Accents?



Our small size and fast-paced culture reward people who act and think like owners. If you're someone who has a growth mentality, strives for exceptionalism, is a committed professional, and a straight shooter, you'll fit in with our culture and go far with our company.



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows, and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value. We proudly serve a broad clientele, including department stores, furniture stores, boutique hotels, interior designers, and retail customers. HiEnd Accents is based in Irving, Texas. title: Social Media Content VA for The Bourbon Bartender™ — Long-Term, Full-Time (IG, FB, TikTok, Pinterest)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE:

The Bourbon Bartender™ is expanding fast across Instagram,
, TikTok, Pinterest, and YouTube. We share bourbon cocktail recipes, gear recommendations, bourbon education, and creative storytelling. We need a long-term Social Media VA who can help us post consistently, engage with our audience, and maintain the visual and written voice of the brand.

This is NOT a simple “post pictures” role.

We want someone who can run the entire social media machine using our Notion content system, follow our SOPs, and help grow the brand week after week.

???? RESPONSIBILITIES:

Daily Tasks (Mon–Fri):

Schedule daily posts on Instagram,
, and Pinterest

Upload TikTok videos with proper titles, captions, and hashtags

Respond to comments and DMs (script provided)

Track metrics inside Notion

Manage content pipeline: recipes ? graphics ? captions ? scheduled posts

Maintain consistent brand voice and visuals

Weekly Tasks:

Create carousel graphics in Canva

Upload new recipes and scripts into Notion

Prepare weekly content batch (7–14 posts)

Suggest content ideas based on trending formats

Summarize weekly analytics (reach, saves, follows, clicks)

Update Content Calendar

Monthly Tasks:

Create growth report

Recommend high-performing content types

Refresh hashtags and optimize them

Create Pinterest pin sets

???? REQUIRED SKILLS:

Excellent written English

Canva experience (must be strong)

Social media posting experience on IG, FB, TikTok

Ability to follow SOPs exactly

Creative but also organized

Familiar with brand consistency

Familiar with Notion (or fast learner)

Understands trends and post formatting

???? BONUS SKILLS (huge plus):

Pinterest experience

Basic video editing (CapCut or similar)

Graphic design sense

Experience growing lifestyle or food accounts

???? WHAT WE PROVIDE:

Full SOPs for every task

Notion workspace with templates and workflows

Weekly assignments

Long-term, stable role

Opportunities for raises based on results



HOW TO APPLY:

Please send ALL of the following:

A 2–4 sentence introduction

Your Instagram, TikTok, or Canva portfolio

Your experience with lifestyle or recipe content

Your top 3 strengths and top 3 weaknesses

Complete this test task:

Create ONE Instagram carousel (5 slides) for the cocktail: Smoked Old Fashioned.

Include:

Slide 1: Title

Slide 2: Ingredients

Slide 3: Instructions

Slide 4: Pro Tips

Slide 5: Call to action

Applicants who do NOT complete this will not be considered.



In the first line of your application, write: I am your next Bourbon Bartender VA.

If this is missing, the application will be deleted

title: Online Demo Lesson Tutor (Work From Home!)
description:
Brighterly is a fast-growing EdTech startup that helps children in the USA (K–8) succeed in Math and English Language Arts (ELA) through fun and effective online tutoring. Our mission is simple: make learning enjoyable and impactful, preparing kids for a bright tomorrow.



And we’re looking for someone who will be the very first to inspire and engage students on their learning journey!



Apply via this link - only applicants who apply via the link will be considered:


/o/online-demo-lesson-tutor?source=OnlineJobs



As a Demo Lesson Teacher, You Will:

- Deliver engaging 1-on-1 Math & ELA classes using our ready-made materials.

- Showcase Brighterly’s unique approach to parents and students, creating a positive first impression.

- Provide detailed reports on your students’ progress.

- Track performance and share insights to improve the learning experience.



What We Offer:

- Flexible online work — teach from anywhere.

- Ready-made lesson scripts & materials — no extra prep.

- Training & ongoing support from Brighterly mentors.

- Fun, supportive team and professional growth opportunities.

- A chance to impact children’s learning journey from the very first lesson.



What We're Looking For:

- Advanced English (C1+) with little/no accent.

- At least 6 months of experience teaching children.

- High school-level math proficiency (or higher) with a diploma.

- Strong communication & engagement skills.

- Ability to work 20 hours/week during peak hours (weekdays prioritized).

- Reliable computer, webcam, microphone, and internet connection.

- Patience, professionalism, and passion for working with kids.



If you’re passionate about making learning exciting and empowering for children, we’d love to have you on board!
